Friends,
Welcome to the first “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” With your help we are going to take back Wyoming’s lone seat in Congress from the D.C. elites, elect Harriet Hageman to the U.S. House of Representatives, and restore power to Wyomingites.

Harriet has been quite busy recently and the good news just keeps on coming! We wanted to make sure you don’t miss out on any of the exciting developments from the campaign.

For Wyoming,

Team Hageman

__________________________________________________________________________

**Harriet Released an Initial Wave of Endorsements.**
U.S. House candidate Harriet Hageman announced a slew of endorsements Thursday from people in the Wyoming political-sphere.
Hageman was endorsed by one former U.S. representative from Wyoming, along with current and former state lawmakers.
Her endorsers include former U.S. Rep. Barbara Cubin and former Speaker of the Wyoming House Bill McIlvain. Her legislative backers include Sens. Tim Salazar, R-Riverton and Cheri Steinmetz, R-Lingle; and Reps. John Bear, R-Gillette, Rachel Rodriguez-Williams, R-Cody, Jeremy Haroldson, R-Wheatland, Tim Hallinan, R-Gillette, Chip Neiman, R-Hulett, Clarence Styvar, R-Cheyenne, and Rep. J.D. Williams, R-Lusk.
Hageman, a lawyer and former Wyoming GOP official, also counts as supporters former lawmakers Scott Clem, Hans Hunt, Tom Reeder and Marti Halverson.

When your family has been in Wyoming since before statehood, you learn the Code of the West. I learned on my family’s ranch that when you sign on to work for an outfit, when you take a job, you stay loyal to the people who hired you. You [ride for the brand.](https://u23309276.ct.sendgrid.net/ls/click?upn=cNjdLOXrNVuGJHRASJfKft-2FkXyEH221jjnlpP8HayQ-2B7mjwr6qCEx8qPeA6UokfEIiGSl6g6kFU7NaHNktDTsA-3D-3DGMOX_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymhuTI2jG3IYR5NWbV52qgmdAiGhBklNQsRXTWl4rWtz6V26ifmsOhc2lTNkdXy-2F5FFomLfxGZOGa3bZcww1pfz6Aey3dsfrKWhUTpoLQ0DEHz-2ByOtalZp4wCiOx2yH7bBWK0qY1Rs3d5NcecuJf-2BW60npOQSUNrjRoiW5oPTs99JwaOI4FP6VPnM-2FalDVj1vQYRPHNSxJCCndSKacjT7yv6262LvK4XoKWQKtvF8bCoZUl-2Fr6-2FIvuZ-2B4CYhghImzeUT9gtgKnmHeUDfWYpjx8eWKOhvl6fqGMweXFzZLJTlWhW7QTJZD-2B2PqCQdkTzRDIGiC4OBUem2CFx1nijiW60qWwF2b0JNnTl5XV6JLGHXrkNyeg-2ByUc4xNBtmHct00hMPaVqgWD80p1uLEj39w2OeWlF1PTI-2FAaFxbWM-2FdcCrtmeQHEF81TA3vXD3nhO-2BsjOdxQItnwqONwh5C6d8F5C5HLsVozKBvC2bHVKmWqdvp6Oe2YBEqmizFTUCWbHsuEI8v7j9FzBv-2BmfDcBq-2BB4kX-2FZg3ar0mhm-2BzCg5NqhKrd8tLwu-2BtItgUXLw1UWQQZt-2B6A-2B-2BYYyNswDDlSugVMNYBBkQaycvm5xOPjHWLDI7TvxmACtig52aH6bfTFD09-2BL0IRLqzVU7R3DKuLAokH5tB5IQhfwgALOfG6s8CjANGnV0TgtAoS7Bh9k7zLTQsJ60dze8hILC-2BynNh5HZ7qWDWb8zuP1OlnqwMtGLabv93Q2kcmzRS7VbsURIQKjkAqeaN-2BHSXiIjrp-2BBzip25VpRfczEBLKrRkMrUJgR6w5ZhfNv2s3YX9Kd2rLXeUiRouzlMgxUY5-2F-2BmvPx8wbFpIzzKUpXjdImTk7nZ2lfo7PaAx3h74l-2BUAkUgTsGmkymX2pIL-2B-2BEtyGObynn8t-2FI3bMPF)
The idea of riding for the brand means something specific to Wyoming, especially when it comes to the 2022 race for the U.S. House of Representatives. Which candidate exemplifies that basic principle?
As a constitutional attorney, I have spent my career fighting for Wyoming, largely against the federal government’s relentless and unlawful overreach. Environmental extremists and bureaucrats in Washington, D.C., who know nothing about Wyoming’s way of life, are always threatening the ability of people to make it the way my family did.

**New polling shows Harriet with an early lead on Liz Cheney **
Embattled Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney, who’s reelection campaign is under fire from former President Donald Trump, widely trails her top challenger in a new 2022 survey.
In the SoCo Strategies poll conducted to gauge the impact of Trump endorsements, Cheney is [20]-points behind Trump-backed Harriet Hageman.
The new survey of Republican voters found that Hageman, a GOP activist and Cheyenne land and water rights attorney, leads Cheney, 38%-18%. State Representative Anthony Bouchard is at 12% and 26% are undecided.

clean_body: | | | | www.hagemanforwyoming.com Friends, Welcome to the first “Weekly Wyoming Wrap-Up.” With your help we are going to take back Wyoming’s lone seat in Congress from the D.C. elites, elect Harriet Hageman to the U.S. House of Representatives, and restore power to Wyomingites. Harriet has been quite busy recently and the good news just keeps on coming! We wanted to make sure you don’t miss out on any of the exciting developments from the campaign. For Wyoming, Team Hageman In Case You Missed It: Harriet Released an Initial Wave of Endorsements. U.S. House candidate Harriet Hageman announced a slew of endorsements Thursday from people in the Wyoming political-sphere. Hageman was endorsed by one former U.S. representative from Wyoming, along with current and former state lawmakers. Her endorsers include former U.S. Rep. Barbara Cubin and former Speaker of the Wyoming House Bill McIlvain. Her legislative backers include Sens. Tim Salazar, R-Riverton and Cheri Steinmetz, R-Lingle; and Reps. John Bear, R-Gillette, Rachel Rodriguez-Williams, R-Cody, Jeremy Haroldson, R-Wheatland, Tim Hallinan, R-Gillette, Chip Neiman, R-Hulett, Clarence Styvar, R-Cheyenne, and Rep. J.D. Williams, R-Lusk. Hageman, a lawyer and former Wyoming GOP official, also counts as supporters former lawmakers Scott Clem, Hans Hunt, Tom Reeder and Marti Halverson. Read more from the Casper Star Tribune Our campaign released our first ad,, and Harriet wrote an op-ed in the Cowboy State Daily on the same theme. When your family has been in Wyoming since before statehood, you learn the Code of the West. I learned on my family’s ranch that when you sign on to work for an outfit, when you take a job, you stay loyal to the people who hired you. You The idea of riding for the brand means something specific to Wyoming, especially when it comes to the 2022 race for the U.S. House of Representatives. Which candidate exemplifies that basic principle? As a constitutional attorney, I have spent my career fighting for Wyoming, largely against the federal government’s relentless and unlawful overreach. Environmental extremists and bureaucrats in Washington, D.C., who know nothing about Wyoming’s way of life, are always threatening the ability of people to make it the way my family did. Read the entire op-ed New polling shows Harriet with an early lead on Liz Cheney Embattled Wyoming Rep. Liz Cheney, who’s reelection campaign is under fire from former President Donald Trump, widely trails her top challenger in a new 2022 survey. In the SoCo Strategies poll conducted to gauge the impact of Trump endorsements, Cheney is [20]-points behind Trump-backed Harriet Hageman. The new survey of Republican voters found that Hageman, a GOP activist and Cheyenne land and water rights attorney, leads Cheney, 38%-18%. State Representative Anthony Bouchard is at 12% and 26% are undecided. Read the entire Washington Examiner article Harriet discuss our new ad and our fight to take back Wyoming. www.hagemanforwyoming.com | | | |

Jack Ballard is an outdoorsman and he loves to hunt. And as a hunter, he knows that we must practice sustainability or else we put our natural resourc | | | [](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=8706fe0ef1ef4cfea2415238d43b2f34&_e=4kNvQryXxyXcOsQDN8ganv2qZcu4PAJ-yWy9OF3kTyBXG0EGuVx7ngFamwKajt97016JbDf-jsx1ZOTqa8lAJH6eu9iK4VCHfnGS6XPniuw6hs_2G-wGLvo5DHK-fCVxVZN7CLyKGYkLJjpg5mrwOzKei9NV_sTtnGKds9ck7owyH2Ex9VzogbarxvmGLWEq4JzKf4bEVxrQ-ZyvguQgdXzCLzhKuCyRIYY87jU6T8KCICCrKJwr9bCL61IsstInB1B34mco6Lra1L6n4KcHmH2kqJevCHcc55dRg275PK8w9I0KMgaTjlNDl0ZxvOEAvgD7dzTwIES7OFvQPZ8hXCMS2Llbl6oBeof-Mn7dnxIrDmd4e8IResgtm7_-EIsl_dPEt0Z8nugv5KeuycJVSed3U4ZW1XblksMEtkwzqX9f-CC7wzUTjZbI9ljg2Lkefvax1ObjU7Yx3wMWvctSBombKj77iUYj_cIxps5Zq5M%3D) Many of you know that Jack is a leading outdoors and wildlife conservation writer. He has published numerous books on conservation, ethical fair chase hunting and fishing, and the outdoors. It’s not just what Jack does, it’s who he is. Jack is from the mold of the hunter/conservationist who understands Montana’s wildlife, wild lands, and tradition of ethical, fair chase hunting, fishing, and conservation. It’s a sharp contrast from Matt Rosendale, who has voted against key conservation measures that conserved lands and wildlife habitats throughout his political career. **[We need a strong champion of wildlife on Congress, and that’s Jack. Once elected, Jack will support key measures like the historic _Recovering America’s Wildlife Act_. This once-in-a-generation investment in state wildlife agencies would invest much-needed billions in the conservation and management of wildlife. And it was crafted when incredibly diverse interests came together to look for new ways to fund wildlife conservation.
**[Jack will always work with people of all parties and interests to do good things for our state, and that’s why we need him in Congress. Chip in any amount to help him get there today.](http://links.ballardformontana.com/u/click?_t=01481013522b4e28a72d84f828a757ef&_m=8706fe0ef1ef4cfea2415238d43b2f34&_e=4kNvQryXxyXcOsQDN8ganv2qZcu4PAJ-yWy9OF3kTyBXG0EGuVx7ngFamwKajt97016JbDf-jsx1ZOTqa8lAJH6eu9iK4VCHfnGS6XPniuw6hs_2G-wGLvo5DHK-fCVxVZN7CLyKGYkLJjpg5mrwOzKei9NV_sTtnGKds9ck7owyH2Ex9VzogbarxvmGLWEq4JzKf4bEVxrQ-ZyvguQgdXzCLzhKuCyRIYY87jU6T8KCICCrKJwr9bCL61IsstInB1B34mco6Lra1L6n4KcHmKWYLFqzLMvY80AllGHw92u1m1ZUuc3_qC6VSTYfgHui6fRvzIVmdPit33JNB7bwrqiHI3a6ddZ0lWFQKIxN2kwNi0BR_XM9sRS-5lULW-QfcSYZIxCIwR1kTI6eWafrd5ShdTIXAbNisL_j3g4X1f2umOCA4wupBDePtb5rYeHxeTzqFiKzlz3Magk9_o3gHlveDMsEnM7G6XLJznY2VCc%3D)**

clean_body: Jack Ballard is an outdoorsman and he loves to hunt. And as a hunter, he knows that we must practice sustainability or else we put our natural resourc | | | Many of you know that Jack is a leading outdoors and wildlife conservation writer. He has published numerous books on conservation, ethical fair chase hunting and fishing, and the outdoors. It’s not just what Jack does, it’s who he is. Jack is from the mold of the hunter/conservationist who understands Montana’s wildlife, wild lands, and tradition of ethical, fair chase hunting, fishing, and conservation. It’s a sharp contrast from Matt Rosendale, who has voted against key conservation measures that conserved lands and wildlife habitats throughout his political career. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | ---|--- | | Once elected, Jack will support key measures like the historic Recovering America’s Wildlife Act. This once-in-a-generation investment in state wildlife agencies would invest much-needed billions in the conservation and management of wildlife. And it was crafted when incredibly diverse interests came together to look for new ways to fund wildlife conservation. Thanks for being in this fight. \-- Ballard for Montana Jack Ballard grew up on a ranch west of Three Forks homesteaded by his grandfather in 1907. He knows how to fight for Montana and he intends to fight for you and MT-02 in Washington D.C. PAID FOR BY JACK BALLARD FOR MONTANA.

subject: They want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for Senate |
body:
**It 's time to FIRE FAUCI!** **[Chip in if you agree! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996945:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)** __ | |
---
Peter,

Here's something Washington won't want you to hear: even the scientist who discovered the omicron variant has called the Biden/Fauci travel ban a "hysterical overreach."

**_The doctor who discovered the new variant wrote an op-ed this week that said that so far, no one's been hospitalized in South Africa. So far, no one's died from this disease. _**

_That 's what I just talked about on Fox News. [**WATCH NOW**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996945:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)_[** _ >>_**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996945:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996945:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)
The truth is that the hysterical power-hungry bureaucrats in charge of public health - like Dr. Fauci - don't want you to know what's really happening. They want you scared. They want you to be compliant. And apparently, they want you skipping Christmas unless you line up for a booster.

They want to create fear. They want to indulge hysteria. They want to destroy the economy while they're doing it. These are the last people we need in charge. That's why I'm leading the effort to FIRE FAUCI and restore common sense. Will you join my fight by chipping in now?
__
[**STAND WITH RAND: $25**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996946:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)

The so-called experts have proven too many times that they have no idea what they're doing.

They don't care about COVID - they care about power!

And it's about time we say ENOUGH IS ENOUGH.

It's time for Fauci TO GO before we lose any more time or freedom listening to his hysterical lies.

I have been fighting to dismiss Fauci for a while now, but I know more than ever I can't do it alone.

**I hope you'll chip in now to join the fight:[https://secure.winred.com/randpaul/action-3357636/](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58996945:63E8_kENH:m:1:3253819041:3EE0BFD8D69BF9E5D3038DE9DF98A37E:r)**

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

subject: We’re suing Twitter and need your help
body:
Dear Peter, Big tech corporations like Twitter, Facebook and Google are attacking, silencing, and censoring millions of conservatives. They're targeting any conservative who dares question the government-approved opinions on vaccine mandates and the chaotic 2020 presidential election. And if that wasn't bad enough -- we've now discovered that these _big tech companies were conspiring with and taking orders from powerful liberal politicians!_ That's right -- _**we caught leftists government officials unconstitutionally colluding with "Big Tech" to silence their political opponents**!_ And unless conservatives like you and me take immediate action to stop them, our 1st Amendment rights will be nothing but meaningless words on an old piece of paper... That's why I'm asking you to join our critical fight today... [**Will you rush back an emergency donation of $20 today to help us win our lawsuit against Twitter and these liberal elected officials?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) In case you missed our big announcement on _**Tucker Carlson Tonight**_ , let me explain. In 2018, California created the Office of Election Cybersecurity to "educate voters" with "valid information" on regarding elections. This new government office quickly became a _**political weapon**_ of the far-Left Secretary of State's office which used it to censor and silence conservatives. And conservative lawyer and activist Rogan O'Handley quickly found himself a target. At first Rogan was banned from Twitter for violating "rules about election integrity." Then, when Rogan questioned the chaotic presidential election procedures or the results it was deemed a "violation," and quickly removed from Twitter. _But that 's not the worst of it..._ Recently, new documents prove that radical Leftist operatives working within California's partisan Office of Election Cybersecurity instructed Twitter to censor Rogan. Just look at one exchange: Secretary of State Alex Padilla's staff messaged Twitter and said: _**" We would like this tweet taken down ASAP."**_ Then the next day Twitter responded saying, _" Thank you for reporting, Tweet has been removed. Please don't hesitate to contact me if there is anything else we can do."_ Then it happened... After Rogan dared to question the number of votes Joe Biden got during the election, Twitter permanently banned Rogan! **This proves that liberal government officials used government property to censor the political speech of their enemies****!!** And it's NOT just a private company -- these radical "Big Tech" companies are working hand-in-glove with liberal politicians and government officials to silence and destroy conservatives. Please know that Rogan's Twitter account was wildly popular and had more than 400,000 followers. **_It 's clear that the ONLY reason his account was banned was because the Left was worried that his tweets would damage Joe Biden's image._** In fact, Rogan's opinions didn't just threaten the image of Joe Biden... These radicals were also worried that his tweets would destroy then-California Secretary of State Padilla -- _who was being considered to fill Kamala 's Harris' vacated Senate seat!_ It doesn't take a rocket-scientist to see that this collusion between "Big Tech" and the government to silence conservatives is corrupt and unconstitutional. That's why my team of constitutional lawyers is suing Twitter, Senator Alex Padilla, California Secretary of State Shirly Weber and a handful of other liberal elites for their unconstitutional assault of the 1st Amendment. [**Will you help win this critical lawsuit by sending a generous, tax-deductible contribution of $20, $35, $50 or more to the Center for American Liberty today?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) My name is Harmeet Dhillon and you may recognize me from my numerous appearances on _**Newsmax**_ and _**Fox News**_ with **Laura Ingraham, Tucker Carlson,** and **Shannon Bream**. I've been on a lot talking about our numerous battles _and victories_ against the radical Left. We went all the way to the U.S. Supreme Court to get houses of worship reopened and to stop the unconstitutional attacks on people of faith during COVID lockdowns. _**But I never thought the attacks on our individual rights would be this bad.**_ Not only are we suing Twitter -- a multi-billion-dollar corporation -- for its gross violation of Rogan's 1st Amendment right to free speech... We're also taking on former-Secretary of State Alex Padilla for conspiring with Twitter to silence conservatives. And even though we feel great about our case, this will be the hardest legal battle we've ever fought... You see, as a non-profit, everything we do to defend our civil liberties is because of the help and support of conservative patriots like you. And this massive lawsuit is expected to cost us over $1,000,000... [**So, can I count on you to stand up to Twitter and Senator Padilla by making a one-time donation of $20, $35, $50 or more today****?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) This legal battle will define the future of our country... Will we sit back and allow liberal politicians, "Big Tech" corporations, and government bureaucrats to destroy our constitutional freedoms? Or, will we prove that WE, the American people will NOT be silenced! I hope you join us in this critical fight to defend the 1st Amendment by rushing back your urgent tax-deductible donation today. For Freedom, Harmeet K. Dhillon P.S. We have clear evidence that liberal government officials colluded with "Big Tech" billionaires to silence and censor conservatives... That's why we just filed a massive lawsuit against Twitter and the radical bureaucrats to hold these radicals accountable for their illegal actions -- and I need your help to win! [_**So, I 'm asking you to join our critical fight today by rushing back your emergency tax-deductible donation of $20, $35, $50, $100, $250 or more today to stop the silencing of conservatives.**_](pdf) [**DONATE**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) [Please consider supporting our efforts to defend our Constitution with a donation today.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997197:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) The Center For American Liberty is a 501(c)(3) charitable organization created to fight against growing anti-free-speech and anti-civil liberties trends.
(C) The Center for American Liberty | [www.libertycenter.org](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/58997198:JBFf4kENx:m:1:3253819041:963F61E51A25EAFF2446EEF8462EADAE:r) PO Box 2510, Leesburg, VA 20177

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Get 800% more stem cells — in your BRAIN!
body:
The researchers in the study call it a “game changer” for wheelchair-bound patients
_Sponsored message_
Did you know that you can activate **[new brain stem cells](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z55bchb72durrpbsdvo0k1bqrqt2huko9u61ths8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs)** ...? In a matter of 60 minutes? Sounds crazy, but... Northwest University researchers are using **_[a new technology called NAD+](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf5q1ss22t1p1t4iueh7qtfh1ac9n4fkfv1rdqno_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs)_** to do exactly that. When they activated brain stem cells in wheelchair-bound patients... the results blew away all expectations. **[Every single one](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zj262fq92n7ihiqc5bc83fanq26bd7ah4bdrah20_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs)** of the 52 patients saw major recoveries. And they were immediate. Louise P., was in a wheelchair, unable to read, and gave up on her career. That all changed overnight. She reports, **[three years](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zo76ko3v4n14sa5u85iu6ib39anvp51vjbrpc8b0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs)** later, that she's free of symptoms... "It does feel like a miracle. I almost have to pinch myself and think 'Is this real? Is it really gone?'" The researchers in the study call it a "game changer" for wheelchair-bound patients. It's all due to a **_[Nobel Prize technology called NAD+](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqfjdnchnf95o86lhlr901bvndflumvuqn0p53go_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs)_** that Ivy League neurologists say has the ability to take old, withered, tired brains... And rebuild them like-new and young again... The best part? This is in your own cells. It's already inside you. You can activate NAD+, from the comfort of your home, without drugs, surgeries, or hospital visits. [Click here](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z687hqjmpkfuvh4g8fuuo65vb8vh89stbs7rhnjg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5g60ob4c3h2bs) to see how.

To Your Good Health, Al Sears, MD, CNS

This product is not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.

name: Jake Evans for Congress
subject: US Rep. Darrell Issa endorses Jake for Sixth District
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| | FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE Dec. 13, 2021 Contact: (470) 588-2028, news@jakeevans.org
US Rep. Darrell Issa endorses Jake for Sixth District
'He's honest, trustworthy, hard-working - and an unafraid conservative,' Congressman Issa says. Longtime conservative warrior Rep. Darrell Issa (R-Calif.) has endorsed Jake Evans for Georgia's 6th Congressional District. Issa served as the nation's watchdog as chairman of the House Oversight and Reform Committee during the Obama administration and President Trump nominated him to serve as director of the U.S. Trade and Development Agency. "When we retake the majority next year, we'll need conservative fighters like Jake Evans to get this country back on track to reverse the damage the Democrats have done in just a few months," Issa said. "He's honest, trustworthy, hard-working - and an unafraid conservative. We need young conservative with backbone to bring new blood and passion to Congress because we have much to do. I look forward to serving with him in the House in 2023." Jake recently met with Issa in Washington. "I have long admired Congressman Issa's passion for the work he does in Congress that's benefited all of our country," Jake said. "He's a visionary leader in both the private and public sectors, and I'm honored to have his support. I won't let him down."
---

subject: UN ‘Experts’ Make SHOCKING Claim About Abortion
body:
Prolife Update And MASSIVE Planned Parenthood Breach Affects Nearly

Elaine flipped this seat by just two points back in 2018 -- that’s too close for comfort, folks.
And this time around, the race could be _even closer_ \-- Virginia just elected a Trump sympathizer for a governor, Elaine has multiple Republican opponents campaigning off of Trump’s Big Lie, and as a top target for national Republicans, she’s already been the center of several attack ads.
But, Elaine has overcome the odds before with your help.
Scott Taylor hasn’t officially entered this race, but apparently he hasn’t had enough of losing to Elaine yet. And if he is gearing up for yet another rematch, we need to be prepared for anything.

And this time around, the race could be even closer \-- Virginia just elected a Trump sympathizer for a governor, Elaine has multiple Republican opponents campaigning off of Trump’s Big Lie, and as a top target for national Republicans, she’s already been the center of several attack ads. | | | Fellow Conservative I know you’re busy with your holiday festivities and to be honest, I really really don’t like sending messages like this, so I’ll keep it short.

We are only a few days away from OUR LAST DEADLINE before our End of Year fundraising deadline...and our numbers are not looking good. This is our last deadline before the quarter, month, and year expire and we can't afford to fail.

When I was named one of the most vulnerable Republican Senators up for reelection, I didn’t want to believe it. But now I do. Democrats are just pummeling Florida with their radical cash and we are having a hard time keeping up. I knew my opponent and I were virtually tied, and I knew this was going to be a tough and expensive race, but we are really in the thick of it right now.

name: Ellen Goodmann Miller via, RasForIowa.com
subject: Nice to meet you, friend 👋
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
If you've driven with Ras, you won't be surprised when he stops to help with car trouble. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39619319/320664384/692104027?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U5YTAwMC0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtuysYIAvGQYE-gXhz2W_5AZykpiRqJ8HyTCajCng44=)
Hi, friend 👋 My name is Ellen Goodmann Miller. If we haven't met yet, I'm proud to be serving as the Political Director for Ras' campaign.

**By now you probably know that we're not running a traditional campaign.** Like Ras, I am a lifelong Iowan. We know that the way to reach people isn’t on the phone or through ads. In Iowa, we do it by meeting them in person, looking them in the eye, and having real conversations. That’s where we find common ground and how we make change.

Ras is as Iowa as it gets. He knows our public education system in and out. He is as at home in camouflage hunting pheasants as he is in his mom’s church. He grills most months of the year. He’s lost students to gun violence. He can go into “red” and “blue” spaces and leave with new friends. He can speak to everyone at the table.

And he does.

If Democrats want a new playbook on how to flip a state -- follow Ras. Invest in Ras. He gets it.

And so, we’re continuing to hit the road to visit Iowans in all the beautiful regions of our home state that we love. As my colleagues can attest, it’s always an adventure on the campaign trail with Ras.

He slows down to point out every piece of public land in the state and plans how he can return to hunt or fish.

He stops to help anyone with car trouble. No matter what.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39619320/320664385/-73891749?refcode=em-121321-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U5YTAwMC0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtuysYIAvGQYE-gXhz2W_5AZykpiRqJ8HyTCajCng44=)
It’s nearly impossible to peel him away from an antique fair.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39619321/320664386/-73891749?refcode=em-121321-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U5YTAwMC0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtuysYIAvGQYE-gXhz2W_5AZykpiRqJ8HyTCajCng44=)
He knows the lyrics to every song by Adele.

One of the greatest gifts on the campaign trail is getting to know Ras’s amazing wife, kids, and extended family. Our daughters have become fast friends.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39619322/320664387/-73891749?refcode=em-121321-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U5YTAwMC0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtuysYIAvGQYE-gXhz2W_5AZykpiRqJ8HyTCajCng44=)
Running a campaign like ours takes time and money. We know we can lead Iowa and the country in making historic change. But we need your help. I’m asking:

[**Will you please chip in $5, $15, or even $50 today? It'll keep us on the road to meet more Democrats and voters across the state. We're still coming up $949 short of last week's goal and I could use your help closing the gap.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39619323/320664388/-73891749?refcode=em-121321-nopens-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjN2U5YTAwMC0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=LtuysYIAvGQYE-gXhz2W_5AZykpiRqJ8HyTCajCng44=)

Grateful for your consideration and I look forward to working alongside you soon.

Ellen Goodmann Miller
Political Director
Ras for Iowa

name: Val Demings
subject: I have 15 minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Schiff for Congress
body:
|
#
I have 15 minutes of free time this morning, Derek. It may not sound like much — but I’ve been working long hours in Congress along with my good friend Adam Schiff to pass President Biden’s agenda, and a gap in my schedule like this is rare. So, as I’m sitting here with my husband, Jerry, and drinking my coffee, I’m reflecting on this historic campaign — and I’ve decided I need to tell you a little bit more about my decision to run for U.S. Senate. As one of Adam’s top supporters, I hope you’ll give me just a moment to hear about it. Back when I was growing up in Jacksonville, I went to segregated schools, washed dishes, and worked at McDonald’s. But my mom saw something special in me. She’d tell me I was _destined_ for something bigger. So, when I thought about 2022 and what our country needed to build back better after a disastrous presidency, I thought about her everlasting words to me: “Never tire, Val.” I thought about the hardworking families like mine who deserve a leader that understands their lives, their struggles and their dreams. I thought about our country’s need to expand our Democratic Senate majority to protect our democracy. And, in the background of all of this, I heard my mother’s voice in my head telling me I could win. So, I decided to run. And now, I’m two points away from Marco Rubio in a race that can decide Senate control, and the stakes are higher than ever: We have a 50-50 split in the Senate. If we lose just one seat, Mitch McConnell regains Senate control — and three Democratic seats are already rated toss-ups. It’s critical we win in Florida, and this race is tight right now, Derek. I’m proud that our movement has an average donation of just $28.45, but building a people-powered movement means it’s going to take all hands on deck to compete against the GOP’s millions in dark money already pouring into Florida. My 15 minutes are almost up, and I have to run to my next call: **So I have to ask — if you believe in this campaign and want to help me defend our Democratic Senate majority, will you split a $10 donation to Adam and me today?** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Adam Schiff and Val Demings will go through immediately:_ | | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39622117/320667337/1658613312?email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20211213_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODYxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMGQ4OGI2Yi0yNDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KqSbkjwTdVLeAObSQoDsXgCz0mQGdVO8kMLB3AtgBxQ=)

name: Congressman Matt Gaetz
subject: Funded Only By Patriots Like You

| Do you ever wonder why it's only true America First fighters who take a stand for your interests and not the Swamp RINOs like Liz Cheney, Adam Kinzinger, and too many others?
Just look at who funds them...
The RINOs grift off special interest groups and PACs, serving their corporate, Big Tech masters until they land that six-figure lobbyist gig.
But our movement? We are funded only by the grassroots support of patriots like you - that's why we put America First!

To those who haven't yet had the pleasure of getting to know my wife, let me introduce you to her.
* She's been a wonderful partner of nearly forty years.
* Peggy is a mother to three and grandmother of beautiful daughters.
* My wife is a loyal and dedicated friend to so many people
* She is kind and caring.
* Her primary mission in life is looking after her family and her friends.
* Peggy is an excellent snow shoveler as the last winter storm proved

She's a true Yooper, and nearly every day, she exclaims, "Isn't this beautiful? We are so blessed." She is adventurous and traveled worldwide for enjoyment and service (stationed together in Pakistan, Afghanistan, and Iraq). Dr. Bob's grassroots campaign is funded 100% by individual donors like you. Can you make a contribution in honor of Dr. Bob's wife, Peggy's birthday? = = = Friends, My wife, Peggy, is an instrumental member of my campaign team, and I couldn't do this without her support. To those who haven't yet had the pleasure of getting to know my wife, let me introduce you to her. She's been a wonderful partner of nearly forty years. Peggy is a mother to three and grandmother of beautiful daughters. My wife is a loyal and dedicated friend to so many people She is kind and caring. Her primary mission in life is looking after her family and her friends. Peggy is an excellent snow shoveler as the last winter storm proved She's a true Yooper, and nearly every day, she exclaims, "Isn't this beautiful? We are so blessed." She is adventurous and traveled worldwide for enjoyment and service (stationed together in Pakistan, Afghanistan, and Iraq). name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: Guess what? We are winning...
body:
| | | | |
---
| | Peter,

I've got a little secret to tell you...

As patriots of every color, creed and background are exposing and stamping out radical, anti-American curriculum from coast to coast, **the parent-led movement to save our schools is winning. **

The political activists who've been trying to quietly indoctrinate our children and grandchildren are on their heels, **but they have one big hope going into next year** - that we get bored, sit back, and let things go back to how they were.

**[We cannot let that happen, so I urge you to support the ongoing efforts of 1776 Action right now. 2022 is going to be an historic year, and we absolutely must be ready.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002190:6NwURkENn:m:1:3298722022:AB364C1D25C10C158491DF1E27DEEFBF:r)**

Since supporting 1776 Action's launch in March, their results have been real and measurable, and it's only the beginning. Here are just a few examples:
---
|
---
|
---
➡️ **Ran a statewide TV, radio and digital advocacy campaign in New Hampshire** for four months in support of a K-12 CRT ban, which is now the law of the land.

➡️ **Launched 'The 1776 Pledge'** which has now been signed by over 300 state and local candidates and current officials including national leaders like Gov. Kristi Noem.

➡️ **Kept the fight against CRT a top issue in Virginia's elections**, culminating in a 1,000+ person rally in Loudoun County with Glenn Youngkin, Winsome Sears and me.
|
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002190:6NwURkENn:m:1:3298722022:AB364C1D25C10C158491DF1E27DEEFBF:r)
|
---
During my time in President Trump's Cabinet, I was incredibly proud to serve on his 1776 Commission. It was a vital step in re-centering the conversation about who we are as Americans, and ensuring that we are accurately teaching our children and grandchildren about their nation's values, history and heroes.

Yet, in his first official capitulation to the radical Left, President Biden canceled it.

It is this same blatant anti-Americanism that led activists in Iowa to protest 1776 Action just the other day, even holding signs that read "Down with 1776."

No matter what the cultural Marxists in our country say, the truth is that the values of 1776 sparked a revolution in human freedom across the planet. And while we must know and understand our shortcomings and failures, we must also celebrate our greatness.

This means ripping toxic ideologies like Critical Race Theory out of our classrooms root and branch, and restoring honest, patriotic education.

**[I am committed to waging and winning this fight in all 50 states, so I hope you will join me today in supporting 1776 Action with as generous a donation as you can make.](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002190:6NwURkENn:m:1:3298722022:AB364C1D25C10C158491DF1E27DEEFBF:r)**

There are going to be hugely important races up and down the ballot next year, and 1776 Action will be on the front lines making sure that this issue is front and center.

Thank you, and may God continue to bless this country we call home.

Sincerely,Dr. Ben Carson
|
---
[DONATE >> ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002190:6NwURkENn:m:1:3298722022:AB364C1D25C10C158491DF1E27DEEFBF:r)
|
---
| | _Copyright(C) 2021 1776 Action, All Rights Reserved._
---

name: Lisa Blunt Rochester
subject: I wanted to let you know about the next couple of weeks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lisa Blunt Rochester for Congress**
body:
Ending 2021 on a high note is crucial.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39625866/320682090/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211213mm1_mm_lbr_9_NG_Nlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGE1ZWEzOC0yYjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LmFY5hmZCpl_iW41HQuQY_ciS3m-Y_dDrBgIHnKxLM=) [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39625867/320682091/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211213mm1_mm_lbr_9_NG_Nlogo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGE1ZWEzOC0yYjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LmFY5hmZCpl_iW41HQuQY_ciS3m-Y_dDrBgIHnKxLM=) I know it’s hard not to look ahead to the holidays, but I need just a minute or two of your time this morning to let you know why a donation to my campaign right now is so, so important. **[If you don’t need convincing, click here to donate!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39625868/320682092/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211213mm1_mm_lbr_9_NG_Nl1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGE1ZWEzOC0yYjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LmFY5hmZCpl_iW41HQuQY_ciS3m-Y_dDrBgIHnKxLM=)**

Since President Biden was inaugurated, the Democratic House delivered on the promises we made during the campaign.

We passed a historic _bipartisan_ infrastructure bill that will make much-needed investments into communities across the country and help tens of thousands of people.

We passed the Build Back Better Act. I can talk about this for days, but here are the highlights:
* Expansion of Medicare benefits and lower prescription drug costs
* Universal, free pre-k
* The biggest clean-energy investment in the nation’s history
* Expansion of the Child Tax Credit
* Billions of dollars toward low-income housing
* Paid family leave
* **_All of these will help create high-quality jobs and strengthen the economy in Delaware and across the country_**

Now, Republicans have had two focuses since January 2021: block the progress we’ve made and take back control of Congress.

So far, we’ve been able to pass all this historic legislation **_despite_** the efforts of Kevin McCarthy and Republicans in Congress. Now, we’ve got to make sure we keep these Democratic majorities so the GOP doesn’t reverse everything we’ve done.

**That is why our 2021 end-of-year goal is so important.

[With just a couple of weeks until 2022, my team let me know that we’re around $4,000 behind where we’ve got to be. Please, can you donate $5 today to help us keep our slim majorities in the House?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39625869/320682093/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211213mm1_mm_lbr_9_NG_Nl1&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGE1ZWEzOC0yYjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LmFY5hmZCpl_iW41HQuQY_ciS3m-Y_dDrBgIHnKxLM=)** **_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_** | | ****[$15 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39625870/320682094/285533349?refcode=EM_FR_211213mm1_mm_lbr_9_NG_NEL15&express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode2=EL15&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NGE1ZWEzOC0yYjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2LmFY5hmZCpl_iW41HQuQY_ciS3m-Y_dDrBgIHnKxLM=)****

name: Mike Lee
subject: humbly asking
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Peter,

The revolution will not be televised, but it's happening on our college campuses.

It's horrifying what is happening in our country. College bureaucrats are using COVID as a way to bring tyranny to their campuses. For example:

* The University of Nebraska-Lincoln has a vaccine mandate, but also forces students to download smartphone apps that use bluetooth for contact tracing. If they fail to comply with weekly testing or break COVID regulations, administrators can use these apps to deny students access to all academic buildings.

* At Oakland University in Michigan, a student was kicked out of her dorm, charged with "conspiracy to violate university policy," and forced to move off campus and take online classes after she mentioned she received a religious exemption for the vaccine on her personal Facebook.

And at Rutgers University, a student was unenrolled at the start of his senior year because he was unvaccinated... despite the fact he chose to attend school remotely and was 70 miles away from campus. They still locked him out of all his email accounts and forbade him from taking classes.

**Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is leading the revolution with Project 1776**. They are organizing student protests against mandates, for freedom of speech, and to fight the radical left.

I spoke with Lauren Daugherty, the CEO of YAL. I _told her I would help YAL raise $32,000 online to recruit and organize students against these COVID mandates mandates_.

[**I am humbly asking you to join me in sending your urgent support to YAL. Can you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or more today to support Project 1776? Click here to donate >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

**Project 1776**

Project 1776 is YAL's effort to grow the Liberty movement and share the ideas of limited government, individual rights, and economic freedom on college campuses.

At the beginning of 2021, YAL committed to the ambitious goal of signing up 100,000 new students before the end of the year, and through relentless student activism, YAL has already exceeded expectations and signed up **over 116,000 new students!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Here's how Project 1776 works:

**ONE:** YAL chapters recruit and identify like-minded students on campus. In 2021, YAL has already recruited over **116,000** new students open to the ideas of freedom.

**TWO:** Campus chapters work with the national organization to plan demonstrations that fight COVID mandates, promote free speech, and support the Constitution on campus.

**THREE:** YAL identifies through their protest young leaders which will then be trained to take their activism beyond campus. YAL is training the next generation of liberty leaders.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Peter, I firmly believe YAL's Project 1776 is a critical bulwark against the radical leftwing agenda. Not only are these students changing campus policies, but they become our future legislators.

**I told YAL I would help them raise $32,000 to fund their Project 1776. **

This isn't money going to line politicians' campaigns. Your support goes directly to getting students recruited, trained, and protesting on their campus.

**Please rush your support today by clicking below and help us save our country.**

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Marxists may have taken over campus administrations, but students are rebelling against COVID and anti-free speech policies.

Nothing in politics moves unless it is pushed. I am counting on your support today.

I do believe YAL activists are the future leaders of our country. They will be on the front lines fighting for liberty every single day.

[**Here 's the link to donate.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Thank you,

Senator Mike Lee

P.S. I am counting on your support to raise $32,000 for YAL's Project 1776. I believe this is our last chance to stop the leftwing radical agenda.

[**Please click here to donate $10, $20.22, or more >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002603:6T6iN6ENp:m:1:3253819041:C77E05C348CA8C3E47A996D843C11C6E:r)

Thank you.

Since I’m sharing with you the weirdness that is my finance team locking me in a room with just a landline and a rolodex (they gave me a computer — but no internet connection — to write this email), I thought you also might be interested in a snippet of what, exactly, my conversations on the phone look like.
First I introduce myself (we’ll skip that since you’re already here), but then we get into the questions that donors have — questions you might have too:
**What’s going to make you effective at legislating?**
We’re at a crisis moment of polarization in this country, and we’ve got to find a way to bring down the temperature. To get anything done, you have to be able to work with others and build consensus. At my core, I am a consensus builder. Politics is a relationships business and if no one wants to have a relationship with you, you’re not going to be very effective.
**Where do you stand in the ideological spectrum?**
I’m a progressive. I think this country needs bold solutions from everything from health care, to climate change, to saving our democracy. But I don’t think compromise is a dirty word. At the end of the day, folks want to see Congress deliver—like we just did with Build Back Better.
**What sets your campaign apart?**
I’m so glad you asked! I actually used to do comedy. And the reason I mention that is I’m trying to bring some of that creativity and a sense of humor to my campaign, because nearly everyone I talk to thinks Democrats are constantly losing the messaging war. So, we need to be more creative in our messaging and figure out how to bring new voters on board and beat the Republican message machine. And from what I’ve seen, folks are really responding to a campaign that doesn’t look like it was grown out of a laboratory in D.C.
[**So, what do you say? Will you chip in to help me 1) spend less time dialing for dollars and more time out in the community but also 2) protect democracy and elect a progressive who will fight for working people and run a campaign that seeks to bring people in, not drive them apart?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39628106/320694313/-847830488?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213calltime_EG_main_SLA_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjIyMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMDU4ZTczNC0zMTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GMN5GOaycT5-BNsoyammVmJgxAQQcgAXaCDCceAqg2Q=)

And from what I’ve seen, folks are really responding to a campaign that doesn’t look like it was grown out of a laboratory in D.C. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = — Eddie (dial tone) | Eddie Geller is an activist, millennial, and former comedian running to bring real representation to the people of Florida's 15th District, and flip a longtime Republican seat in the process. As your Congressman, he’ll fight for the issues that matter most to Floridians: good paying jobs, affordable health care, fighting the climate crisis, and defending our democracy. = | = | PAID FOR BY EDDIE GELLER FOR CONGRESS Eddie Geller for Congress P.O. name: Mike Lee
subject: humbly asking
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Peter,

The revolution will not be televised, but it's happening on our college campuses.

It's horrifying what is happening in our country. College bureaucrats are using COVID as a way to bring tyranny to their campuses. For example:

* The University of Nebraska-Lincoln has a vaccine mandate, but also forces students to download smartphone apps that use bluetooth for contact tracing. If they fail to comply with weekly testing or break COVID regulations, administrators can use these apps to deny students access to all academic buildings.

* At Oakland University in Michigan, a student was kicked out of her dorm, charged with "conspiracy to violate university policy," and forced to move off campus and take online classes after she mentioned she received a religious exemption for the vaccine on her personal Facebook.

And at Rutgers University, a student was unenrolled at the start of his senior year because he was unvaccinated... despite the fact he chose to attend school remotely and was 70 miles away from campus. They still locked him out of all his email accounts and forbade him from taking classes.

**Young Americans for Liberty (YAL) is leading the revolution with Project 1776**. They are organizing student protests against mandates, for freedom of speech, and to fight the radical left.

I spoke with Lauren Daugherty, the CEO of YAL. I _told her I would help YAL raise $32,000 online to recruit and organize students against these COVID mandates mandates_.

[**I am humbly asking you to join me in sending your urgent support to YAL. Can you donate $20.22, $50, $100, or more today to support Project 1776? Click here to donate >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

**Project 1776**

Project 1776 is YAL's effort to grow the Liberty movement and share the ideas of limited government, individual rights, and economic freedom on college campuses.

At the beginning of 2021, YAL committed to the ambitious goal of signing up 100,000 new students before the end of the year, and through relentless student activism, YAL has already exceeded expectations and signed up **over 116,000 new students!**

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Here's how Project 1776 works:

**ONE:** YAL chapters recruit and identify like-minded students on campus. In 2021, YAL has already recruited over **116,000** new students open to the ideas of freedom.

**TWO:** Campus chapters work with the national organization to plan demonstrations that fight COVID mandates, promote free speech, and support the Constitution on campus.

**THREE:** YAL identifies through their protest young leaders which will then be trained to take their activism beyond campus. YAL is training the next generation of liberty leaders.

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Peter, I firmly believe YAL's Project 1776 is a critical bulwark against the radical leftwing agenda. Not only are these students changing campus policies, but they become our future legislators.

**I told YAL I would help them raise $32,000 to fund their Project 1776. **

This isn't money going to line politicians' campaigns. Your support goes directly to getting students recruited, trained, and protesting on their campus.

**Please rush your support today by clicking below and help us save our country.**

[**Donate $20.22 >>>
Donate $35 >>>
Donate $50 >>>
Donate $100 >>>
Donate $250 >>>
Donate $500 >>>
Donate $1,000 >>>
Donate Any Amount >>>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Marxists may have taken over campus administrations, but students are rebelling against COVID and anti-free speech policies.

Nothing in politics moves unless it is pushed. I am counting on your support today.

I do believe YAL activists are the future leaders of our country. They will be on the front lines fighting for liberty every single day.

[**Here 's the link to donate.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Thank you,

Senator Mike Lee

P.S. I am counting on your support to raise $32,000 for YAL's Project 1776. I believe this is our last chance to stop the leftwing radical agenda.

[**Please click here to donate $10, $20.22, or more >>**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002263:JVI1s6ENl:m:1:3298722022:7826BD22453114C52A5209CC7AE389C5:r)

Thank you.

subject: What is the Senate waiting for?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ehasz for Congress
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39628608/320696896/-46617290?refcode=fl_em_pt_20211213BBB_ae_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNjNkOTgyOC0zMzVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=_rz4CtKhz4qGf82pEG4VoS4NaDHfLHPuQuOfM7sr3y0=)
---
Friend, Last month, with zero support from Republicans like our own Rep. Brian Fitzpatrick, House Democrats passed the **Build Back Better Act** : the largest investment in workers and families in decades. When this bill becomes law, Pennsylvanians in the 1st District will benefit from universal kindergarten and preschool for all 3- and 4-year-olds, lower prescription drug prices, an extension of the Child Tax Credit providing families up to $3,600 a year, and the largest effort to combat climate change in U.S. history. **The problem is, the Senate still hasn’t passed it, and we’re just weeks away from the end of the year and this legislative session.** So, what are they waiting for?! Working families in PA-01 and Americans everywhere need and deserve these benefits ASAP. Patty, Catherine, and I are all so appreciative of everything you are doing in this fight. With your help, we flipped the Senate – making it possible to pass historic investments in our nation's infrastructure, help families and small businesses, and expand access to health care. But if Republicans retake control, they could erase all our progress. There is so much at stake in this election, and if we don't commit early to protecting our Senate majority, we could lose it.

name: American Update
subject: Your thoughts on the Second Amendment
body:
The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8286%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hBJpPo7AmUKCLs8SyMUPxw&sysid=1)
This sponsored message from American Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10510%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Ne6lFzkXeCv0CZx0oJBo5Q&sysid=1) Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation’s history and undermine our Constitution--with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you’re receiving Hillsdale College’s **Second Amendment Survey** because you’re someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our **Second Amendment Survey** using the secure link below? **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vkeir5oApLGlBRkrKV29Kg&sysid=1 "https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/")** Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty--which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left’s most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is **ignorance**. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in _Imprimis_ , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of **first principles**.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here’s an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. **But instead of just TALKING, it’s more important to DO something about it.** That’s why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That’s why I would like your answers to our brief **Second Amendment Survey.** You can complete the survey today at this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vkeir5oApLGlBRkrKV29Kg&sysid=1)** We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we **reach** and **teach** millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It’s also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. **Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty --including the Second Amendment--for future generations.** After completing your **Second Amendment Survey** , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we’ll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry--supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed **Second Amendment Survey.** Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
**P.S.** Our Constitution--including the Second Amendment--is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our **Second Amendment Survey** at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2a-survey/](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c10511%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Vkeir5oApLGlBRkrKV29Kg&sysid=1)**
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[Unsubscribe](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c210334%7c8286%7c8%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c805&wdmdk=hBJpPo7AmUKCLs8SyMUPxw&sysid=1)_

clean_body: The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis o | Sponsored message | ---|---|--- This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College Dear Friend of the Constitution, The far Left in America is attempting to rewrite our nation's history and undermine our Constitution—with a special emphasis on eliminating the Second Amendment. Today, you're receiving Hillsdale College's Second Amendment Survey because you're someone who understands that education is essential to the defense of liberty. We are reaching and teaching millions of Americans about the importance of liberty, and we are doing this without accepting even ONE PENNY of government funding. Could you take a few minutes to complete our Second Amendment Survey using the secure link below? "" Your timely survey answers will help us reach and teach millions of our fellow citizens in the coming year about the importance of liberty—which includes the rights protected by the Second Amendment. There is no question that one of the Left's most powerful tools in its ongoing effort to undermine our liberty is ignorance. Here at Hillsdale, we have been pursuing truth and defending liberty since the College was founded in 1844. Today our educational outreach efforts include programs on a variety of topics essential to liberty, such as the Second Amendment. As constitutional scholar Edward J. Erler observed in Imprimis , our digest of liberty that reaches millions of Americans: “The Second Amendment is an expression of first principles.” This means the Second Amendment is essential for the preservation of freedom. If we are denied the means of defending our freedom, we will eventually lose our freedom. This kind of thinking is foreign to most college and university campuses today, where “safe spaces” are now commonplace, and shooting clubs are nearly extinct. Here's an example... Not long ago, the University of Virginia canceled its traditional 21-gun salute on Veterans Day. Why? The administration was concerned that firing guns in honor of those who served their country and did their part to defend our freedom would cause “panic” among the student body. Unfortunately, there are many more such examples I could cite to illustrate the disastrous effects of the ongoing decline in civics education in America. But instead of just TALKING, it's more important to DO something about it. That's why we have been working to expand our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty. And this work continues today. That's why I would like your answers to our brief Second Amendment Survey. You can complete the survey today at this secure link: We believe that an educated citizenry is essential for the preservation of our liberty. As Ronald Reagan said, “Freedom is never more than one generation away from extinction.” Do you agree? I hope so. This is why we reach and teach millions of Americans about the principles of liberty and the Constitution. It's also why we need your help today. As I mentioned, Hillsdale refuses to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. This frees us from much burdensome and corrupting federal regulation. Our independence from the government means that our work is entirely dependent on the generous support of citizens like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. It also means your gift really matters. Today, you have a great opportunity to help preserve liberty—including the Second Amendment—for future generations. After completing your Second Amendment Survey , please join me in the cause of liberty with your generous tax-deductible gift today. And, when you give a $100 gift or more, we'll send you a special, limited-edition Hillsdale College hat as our thank you. This hat commemorates our partnership with USA Shooting, the organization dedicated to preparing the best American shooters to represent our country in the Olympics and Paralympics. But hurry—supplies are limited! Thank you for your time and attention. I look forward to receiving your completed Second Amendment Survey. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844 P.S. Our Constitution—including the Second Amendment—is under attack today. Do you agree? Then please take our Second Amendment Survey at the secure link below. It will only take a few minutes, and your answers will help to preserve liberty for future generations. Thank you! body:
Election Day is less than a year away, and we still have serious ground to make up URGENT: We're heading into a meeting to tell the Congresswoman that grassroots donations are PLUMMETING and we're NOT on track to meet our $100,000 mid-month fundraising goal. Will you rush a quick donation of $5 or more to help Val Demings win in Florida and defend our Senate majority?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?&refcode=jtk1852-fr-text

This is the worst possible moment to miss fundraising goals, friend – because while we're falling short, national Republicans are ALREADY pouring $10 million into turning out support for Marco Rubio.
Florida's last Senate race was decided by 0.12% – a TINY margin – and with recent polling showing our race in a dead heat, we can't afford this fundraising lull. Every dollar makes a difference when we're just 2 points behind – and our records show you haven't donated to Val Demings' mid-month fundraising goal, friend:

Mid-month donation: PENDING
Deadline: 11:59 P.M.
Contribute

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/vd_senate-fr-email?&refcode=jtk1852-fr-text

Val Demings has what it takes to beat Rubio and protect our Senate majority, and the ONLY obstacle in her way is resources. That's why our whole team is worried that missing our mid-month fundraising goal could put us too far behind to catch up.

Team Demings

name: John Kovacs
subject: This Addiction to Fiscal Insanity MUST BE STOPPED!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOHN KOVACS FOR CONGRESS
body:
PETITION: Do you agree that spending in Washington is out of control?
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/c6e076734311c119/0acf27718b9d738fc3d6b838967d376c/37373)
---
Fellow Conservative, We are a nation in crisis, on many fronts. Like you, I’m FED UP with the insanity. Runaway spending and debt have created significant problems for the American economy – _we now have 40-year high inflation hitting families in the pocketbook_ – and the Democrats’ answer is to DOUBLE DOWN with their socialist “Build Back Broke” bill! We must fix our nation’s spending and debt addiction. If we fail to do so, our children will be saddled with debt, and our nation’s military and other vital services will be at risk in the not-too-distant future. **If you agree that Washington has a spending problem – and not a revenue problem – please sign my petition**. **[TAP OR CLICK TO ADD YOUR NAME. >>>](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/197dcb250501724edc9f99905c540ea9/37373/c6e076734311c119/f2ede8b2bc4380eec3d6b838967d376c/37373)** I’m running to restore fiscal sanity in Washington. I will oppose reckless spending and any tax increases on our workers, job providers, and retirees. _And I need YOU standing with me in this fight!_ Thank you, as always, for being part of our amazing grassroots team. \- John
---

This report allows our opponents to see how well we are doing and what they can do to try and stop us. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = = Between holiday expenses and folks taking well-deserved time away from their inboxes, December is traditionally a slower fundraising month. name: Pro Life Update
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nati
This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsc5t7l55q9qrvcqmvfen7rnpso0entl8jsi95p0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5i66or6clh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zh32c72nk1j1gjkj6vt5g381kade0qtbcued8mn8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5i66or6clh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zvuligealb2qm9rhnopo4pgfb4ieu6oks99bfju8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5i66or6clh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

name: Sarah Godlewski
subject: Join me for a virtual event this week!
body:
Hi there, I hope this email finds you well. I wanted to take a second to reach out about a virtual event I have this week. I would love for you to join.

Let's be crystal clear: Trump is only interfering in this race because he wants another rubber stamp member of Congress to advance his terrible agenda -- an agenda that has damn near destroyed our democracy and has continuously divided our nation.

**We have the chance to put this to a stop. But that means electing a leader who knows we can't play it safe, and that we need to go ALL in.

A leader who believes that housing is a human right.

A leader who knows that we need Medicare For All in order to achieve health equity.**

**[That leader is Michele. Pitch in whatever you can today to solidify this campaign and take a stance against Anna Paulina Luna.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39631807/320712769/-465419534?refcode=em21_211213_mm1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MjI4MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNjI1YzcwYi00MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=EWi8c_84HlAtsc0BYOCDpQdHSbiUZyKnucsix-AGb8M=)**

3hf Friend — If we’re going to protect voter ID, secure our
border, fund our police, and halt inflation, then Republicans must take
back the U.S. Senate.

And if we’re going to take back the Senate, then
we must defeat Raphael Warnock and win Georgia.

Gary Black is the
ONLY Republican who can get it done. He’s won statewide elections in
Georgia three times — and got more votes than the last two GOP
governors.

But here’s the thing: Warnock and the Democrats are going
to do whatever it takes to keep their power. And Warnock has already
stockpiled $17 MILLION to spend on ads misleading voters.

It’s all
hands on deck to keep pace. With 2022 on the horizon, we’re launching a
December Mid-Month fundraising drive — and we need YOU to help Gary win
by donating whatever you can. Please act now:
