name: Kathy Barnette
subject: What I’ve learned from visiting our farmers
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)
---
|
---
| Peter,
---
| I've been busy traveling the state and meeting with an overlooked yet vital class of people - the farmers and agricultural workers that keep our nation fed and our supply chains moving. They were some of the first people to feel the effects of high inflation, and they don't see things getting any better soon.
If the empty shelves at the grocery stores are at the end of the supply chain, then our farmers are at the beginning. [Read my article](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2IK0mYXd9Rz0h6ieAwjO4-fs1f8-hcIyWnoG_esZehYfNZTYhRgVXvNMVOSM42iTY3sNzCBcsl3T8Qr_nxKnOHIRkTkiXB24ztiZnRihyaPv3rsQzdBBYIhiemU3KJaR9h0GZLQpkxCAwTy3XSNeM0xNqx04BFxq0qTwkpe63uLgJhfA497BULVACR3eJRwP0Qr16JTHuDYbJbbTbGnpznyRmE6muxWow35a4GAGkdSDqSR49rPROjos4sF6-EWjuTJCLmJk0DMdO8_HNF8v_jPE=&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==) where I talk about the inflation that is going to hit us all.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)
---
| One of my last stops was walking a farm of over 400 acres with these beautiful American Aberdeens. I got to feed these massive, but gentle bulls and talk to the family about some of the issues facing Northern Pennsylvania.
---
| Lately, I've been visiting Pennsylvania's farmers, walking the fields, and seeing their livestock. What's become clear is that Joe Biden's inflation crisis is taking its toll on our farmers, and it creates a ripple effect down the supply chain.
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)
---
| You see, I want to give a voice to these hardworking Pennsylvanians who are being completely overlooked by the suits in Washington, D.C. I'm running for Senate to be our America First Senator who will look out for our farmers - because I know how important they are to our success as a nation.
I hope you'll join my campaign to give these farmers a voice, along with the rest of the "flyover country" that the elites take for granted. You can forward this on to your friends or family in the agricultural sector or even [support my campaign](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==) to help me get to the U.S. Senate.
---
| | | [SUPPORT MY CAMPAIGN](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)
---
| Sincerely,
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2ILE4IWyvj1k9SqGn-YRqQHGl1tInDJVODwQG_sDC5quUVugHOgnIH0QptCgEq_6KGY1sSnwaOTYds-Ume8_EPR2iIC75v5ey6xUYT0Drv8DqmLO_OK7UL2gFmhdESdwWW6wJnmZU0r1Q_8yrB1oeNNIpwnH6Pi1OUQ==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)
---
| Kathy Barnette Republican for U.S. Senate - Pennsylvania

---
| | |
---
| Kathy Barnette for Senate | [Website](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KITCdhl8-0WBvQRW3wJTNtn__l5f665ctNggh6qCZxEIz2o3p3e2IBYMteg8YZ9d5iwr4XmOJVTk3D-UPDfyKSpjEBIBoeiER30GMKRLLx8BUZFyFzvgXTEa9zF5YV5H6WGcl8P6qu3ANego2dxwDw==&c=AgyccRhkuDVr83SI7ItGJxb6NoOeKqq70KVkFf-0H46Akc4eWtzW_Q==&ch=PXC-PmMHnmS-sKfAoPJdsnHR4Uckzk_Le45kO3jyqhLOfPzrCVhv6g==)

name: Trump News HQ
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us.
_Sponsored message_
This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrftk8ehu8hhhv3pfisesi38st7unu169cbf4a1o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj4cdh2bs) Dear Fellow American, Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course entitled “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson, this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z4gbhpt9t40mahvii6neeq35ng877mnto6euhff8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj4cdh2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of “**The Second World Wars** ” on DVD: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zcdsi5ju9cqq1bvsd7v012tjgls8785fbuq9hcsg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj4cdh2bs)** Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College! Best regards, Kyle Murnen, ’09 Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
---
Trump Train News

625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[Click here to unsubscribe](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2ztihej56grdq37vsglcakv5j1dr1vhco0nm3qe40_)

body:

Today, I’m proud to announce endorsements from local officials and former Congressmen that had an incredibly positive impact on our state and the country.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1213 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1213]I appreciate the vote of confidence from these officials as we continue our fight to keep this Congressional District blue and create a better future for our community. I’m proud that we have widespread support from influential figures at every level of government.
Congressman Wexler had some kind words about our efforts:
“In this critical moment, Eric Lynn will provide steady, experienced leadership that Pinellas County needs. I am confident that Eric Lynn can keep this seat in Democratic hands. We need him to help hold the House in 2022.”
Congressman Deutsch joined in that sentiment:
“ Eric Lynn has the experience on day one to build consensus and get things done. Eric is a leader and I’m proud to support him for Congress.”
If you agree with these former Congressmen, please help make our vision a reality by contributing to this campaign before our mid-month deadline. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/el-endorsements-1213]

name: American Defense News
subject: How should we elect the president?
body:
A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our presi
[View this message in your browser](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3ip17in2barkhp5v16cm6fv8agv7uqnqi2gohm8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj2chh238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kkpq8ddl69qbcd1jm4qj6d9jmpqj7d9neppqcdtlmui34thgmipnadt4sbp65tdmecqr2sj2m5im6cjksaq31odgchi7bd3h68qj2tjheeq72tr5e3j79or26ljrfkjge9i3cc5icpp78cbmc3gb8p9gs2qj2p76cpj30t5l69jr5c366jgb6o77m2qmash5u)
This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z2h1oa8uglv77ittlfmch92hrloe8jgude11mddo_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj2chh2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zoa1grivo6ioltcmq9lqvmnc25s28mjpqiuoou0g_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj2chh2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zvc9j3egpf42g8m65lfg9e69l2cgatlb8lklv2gg_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5h60oj2chh2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for American Defense News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.americandefensenews.com/prefs/9z2z51joh0e9fn45m43bl73lnod7im9ehuiupisn270).
625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314

[](http://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2ztadnf7rj3in8fglnqkmvsebsrsrijugj8f9b6u8_rp2ash2s8j2ccdkmorb4dthe8gq48bi4bh28or6cjgm4o32c9i649fg)

name: Marcus Flowers
subject: A ‘threat’ to Marjorie Taylor Greene
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marcus for Georgia
body:
Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39632558/320716349/-825069922?refcode=20211211_MF_allofus&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE1MmFjNS00NTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqurqomBnLjCLyl_e-lq29j6rrQBtyYsLJ61lb2PUPw=) Hi, it’s Marcus Flowers. Earlier this year, I was kicked out of an “America First” rally in Dalton, Georgia because I was deemed a “threat” to Marjorie Taylor Greene. The truth is, she’s right, but not in the way that she thinks. I’m not a “threat” to cause a disturbance at a political rally. And I’d never dream of harassing her or anyone else for that matter. _**But our movement -- the one we’re building together -- is most definitely a threat to her political career and that of those who practice her kind of politics.**_ **We’re a “threat” because we still believe that leaders from both parties can work together to oppose bigotry, conspiracy theories, and hatred. ** **We’re a “threat” because we are focused on delivering roads, bridges, health care, and competence for the American people. ** **And we’re a “threat” because we are ready to turn the page on the corrupt leadership styles of Donald Trump, Matt Gaetz, Paul Gosar, Lauren Boebert, and more. ** **[But I need your help to deliver on this “threat.” So today, I’m asking you to donate $20.22 or more to help me defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39632559/320716350/-1217423743?refcode=20211213_MF_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE1MmFjNS00NTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqurqomBnLjCLyl_e-lq29j6rrQBtyYsLJ61lb2PUPw=) ** | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39632560/320716351/-825069922?refcode=20211213_MF_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE1MmFjNS00NTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqurqomBnLjCLyl_e-lq29j6rrQBtyYsLJ61lb2PUPw=)**
---
At 18 years old, I swore an oath to defend the Constitution - and I traveled across the globe defending our democracy.
I’m ready to bring that same passion for public service to the halls of Congress. But I need your help to make it happen.
Thanks for your support,
Marcus Flowers

Marcus Flowers is a Democrat running to defeat Marjorie Taylor Greene. As an Army Veteran, Marcus understands the true meaning of service and patriotism and will work tirelessly to defeat the hatred of the alt-right. **This election is going to be tough, but with the help of grassroots donors like you -- anything is possible.** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39632561/320716352/-825069922?refcode=20211213_MF_threat&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODkwNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjNTE1MmFjNS00NTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=CqurqomBnLjCLyl_e-lq29j6rrQBtyYsLJ61lb2PUPw=)

body:
Or is it stuck at sea? |

Friend,

Have you seen these headlines?

"Order your Christmas presents now," UPS chief says amid supply chain drag"
By Rachel Layne | CBS News

"Christmas trees, sweaters, gifts in shipping mess: How supply chain issues will affect holiday shopping"
By Susan Tompor | USA TODAY

'Make sure to get those gifts early' | Major shipping delays expected
Brittany Begley | ABC 10 News

"Order your Christmas presents now — supply delays are here to stay"
By Jeffret Kucik | The Hill
This is terrible! Thanks to Joe Biden and the Democrats, it is not a Christmas Vacation, but a Christmas Inflation!

The gifts you paid record-high prices for will be delayed due to the Democrats and Joe Biden's inflation and supply chain issues. How will you explain to your children, friends, and family that Santa Claus was unable to deliver gifts?

Just like the color of Santa’s outfit, we need a RED-WAVE to take back the House!

name: Peter Franchot
subject: “Not for oneself”
body:
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/FAWlogo_Blue%404x.png]Dear Peter,
As I think fondly about my youth, I frequently arrive at one of the core values that was instilled in me during my formative years -- the motto “not for oneself.”
In the late 1960s, I dropped out of college to join Eugene McCarthy’s Presidential campaign. Sitting on the sidelines at school wasn’t for me; I thought getting involved with a political campaign would be an excellent way to truly make a difference in the lives of my fellow citizens during an era of great activism and change. While McCarthy’s campaign didn’t go far, it did lead to the next chapter of my life.
By leaving college, I gave up my student draft deferment, and got drafted into the US Army during the Vietnam War. The military would serve as one of the most formative experiences of my young adult life. My drill sergeant gave us an education in the school of hard knocks, teaching us that everyone is equal to each other, and that nobody is special. The army gave me a seriousness of purpose -- it was there that I came to truly understand and live by the code “not for oneself.”
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=20.22]From a young age, I’ve been guided by that core desire to put others before myself. Whether it be campaigning for change or serving my country, public service has been a defining value through which I’ve lived by. Not for oneself: It’s what motivated me to serve our citizens as one of the General Assembly’s most progressive legislators. It’s what motivated me to advance the interests of our working families and small businesses as your Comptroller. And now, it’s what’s motivating me to transform Maryland into the leading state in the nation as your next Governor.
If I’m blessed to lead, I’ll continue to embody the core value of public service that has guided me all my life. As Governor, I’ll deliver on the concrete points of progress to lift our communities into the high quality of life that they deserve. From creating 100,000 new jobs in industries of the future, to building a statewide transit system, to making Maryland the first net zero state in the nation, and more, we have an opportunity to bring transformative change to our state in the coming years.
But we can only get there with your support. While I’ve been leading the rest of the Democratic field in this race, my campaign can only sustain its momentum through supporters like you powering our movement at the grassroots. Will you join me in the fight to secure a brighter and stronger future for Maryland’s communities?
CHIP IN $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=10] CHIP IN $20.22 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=20.22] CHIP IN $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=50] CHIP IN $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=100] CHIP IN ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself]Any amount you can contribute is greatly appreciated. The people-powered movement I’m building relies on grassroots supporters like you to help us meet our fundraising goals, so that we can bring about the change that our communities need and deserve.
I’ll leave you with this final thought: after a divisive and tumultuous four years under the former President, I think I speak for all of us in saying that our country needs more leaders who seek to lead not for themselves, but for others. Speaking as your Comptroller, your legislator, and your serviceman, I’ll be your champion , guided by that very same motto instilled in me so many years ago.
Thank you,
[https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/81826/images/Franchot%20Signature.png]
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/notforoneself?amount=20.22]By Authority: Friends of Peter Franchot; Tom Gentile, Treasurer
Friends of Peter Franchot
P.O. Box 6648
Annapolis, MD 21401
United States
If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/dea5066c-5551-ec11-9820-a085fc31ac93/1780b1e5-465c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTgyNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzgwYjFlNS00NjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-6AqMiixJWh_8jzx8MM-MIquB5DHCxZwNWsLJyIQH8k=&id=136194660 .

Liberal foreign policy is making America vulnerable [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrzZvsvPUySETvLQJBOq6VJ7b0stfCLHbQj6pRM3H86pEVsbJHEdMQn9rQlJxtwyQRvDHU6Z25lHaJw22f3NCENx4fxrRQTehCzP4KL7LJ4Fp2JGQxKFBX-ngHEAW2cuv9Gx7pfhp32lEqDx7kXHwGwK9j-jz5P7Lr-HLmZ1WYWuOUlYnuxzo8BuZSLJi4hrN58s6pAGD4RK-ByjJId0n-frJafnYEcpYhsrh_dKaTrgNztYgv2kLUud8LaJaiBd_C7) Hi Friend, **Vladimir Putin could hardly ask for a better friend than Joe Biden.**[__](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrz2G6K_cCBQFXSoW4vr8QGUjmIJZgTAh081w481zuwDhQxWh0rmO_HRgv-icgdp6uJLUN3gUuWRA70y-7klSHXwoOQe92WAdmo6n3xBS-G0EXLlo_tMbESYfuyQDGwVwLtIlm5SDtx0KQ9MsRoKWHiKvYmEKroMyAX1QyGTqwdttVaZgHoBYeJbKhLxGJT9VN-HM7SQclVSkVQu3cZk2jEUMf6hmEBV-gCBWIhpLkznHDAaaWSr9MK090TIPR3Vcp6) Why? Because Biden's weak, feckless foreign policy has left America vulnerable. And bullies like Putin love taking advantage of the incompetent. [**We cannot allow Biden to sell out our allies and embolden our enemies, unchecked!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrzZvsvPUySETvLQJBOq6VJ7b0stfCLHbQj6pRM3H86pEWwUU3GfPgWRl5GzdjTsDM81SV4GmaqaqJDj2LJmXTeNxG8Cb84bawHVgvMfTS72CwTTEzMqYMZn_nckDOSxCDbPKKmJV_guskj5B-gDm4KeH36v7PuDJYwvLcrPQDixhe41Ds1Qhr6c_jUF8bsmDTT2Cjf7tKCZwIb1vuiYRFGFxUXCU0rMa4ETvsIPUMVqRinsMUIsK-ukhGTe97eIs6G) [__](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrzo5iwQJyQBgWXB9UkMqBCXXWoA-GpixTtEky15xrqydvNG6FWxgIlISt99omtKLMCZsV3G_YhmXRFRHdzXW7gdoUlkcTsz-JjI3uU1HNmbgm8uHJZ0rf0envwBTyO9gZUmEAgNBNswaZqzTftLVnC3F-lnlriU-sg9SpPNOJfn_qzeyeOZPAbLYcaW4XfabXcCiL8yu_c0jbbj7cbpjEGeS6mzNhSs5mZMXAC5u6nhZx76iVslNW160UqfhE7Oxdf) [](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrzZvsvPUySETvLQJBOq6VJ7b0stfCLHbQj6pRM3H86pEU0HsT75sVftsWItIjEcqgi98KXUBuek01lFwWm-dzxHEtp-Yo7VUW-HUVbVopgm5do0Cue75TkQRkUV-r9sxmDjwhyFHcfiFjbkLOQtyfBeHB4VbS4rA5nObUy4cWbGep_EDRa3V4Nio5bR6J0Wd2ePbpRYqSpXn4pCYTLaXOqdV-D1nKWrmbQjUHEKJNKdsLgU2Z8AxaRSH07xN78e6La) [**Send a Message to Putin! >> ****CHIP IN!**](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=173be99f161745d58770eac36407ef89&_m=acd566088a444ab381f5f698645ef977&_e=dOP65WhgKH8Vh8wWfFxjnDh7RcMd9e9Mcj2Bt9tL2Qsiqa4mO6rfhKJeizLNYrrzZvsvPUySETvLQJBOq6VJ7b0stfCLHbQj6pRM3H86pEXUjC75DOegDY1aZeIYL4v2a3ApRRIg3T43cU1oCokxQHCJA8VoSEsejrWv1P_ffWzKNuQ-lr1SPBejJUsA167I9OApFZbkI7ZXCiN9JHONyHiHcGVXbdsBuHlw9qLGwDaFtktCjOGlWqTU4U2KjWZHspC_bNX6yOtdlrsZvF2HdI2vhEcR5ZBfXYbEMPNvplphrrfSD3Ug6wkOLCtqm2_5) The news is now reporting that Biden is using back channels to beg the Ukrainians to _**ACCEPT**_ Russia's aggression and **_GIVE UP_** territory to their aggressors. When I become your congresswoman, I will stand up to Biden and demand American leadership that we can count on! Will you help me get there? name: Chief James Craig
subject: Leading from the front is paying off.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chief James Craig for Governor • PO Box 15066 • Lansing, MI 48901 |
body:
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) Peter- Michigan used to be the beacon of hope for the rest of the nation. We had good-paying jobs and a strong economy, thanks in large part to the auto industry. [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) As more and more manufacturing jobs left Michigan for other parts of the country, so did that glimmer of hope. We were well on our way to recovering, to finding a new path forward... and then our current governor took office. [**MICHIGAN NEEDS NEW LEADERSHIP **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) **Over the last two-and-a-half years, Gretchen Whitmer has**** _repeatedly_****failed our great state. ** She failed to address the Benton Harbor water crisis. She ignored the issue throughout her _entire_ administration and only recently decided the problem was worth digging into. When COVID struck, Whitmer's idea of "leadership" was instituting travel restrictions and mask mandates - something she failed to follow herself. And now she's working to shut down Enbridge Line 5. This pipeline supplies the majority of our region with natural energy, provides billions to our local economy, and is responsible for thousands of good-paying jobs. [**STOP GRETCHEN WHITMER **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) **Instead of alleviating struggles for families across the Great Lakes, the governor is actively working against them.** That's why I'm reaching out to you, Peter. My name is Chief James Craig. **_I 've spent most of my life serving others and leading from the front._** [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) Like so many other Michiganders, I worked on the assembly line at Chrysler. Eventually, I decided to pursue a career in law enforcement and joined the Detroit Police Department in 1977. In 1981, I moved to Los Angeles and joined the LAPD, where I spent the next 27 years. I then spent two years as Chief of Police in Portland, ME, and another two years as Chief of Police in Cincinnati, OH. **I was given the opportunity to return home to Detroit in 2013, where I spent the final eight years of my law enforcement career as Chief of Police.** Throughout my career, I've seen first-hand the effect _real_ leadership has on a community. When I returned to Detroit, our police department was in shambles. Morale was low. Equipment was broken. **_And our community deserved better._** [**SUPPORT CHIEF CRAIG **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) One of the first things I did was tackle Colony Arms, an apartment complex that was the epicenter of crime in our city.
I led my team in and we mounted an assault. We arrested 20-30 people and cleaned the area up.
The word got around: the police force was back in Detroit - and we would _never_ allow criminals to rule our city again.
**This is the kind of leadership Michiganders**** _deserve - and that's why I'm running for Governor._** [**BACK THE CHIEF **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) _I 've led from the front my entire career - and I want to do it again as Michigan's next governor._ **_With your help, that vision can become a reality._** I know our campaign has the momentum to win, Peter. In fact, Cook Political Report just changed our race from favoring Whitmer to a "toss-up." [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) Michigan's best days are ahead of us as long as we have a governor that will lead from the front. **[Will you support my campaign so I can bring leadership back to the governor 's mansion?](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r)** _**By donating below, you are making an immediate contribution:**_ [**DONATE $100 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002317:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) [**DONATE $75 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002318:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) [**DONATE $50 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002319:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) [**DONATE $25 **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002320:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) [**DONATE ANY AMOUNT **](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) _**If you've saved payment information with WinRed, your donation will go through automatically.**_ Thank you, [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59002316:6lKZp6EmN:m:1:3253819041:59D290524F559E565F640132E7D51C55:r) Chief James Craig |
---

|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39633295/320720160/721416609?refcode=header&amount=25&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNkYjc4Ny00NzVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgQRnAgpbJNJXxyWgkSQH3M_AduuWC7rmgHJE0_P7g=)
Hi folks, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. Here’s an update on our path to victory: Grassroots supporters like you are a major part of this team so I hope you’ll read through, [_**then pitch in $10 before Thursday’s mid-month deadline to re-elect Michael to the Senate and keep Colorado blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39633296/320720167/-625499226?refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211213_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNkYjc4Ny00NzVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgQRnAgpbJNJXxyWgkSQH3M_AduuWC7rmgHJE0_P7g=) **WHAT MICHAEL HAS ACHIEVED FOR COLORADO** Despite our slim 50-50 Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael has secured big wins for Colorado. He led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit that has not only **kept millions of children out of poverty** nationwide, but also cut taxes for hundreds of thousands of Colorado families. Now, Michael is fighting to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit for another year in the _Build Back Better Act._ Michael also clinched a historic investment in high-speed internet — the single largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the _Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act_ signed into law just last month. This investment will help bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. While Michael is fighting to create good-paying jobs, combat climate change, and more, GOP opponents are distorting his record. **THE STATE OF THIS RACE** Michael delivers for working people and he’s running on his record, but he is facing attacks from all sides. Mitch McConnell and his committee tasked with flipping the Senate have almost double the cash on hand of the Democratic committee that’s defending seats like Michael’s. The National GOP has their pick of his opponents that overwhelmingly opposed the bipartisan infrastructure bill and include:
* An insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, has joked about lynching, wants to get rid of vote-by-mail in Colorado, and just this month spoke at a rally rooted in Trump’s Big Lie.
* A wealthy Trump appointee who came out against the expanded Child Tax Credit that has helped millions of children and the infrastructure bill which will repair Colorado’s roads and bridges, while creating scores of jobs.
* A third who is so wealthy that he already gave his campaign about a quarter million dollars of his own fortune and hired a top Trump consultant to advise his campaign.

The GOP primary field is stacked with eight candidates attacking Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off continued attacks. **WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN** Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he believes fighting money in politics means leading by example. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and a wealthy, self-funded opponent flooding Colorado's airwaves with ads attacking Michael, we can’t rest for a moment. **Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — before Thursday’s fundraising deadline.** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **** | | | ****[Donate $10 now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39633298/320720169/-625499226?express_lane=true&amount=10&&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&refcode=AU_MFB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211213_PM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNGNkYjc4Ny00NzVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QVgQRnAgpbJNJXxyWgkSQH3M_AduuWC7rmgHJE0_P7g=)****

clean_body: | = Hi folks, I’m Justin, Michael’s campaign manager. Here’s an update on our path to victory: Grassroots supporters like you are a major part of this team so I hope you’ll read through, = WHAT MICHAEL HAS ACHIEVED FOR COLORADO Despite our slim 50-50 Democratic majority and Mitch McConnell’s obstruction, Michael has secured big wins for Colorado. He led the charge to expand the Child Tax Credit that has not only kept millions of children out of poverty nationwide, but also cut taxes for hundreds of thousands of Colorado families. Now, Michael is fighting to extend the expanded Child Tax Credit for another year in the Build Back Better Act. Michael also clinched a historic investment in high-speed internet — the single largest federal broadband investment in our nation’s history — in the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act signed into law just last month. This investment will help bridge the digital divide in Colorado’s rural and Tribal communities. While Michael is fighting to create good-paying jobs, combat climate change, and more, GOP opponents are distorting his record. THE STATE OF THIS RACE Michael delivers for working people and he’s running on his record, but he is facing attacks from all sides. Mitch McConnell and his committee tasked with flipping the Senate have almost double the cash on hand of the Democratic committee that’s defending seats like Michael’s. The National GOP has their pick of his opponents that overwhelmingly opposed the bipartisan infrastructure bill and include: An insurrectionist who admitted to crossing the police line on January 6th, has joked about lynching, wants to get rid of vote-by-mail in Colorado, and just this month spoke at a rally rooted in Trump’s Big Lie. A wealthy Trump appointee who came out against the expanded Child Tax Credit that has helped millions of children and the infrastructure bill which will repair Colorado’s roads and bridges, while creating scores of jobs. A third who is so wealthy that he already gave his campaign about a quarter million dollars of his own fortune and hired a top Trump consultant to advise his campaign. The GOP primary field is stacked with eight candidates attacking Michael to gain an edge in their race. Your support will help him fend off continued attacks. WHAT IT TAKES TO WIN Michael is running a grassroots-driven campaign. He doesn’t take donations from corporate PACs and federal lobbyists because he believes fighting money in politics means leading by example. To win this race and keep Colorado blue, Michael’s campaign has to reach and mobilize voters across the state while battling attacks from Michael’s opponents, Mitch McConnell, and dark money groups. It’s expensive work and with the National GOP raking in millions and a wealthy, self-funded opponent flooding Colorado's airwaves with ads attacking Michael, we can’t rest for a moment. Michael is counting on your support so he can continue fighting for Coloradans in the Senate. Please pitch in $10 — or whatever works for your budget — before Thursday’s fundraising deadline. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= | | = ** | **= We’re in this together, Justin Justin Lamorte Campaign Manager Bennet for Colorado Bennet for Colorado PO Box 3078 Denver, CO 80201 United States | mailto:info@michaelbennet.com | Paid for by Bennet for Colorado ** By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

name: Jenny Beth Martin, Tea Party Patriots Action
subject: Support the Cajun Navy in Kentucky
body:
| |
---
As you’ve likely seen, many of our fellow Americans are suffering greatly after terrible tornadoes hit western Kentucky. The damage done was truly devastating, with many lives lost.

First and foremost, our prayers go out to all who have been affected by this disaster.

Second, our friends with the Cajun Navy are again on their way to help, and we would like to give you the opportunity to [**support their efforts.**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.-3fxG3maeiN5xeMiA)

There are six Cajun Navy teams going to Mansfield, KY today to help. You can [follow their Facebook](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.) page to see what they’re doing, and you can donate to them as they do this important work at [**cajunrelief.org/donate**](http://lnk.teapartypatriots._e7j6y0g)**.**

Tea Party Patriots Action is not affiliated with the Cajun Navy, but we are so thankful they do what they do. There have been many occasions where government entities have not been able to get enough help to an area, fast enough, after a disaster. However, the Cajun Navy was there, helping people, saving lives, and more. We just appreciate what they do, and want to give you the opportunity to help them help Kentuckians.

In liberty,

Jenny Beth Martin

_PS - Keep an eye out on tomorrow (Tuesday) for our regular weekly call-to-action email._
[CONTRIBUTE](http://lnk.teapartypatriots.)
|
---

name: Derek Kilmer
subject: Everything we've worked for and everything we're working toward could be on the line…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
Peter,

I'm sure I don't need to remind you we're only FIVE seats away from losing the House majority next year. Everything we've worked for and everything we're working toward could be on the line.

That's why I'm reaching out about my friend, Democratic Congresswoman Kim Schrier. Kim and I both proudly serve Washington State in Congress, and we've accomplished a lot together for the people of our state. **But National Republicans have already made flipping Kim 's seat a top priority, and she needs our help to fight back.**

Here are three things you need to know about Kim's race:
1. In 2018, Kim was the first Democrat _ever_ elected to her district;
2. Kim held onto her seat by just four points in 2020;
3. Next year Kim is facing her toughest race yet.

**[It's simple, Peter -- If we lose Kim's seat in Congress, we could lose our Democratic House majority. Will you help us make sure that doesn't happen? Split a donation between Kim's campaign and ours to help defend the House majority.](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oe-JVVadoHn2cLuC410M-c_SzUXShRaJTLR5iY-48x8=/EEoQrsOxJiSxwSBL_8U9pLUMExdI2kYLMi1LbTTsM4s=?refcode=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

Earlier this month, a new Republican opponent threw his hat into the ring against Congresswoman Kim Schrier. **In just six days, he raised over a quarter of a million dollars.** Kim's campaign needs an influx of grassroots donations to fight back against that kind of money.

**I 've seen the strength of this grassroots team firsthand, and I know we have what it takes to show up for Kim in a big way.**

**[Will you rush a donation to be split between Kim's campaign and ours? Let's show Kim this grassroots team has her back and deliver the resources she needs to defend her seat -- and the House majority. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oe-JVVadoHn2cLuC410M-c_SzUXShRaJTLR5iY-48x8=/EEoQrsOxJiSxwSBL_8U9pLUMExdI2kYLMi1LbTTsM4s=?refcode=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)**

It's an honor to represent you,

Derek

**Derek Kilmer and Kim Schrier are leading efforts to reform our democracy and break through the partisan gridlock so that Congress works for the people. Chip in today to support their grassroots campaigns.**

[DONATE](https://act.myngp.com/el/Oe-JVVadoHn2cLuC410M-c_SzUXShRaJTLR5iY-48x8=/EEoQrsOxJiSxwSBL_8U9pLUMExdI2kYLMi1LbTTsM4s=?refcode=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211213_Schrie_fndd_gq_act___DK_ettx&utm_medium=email)

name: Kat Cammack
subject: Biden is “Building Back Broke”
body:
The Biden/Pelosi Build Back Broke agenda is a terrifying game of Jenga.
---
| | | | | | [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIOT8iBReG3sE9WwPz3Yz1yondJ0hnJLo1QsyPCdDtnqgX8SB7cWGtkvrX_q3H_JX7wTPUrIAF23Dr_dml43dR9iuwVAzcIHfoy-bI-OJiUiciW935_LRQtoLBnpXDRF15jdk5fL43Q06XhyU_Vy84xWanYaLHX8IBJde_S7KyQuDHgCE-HAfYb09FErsKqh&c=6mhCxZ6qWwrnuSNI5t8BooYFO4crSNF-c-A2bMS4luGo2M1CqXg87g==&ch=RhxXrZ2ilv2BvhO1kxwjVnYRJn7fCkCJusVJV3cl9mlBDIrqfgbzyA==)
---
| Friend,
The Biden/Pelosi Build Back Broke agenda is a terrifying game of Jenga. They are putting our economy on a crash course with their reckless spending.
Biden and Pelosi think they can spend as they please and face zero repercussions. Their massive spending sprees offer nothing to working Americans because they were never designed that way.
The far-left agenda exists only to support and expand the role of the federal government in your daily life.
Build Back Broke is failing Americans at every angle. Our economy is flatlining, American businesses are struggling, and working Americans are being left on the burner.
---
| | | [END THE BUILD BACK BROKE AGENDA](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIOT8iBReG3sE9WwPz3Yz1yondJ0hnJLo1QsyPCdDtnqgX8SB7cWGtkvrX_q3H_JX7wTPUrIAF23Dr_dml43dR9iuwVAzcIHfoy-bI-OJiUiciW935_LRQtoLBnpXDRF15jdk5fL43Q06XhyU_Vy84xWanYaLHX8IBJde_S7KyQuDHgCE-HAfYb09FErsKqh&c=6mhCxZ6qWwrnuSNI5t8BooYFO4crSNF-c-A2bMS4luGo2M1CqXg87g==&ch=RhxXrZ2ilv2BvhO1kxwjVnYRJn7fCkCJusVJV3cl9mlBDIrqfgbzyA==)

---
| Conservatives across the nation need to come together in defense of the values that made America great. America was built upon the ingenuity, strength, and wit of the American people.
Unfortunately, all of those qualities are totally absent in the Biden administration. They plan to kick their massive can of debt down the road, expecting American taxpayers to carry the burden.
The American people are not personal ATMs for the liberal elite. I refuse to stand by and let big government sift their hands through your pocket. You work tirelessly for your pay, not Joe Biden's socialist policies.
I proudly voted against Biden's "BBB" plan, but with the Left still holding a slim majority, only so much can be done. I need your support in my fight against the big government socialism that's threatening to bankrupt America.
[Can I count on your support in my continued fight against Biden's Build Back Broke agenda?](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001CIOT8iBReG3sE9WwPz3Yz1yondJ0hnJLo1QsyPCdDtnqgX8SB7cWGtkvrX_q3H_JX7wTPUrIAF23Dr_dml43dR9iuwVAzcIHfoy-bI-OJiUiciW935_LRQtoLBnpXDRF15jdk5fL43Q06XhyU_Vy84xWanYaLHX8IBJde_S7KyQuDHgCE-HAfYb09FErsKqh&c=6mhCxZ6qWwrnuSNI5t8BooYFO4crSNF-c-A2bMS4luGo2M1CqXg87g==&ch=RhxXrZ2ilv2BvhO1kxwjVnYRJn7fCkCJusVJV3cl9mlBDIrqfgbzyA==)

clean_body: The Biden/Pelosi Build Back Broke agenda is a terrifying game of Jenga. | | | | | | == | Friend, The Biden/Pelosi Build Back Broke agenda is a terrifying game of Jenga. They are putting our economy on a crash course with their reckless spending. Biden and Pelosi think they can spend as they please and face zero repercussions. Their massive spending sprees offer nothing to working Americans because they were never designed that way. The far-left agenda exists only to support and expand the role of the federal government in your daily life. Build Back Broke is failing Americans at every angle. Our economy is flatlining, American businesses are struggling, and working Americans are being left on the burner. | | | == | == | Conservatives across the nation need to come together in defense of the values that made America great. America was built upon the ingenuity, strength, and wit of the American people. Unfortunately, all of those qualities are totally absent in the Biden administration. They plan to kick their massive can of debt down the road, expecting American taxpayers to carry the burden. The American people are not personal ATMs for the liberal elite. I refuse to stand by and let big government sift their hands through your pocket. You work tirelessly for your pay, not Joe Biden's socialist policies. I proudly voted against Biden's "BBB" plan, but with the Left still holding a slim majority, only so much can be done. I need your support in my fight against the big government socialism that's threatening to bankrupt America. == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | | | == | Thanks for joining the fight, | == | Kat Cammack | | == | == == == | | Kat for Congress | 5200 NW 43rd Street, Suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 | | Sent by mailto:info@katforcongress.com

I’m a pretty big numbers and data person. After watching these trends over the past few hours with bated breath in hopes that this dip would be temporary... _I was wrong._

name: John King
subject: A future where everyone has a chance to thrive
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John King for Governor, Eliza Leighton, Treasurer
body:
I want to ensure that our state government is a transformative force for good in the lives of all Marylanders.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634149/320724247/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211213-1-EM&&&&amount=25&refcode2=3572282f-4d5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTcyMjgyZi00ZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlxGs9kwRuwOQvh3BCNVyS4fispRBz6RgcRQfOp-0C4=)
---
| Peter,

One of the strongest driving forces in my campaign to become Maryland’s next governor is my dedication to making life in our state more equitable.

Growing up in an unstable household, I know how challenging life can be when families don’t have the basic resources to thrive. I lost my mother when I was 8 and lived with my father, who had undiagnosed Alzheimer’s, and it was public education and great public school teachers that saved me and made sure I didn’t slip through the cracks.

Marylanders deserve the same, and **they deserve a governor who will establish universal, affordable childcare in our state** — it’s one of the many ways our government can and should make people’s lives better.

Things like quality public transportation, stronger public schools, paid family leave, ensuring a living wage, and better support for small businesses would all make such a meaningful impact in lifting up those of us across the state who need a boost and would benefit everyone in the process.

As a lifelong educator, I know the impact that our different social systems can have on the lives of students and families. As governor, I want to ensure that our state government is a transformative force for good in the lives of all Marylanders.

I’m proud to advocate for progressive policies, and I hope you’ll join me as we work towards a brighter future for Maryland. [_**Will you pitch in to get us there by investing $20 or whatever you can to support our campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634150/320724248/1830086357?refcode=BLU-KING-20211213-1-EM&refcode2=3572282f-4d5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNTcyMjgyZi00ZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VlxGs9kwRuwOQvh3BCNVyS4fispRBz6RgcRQfOp-0C4=)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634198/320724517/1820125544?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYwNjBkNy00ZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S3o4Uq4hLVmc852N9AJZzy2-c1Qxe5GgeX_YpyJVNI=) Friend,

In this email, I’m going to ask you to make a **[$3 donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634199/320724518/102973118?refcode=em-12.13.21-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83ODQ0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZDYwNjBkNy00ZDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3S3o4Uq4hLVmc852N9AJZzy2-c1Qxe5GgeX_YpyJVNI=)** to my campaign. Things are heating up in my race, so I hope you’ll let me explain why your support is so important.

The end of this month marks our final FEC fundraising deadline of 2021.

**After the deadline hits, we’re legally required to report how much we’ve raised and how many donors have given. Ryan Zinke will have to report his numbers too, which means our fundraising reports will be compared side-by-side for all to see.**

clean_body: Where do you stand, Peter? | | | Trump Social Media Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Raphael Warnock
subject: I'll keep this quick
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634379/320726417/683353327?refcode=20211213_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJlMDBkNy00ZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwVmvbeJ2COq0ssQCVUmL9sq1esQadOV2jXeGy3fBXo=) Friend, this will be quick – and I really need your help: 1\. We knew Georgia was going to be a critical battleground – _again_ – but now, POLITICO reports that our race will decide which party controls the Senate. 2\. Republicans have made me their top target for next year's critical elections, and they're already outspending us on misleading attack ads in order to smear my record and turn Georgia red. 3\. Our grassroots campaign is **falling****$17,871****short** of what we need to fight back, hit our midnight fundraising goal and win this race. **Unless we close this budget gap by midnight, the GOP's attacks could leave a major mark.** **We cannot hand Georgia – and our critical Senate majority – back to Mitch McConnell and the GOP when everything from our voting rights to health care is under attack.** But according to analysts at _The Washington Post_ , that's exactly what could happen if we lose this battleground race. **Please, friend, I'm counting on you. With time running out before our critical midnight deadline, I'm asking you to give every dollar you can spare right now: ** [**Will you split a donation between me and Seth Moulton before 11:59 p.m. tonight to hit our goal, win in Georgia and take back the Senate for Democrats?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39634380/320726418/683353327?refcode=20211213_TM_FR&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlOTJlMDBkNy00ZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=cwVmvbeJ2COq0ssQCVUmL9sq1esQadOV2jXeGy3fBXo=) We're so close, friend – thank you. — Raphael Warnock

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39634660/320728503/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0YTFkMzQ2LTRmNWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lbIPQiZR1WAAKVsyIGT6GLTUqylmT-nXpuHW_sKkdrs=&emci=73f403aa-425c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=c4a1d346-4f5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=16335001) Team,

Last week, President Biden hosted a Summit for Democracy which brought together world leaders from over 100 countries to set an agenda for democratic renewal and tackle the greatest threats to democracy.

This summit comes as the Freedom House's latest assessment of democracy reported 15 years of decline worldwide. Since 2015, the number of democracies across the globe has shrunk from 104 to 98. And it's not just a problem abroad -- the United States has been labeled a "backsliding democracy."

Unfortunately, this downgrade doesn't come as a surprise. Donald Trump and his allies spent months attacking our democracy and spreading lies about the 2020 election results. And we're approaching the one year anniversary of the violent insurrection at our Capitol followed by 147 Republicans voting against the results of a free and fair election.

As President Biden said after the January 6 insurrection, **"Democracy doesn't happen by accident. We have to defend it, fight for it, strengthen it, renew it."** That's what we're doing here at Never Again PAC by working to defeat the Republicans in Congress who are a danger to our democracy, but we need your help.

**[Will you recommit to the fight to defend our democracy? Chip in $5 or more right away to help us defeat the most dangerous and radical Republicans in Congress.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39634662/320728513/3877195?refcode=em21_211213_summit_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_211213_summit_fnd_gq_act___nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImM0YTFkMzQ2LTRmNWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=lbIPQiZR1WAAKVsyIGT6GLTUqylmT-nXpuHW_sKkdrs=)**

Thanks,

Never Again PAC
Never Again PAC is working to defend our democracy from the 147 Republican members of Congress who sought to overturn the results of a free and fair election. name: Diehl for Massachusetts
subject: Diehl Supports Republican Convention
body:
Encourages Republicans to Join and Unite in 2022
| | | |
---
---
---
|
---
December 13, 2021
The Diehl for Governor campaign announced today that it is the first statewide campaign to make a significant donation to help support the 2022 Massachusetts Republican State Convention. Diehl presented a $25,000 check to Massachusetts Republican Party Chairman Jim Lyons. "I'm excited to participate in the state convention next May as I campaign for the Republican party's nomination for Governor," Diehl said. "I am also honored to be the first statewide candidate to make a contribution. Our campaign is building strong support and we are gaining momentum every day. I look forward to a great gathering of fellow Republicans in Springfield next year." Diehl also issued a call to Republicans across Massachusetts to unite and get involved in the convention process. "We have a tremendous opportunity in 2022, but in order to take advantage of it, it is essential that members of our party be united and fully engaged," Diehl said. "I encourage Republicans across the state to sign up to become a delegate and to take part in the convention process. Full participation makes our party stronger and enhances our chances of winning." Lyons expressed his appreciation to Diehl for the generous contribution. "I applaud Geoff Diehl for his support of our party and his solid commitment to conservative principles," said Lyons. "In particular, I appreciate Geoff Diehl's early and emphatic expression of support for our 2022 state convention. "It's an exciting time to be a Republican in Massachusetts, and we look forward to not only a great convention but also a very successful election." Republican delegates from across Massachusetts gather once every four years for a convention. The purpose of the convention is for the party to endorse candidates for certain Constitutional offices in advance of the state primary. Next year's convention will be held in Springfield on May 21, 2022. According to longstanding party policy, candidates for Governor are levied a $25,000 convention fee. In order to qualify for the primary ballot, candidates must receive support from at least 15 percent of convention delegates. Geoff Diehl, a Republican and former State Representative from Whitman, announced his candidacy for Governor of Massachusetts on July 4. His campaign has been steadily building support, focused on a message of making Massachusetts a better place to live, work, and raise a family. Diehl is also well-known for being a fiscal conservative and for successfully leading a campaign against state gas tax increases several years ago. For more information about Geoff Diehl and his campaign for Governor, please visit[ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGfwg3ltYBKN8-NIzZ9U_ovDHIWf7WUwiNVj4E8RSV8Us9812Dpzu9DZ0M76x_Nrzg_Q6oyWxEyTbjIZ6b2TW0Whug37KhQxj8YdwmFTk3rHhayid9dWyL1qyjjGpi38nDhVuwibDPmSnEcaKijmxg==&c=nqTvbT8kjJU3dKTvjjOUXckLEdL4OEpRa2oW60JtZRg3f64iO5pFsA==&ch=PY8aYF1oVxu5RJsfcCMmTYKQa_wT5x34z3zQPJsdw9dl3o5eqigCPg==)[www.geoffdiehl.com](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001KGfwg3ltYBKN8-NIzZ9U_ovDHIWf7WUwiNVj4E8RSV8Us9812Dpzu0A94f17SbUwpwdZGsMTQ8om0QekpH5xXSzl7i3ssd-s6ZFGGiGxUo8Uctv1db2bYFQ8DNwihvjotUos7eWUxz15_zGRduNb0A==&c=nqTvbT8kjJU3dKTvjjOUXckLEdL4OEpRa2oW60JtZRg3f64iO5pFsA==&ch=PY8aYF1oVxu5RJsfcCMmTYKQa_wT5x34z3zQPJsdw9dl3o5eqigCPg==)

Folks, We don’t like to beg for donations or use scare tactics like “the sky is falling” when we ask for your support. You’re as much a part of this team as the staff here at headquarters, and the work it takes to keep Colorado blue and defend Michael’s seat is deeply personal. This grassroots team is made up of staff members, generous grassroots donors, and loyal supporters and we’re all here for the same reasons:
* We believe that every child should have a fighting chance, no matter where they grow up.
* We know that climate change is an urgent threat to our way of life and that we have the power to fight it.
* We believe health care should be affordable and no one should be one illness away from losing all they’ve worked for.
* We believe we should leave our democracy stronger for the next generation.
* And we know Michael refuses to accept that our economy and democracy are too broken to fix and he always puts Colorado first over partisan games.

This campaign is about building on Michael’s progress delivering for Coloradans. Friend, Donald Trump and his base think Arizona is fertile ground to plant the seeds of their anti-democracy, pro-conspiracy political movement.

But I believe in the people of this state. I know we’re so much bigger than Trump and Kari Lake’s politics of hatred and division. That’s why I'm fighting every day to defeat GOP extremism, flip Arizona blue and defend our democracy – **but to win, I need you with me. And right now, that means I need your help to hit our mid-month fundraising goal.**
The stakes are high – and the other side is ready to play dirty to keep this state red. POLITICO has called this the most competitive open-seat race in the country, and experts have called it a pure toss-up.

We've faced down QAnon rallies, conspiracy theorists, and a Republican opponent who embraces Nazis. Now, Donald Trump has set his sights on Arizona, too. As Democrats, we have to fight back together – right here, right now – to reclaim the future of our country.
**[Our mid-month deadline is on Dec. 15, and we have another $8,236 to raise – or Trump's handpicked candidate could surge ahead and undo all our hard work. **ICYMI: Kellogg workers have been on strike since early October and the company made the decision to replace 1,400 of these employees rather than striking a union deal. Employees of Kellogg were working 80-hour weeks and these employees kept the plants running through the pandemic. All they asked for was a 3% raise.**

Kellogg employees were praised during the pandemic for working 16 hour days, 7 days a week. The founder of Kellogg said “I will invest my money in people”. Now, these people are disposable.

It’s disgusting and shameful that large companies and millionaire CEO’s refuse to take cuts to support their employees. The same employees that kept their factories afloat during Covid-19. Kellogg’s CEO made $11.6 Million in 2020 but decided to cut jobs and benefits.

Now, we must show our support by refusing to buy Kellogg brand food and backing our unions.

Unions help workers break barriers and fight for their necessities. How many times do we have to tell people -- working class citizens are the backbone of our country. It’s time to build back a middle class.

Collective bargaining is a right and corporations should be ashamed of their intimidations to their employees.

We must vow to NEVER cross the picket line. We will never tolerate SCABS— so we will buy generic products and inform our friends and neighbors about what is happening with Kellogg.

**Our job is to empower union workers and show our support.** We can do this by electing working class candidates who will fight for livable wages and demand adequate healthcare for the people in America working overtime.

We will boycott Kellogg products until their employees receive the justice they deserve. Please join us by refusing to fund a company that cares more about corporate greed than the people who keep it afloat. **[Would you sign your name in support of our union workers and the fight against corporate greed?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/39636902/320739913/1344145966?ms=211213_PT_KelloggUnionStrike

clean_body: Snap. Crackle. Profit. | | | logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5Mzc3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImU3ZjdlNjcyLTVhNWMtZWMxMS05NGY2LTAwNTBmMmU2NWU5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dw5ISMgPEq80OEzeY7NzUN5BEOjyGvvDvZ8rWaZWmc= Peter-- ICYMI: Kellogg workers have been on strike since early October and the company made the decision to replace 1,400 of these employees rather than striking a union deal. Employees of Kellogg were working 80-hour weeks and these employees kept the plants running through the pandemic. All they asked for was a 3% raise. Kellogg employees were praised during the pandemic for working 16 hour days, 7 days a week. The founder of Kellogg said “I will invest my money in people”. Now, these people are disposable. It’s disgusting and shameful that large companies and millionaire CEO’s refuse to take cuts to support their employees. The same employees that kept their factories afloat during Covid-19. Kellogg’s CEO made $11.6 Million in 2020 but decided to cut jobs and benefits. Now, we must show our support by refusing to buy Kellogg brand food and backing our unions. Unions help workers break barriers and fight for their necessities. How many times do we have to tell people -- working class citizens are the backbone of our country. It’s time to build back a middle class. Collective bargaining is a right and corporations should be ashamed of their intimidations to their employees. We must vow to NEVER cross the picket line. We will never tolerate SCABS— so we will buy generic products and inform our friends and neighbors about what is happening with Kellogg. Our job is to empower union workers and show our support. We can do this by electing working class candidates who will fight for livable wages and demand adequate healthcare for the people in America working overtime. We will boycott Kellogg products until their employees receive the justice they deserve. Please join us by refusing to fund a company that cares more about corporate greed than the people who keep it afloat. Hey there,

I wanted to make sure you had an opportunity to RSVP to the virtual fundraiser that Ben is hosting this Thursday. **[Click here to reserve your spot.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39636919/320740013/-50102959?refcode=EM_FR_211213virtual2_ev_nick_90DO_3_NG_Na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjg5YS01YTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIuHReG34JyNlvuvlWxgZx8TtJ2BhwN9N4V6UTOQOco=)**

Ben wanted to do this event so he can get to know the grassroots donors that power our campaign, talk about the issues that drive him, and answer any questions you might have about the race.

We want to keep it small, **[so make sure to reserve your spot before they’re all gone!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39636920/320740014/-50102959?refcode=EM_FR_211213virtual2_ev_nick_90DO_3_NG_Na_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTUyMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNzcyMjg5YS01YTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vIuHReG34JyNlvuvlWxgZx8TtJ2BhwN9N4V6UTOQOco=)**

Thanks!

Nick Paprocki
Campaign Manager

name: Council for Citizens Against Government Waste
subject: Stop Joe Biden’s IRS!
body:
| | Please see a special message from our sponsor.
---
| | | | [](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
| | Dear Fellow American, _The IRS is at it again._ After countless revelations about the IRS’s politicization, leaks of confidential taxpayer information, and abuse of authority, Joe Biden’s tyrannical tax collectors are again planning to infringe on our Constitutional rights... ** _... by threatening to look at every detail of your personal bank account!_** The President has proposed to increase the IRS budget from $12 billion to $80 billion to massively ramp up enforcement and hire more than 80,000 deputized federal agents to comb through your bank records. It’s all part of Joe Biden’s radical transformation of the federal government – [**and we must stop it.**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-H_nihbHJKDmzHBdfRaTQ) [**Please take a moment right now to sign the Council for Citizens Against Government Waste’s petition to DEFEAT Joe Biden’s proposed IRS policing and monitoring scheme today****!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
[**Sign the Petition**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.)
---
Among the many wasteful and overreaching proposals Joe Biden has proposed, this one may be the worst. It would require banks to provide records to the IRS for any bank account that has more than $600 in transactions in one year. That means every single person in America would be under the heavy hand of the IRS. Their agents would then use these records to chase down everyday Americans like you and me for more taxes based on our transactions. Should the federal government have the authority to spy on your bank accounts and know every time you make a deposit or spend money? Absolutely not! But that's EXACTLY what President Biden wants to give the IRS the authority to do. [**Thankfully, we still have time to stop this radical intrusion by our federal government, but we'll need to work together to do it. Please take a moment right now to sign the petition and urge all of your concerned friends and family members to do the same!**](http://trk.freedomfirstproject.-E0tUzg) The Biden radical Far-Left agenda puts FDR’s New Deal to shame, and it would set us on an irreversible path to socialism. Your relationship with the federal government will change forever at the stroke of Joe Biden’s pen. We already know that Joe Biden is fighting to expand the size, scope, and power and of the federal government and limit our personal rights and freedoms, and now he wants to expand that same tyrannical power to the IRS. Joe Biden is centralizing executive authority at an alarming rate – millions of hard-working, law-abiding Americans are coming under scrutiny for questioning the progressives’ radical agenda, and even more will be targeted under this expansive IRS power grab. This financial “stop-and-frisk” is a clear violation of the Fourth Amendment and presumes every American’s guilt until you can prove your innocence. That’s not how our legal system is supposed to work! As someone who has been fighting government waste and creeping socialism for more than 30 years, I have never seen such a rapid and alarming shift toward bigger, all-powerful federal government. clean_body: | | Please see a special message from our sponsor. | | | | | | Dear Fellow American, The IRS is at it again. After countless revelations about the IRS’s politicization, leaks of confidential taxpayer information, and abuse of authority, Joe Biden’s tyrannical tax collectors are again planning to infringe on our Constitutional rights... ... by threatening to look at every detail of your personal bank account! The President has proposed to increase the IRS budget from $12 billion to $80 billion to massively ramp up enforcement and hire more than 80,000 deputized federal agents to comb through your bank records. It’s all part of Joe Biden’s radical transformation of the federal government – Among the many wasteful and overreaching proposals Joe Biden has proposed, this one may be the worst. It would require banks to provide records to the IRS for any bank account that has more than $600 in transactions in one year. That means every single person in America would be under the heavy hand of the IRS. Their agents would then use these records to chase down everyday Americans like you and me for more taxes based on our transactions. Should the federal government have the authority to spy on your bank accounts and know every time you make a deposit or spend money? Absolutely not! But that's EXACTLY what President Biden wants to give the IRS the authority to do. The Biden radical Far-Left agenda puts FDR’s New Deal to shame, and it would set us on an irreversible path to socialism. Your relationship with the federal government will change forever at the stroke of Joe Biden’s pen. We already know that Joe Biden is fighting to expand the size, scope, and power and of the federal government and limit our personal rights and freedoms, and now he wants to expand that same tyrannical power to the IRS. Joe Biden is centralizing executive authority at an alarming rate – millions of hard-working, law-abiding Americans are coming under scrutiny for questioning the progressives’ radical agenda, and even more will be targeted under this expansive IRS power grab. subject: Amanda Makki Wins Conservative Grounds Straw Poll!
body:
Amanda wins the poll with 68% of the vote! | | | | [ ](https://amandamakki.us2.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0e08b08a89872d093efe5d84d&id=35ba48f2e9&e=c2296cffff)
---
| | |
---
| Hi Friend,

With nearly 300 Pinellas County Republicans voting in-person, Amanda Makki wins the Conservative Grounds straw poll with 68% of the vote!

This is even more notable because in the 2020 Conservative Grounds poll for FL-13, Luna garnered 46 percent of the vote to Makki’s 25 percent.

With Florida’s Governor Ron DeSantis and dozens of other state and federal GOP candidates who have visited this establishment in Largo, Conservative Grounds is a rite of passage for conservatives in Florida!

We want to thank all of you who took time out of your busy schedule this holiday season to vote for Amanda. You helped send the message loud and clear - Amanda Makki is the best conservative candidate to represent FL-13 in Congress!

Thank you for your support!

Team Makki

name: Malcolm Kenyatta
subject: Goal: 500 donations by Wednesday
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Malcolm PAC
body:
Our last FEC deadline of the year is at the end of this month
#

Friend,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make your first contribution to our campaign. But first, I wanted to explain why your contribution would be so important right now:
The thing is, our last FEC deadline of the year is at the end of this month. After then, we are legally required to publish our fundraising totals for all of 2021.
Going into election year, this public fundraising report will be used as a measure of our coalition’s strength. That's why we set a goal to make sure we have the strongest report possible.
And honestly, we’re a bit behind where we need to be in order to hit that goal by our deadline.
But we crunched the numbers, and it looks like we can make up for lost time if we can get 500 more donations in the door by midnight on Wednesday.
**That means I have to ask for your support today. With your help, I know we can get back on track.**
[So, if you’re in a place to donate today, will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to put us back on track and bring a big coalition of folks aboard our fight for Pennsylvania’s working families?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39636971/320740395/-360183459?refcode2=14008e47-5b5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211213-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDAwOGU0Ny01YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6uEpquAVTFcDuLqFbPmNYrR7L8igZqVQI2yHCSAmGxY=)
**[DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39636972/320740396/-360183459?refcode2=14008e47-5b5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&refcode=em211213-1-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODc1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDAwOGU0Ny01YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6uEpquAVTFcDuLqFbPmNYrR7L8igZqVQI2yHCSAmGxY=)**
Thanks for being a part of this,
Malcolm

* * *
Paid for by Malcolm PAC

PO Box 22395
Philadelphia, PA 19110
United States This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. body:
#

Hi friend,
**[Our final mid-month deadline of the year will be here in 48 hours, and I’m hoping that I can count on your support.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637128/320741108/1630649093?refcode=AU_MLJ_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20211213_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83ODAzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNzI1N2ZkNi01YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0Z4PiDC2ezzXeqovX-SlwJt_qsC4vUDB3FJm6aKrhE8=)**
With the 2022 election cycle already underway, we need to make every day count. It may seem far away now, but Election Day will be here in the blink of an eye.
This year, I’ve been on the frontlines of passing transformative legislation that creates millions of good-paying jobs, lowers the costs of prescription drugs, and invests in our nation’s crumbling infrastructure.
As you can see, I’ve been busy — but there is so much more we need to get done.
President Biden’s agenda is broadly popular with the American people and I will fight tooth and nail to continue delivering policies and programs that improve the lives of folks throughout our country.
**[Friend, will you pitch in to help our campaign stay on track to reach our December goal? **Paid family leave, climate legislation, and Joe Biden’s ENTIRE agenda hang in the balance.**

Luckily, we have a plan: to elect more bold Democrats to weigh down his vote!

[We’re exhausted, and we’re asking for you to DEMAND Joe Manchin do what’s right and pass the Build Back Better Act »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4340?t=6&akid=1012%2E878179%2EjCF4Fk)

TO: SENATOR JOE MANCHIN
FROM: YOU
DATE: DECEMBER 13, 2021

**Dear Senator Manchin,
** Listen up.

With the Senate majority so slim, passing Joe Biden’s agenda is going to take all Democrats standing up and working together.

President Biden’s Build Back Better bill is sitting in the Senate, waiting for your vote.

**But instead of working with your fellow Democrats, you are standing in the way of progress!**

[I’m enraged, Senator, so right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to expand the Senate Majority -- because I REFUSE to let you stonewall all the work we need to get done »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4340?t=8&akid=1012%2E878179%2EjCF4Fk) | [DONATE $2 TO SIGN THE LETTER!](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4340?t=9&akid=1012%2E878179%2EjCF4Fk)
---
_SIGNATURE PENDING DONATION OF ANY AMOUNT_
Enough is enough, Senator — MAGA Mitch McConnell is laughing in our faces!

**If you refuse to stand up for Democratic priorities, our only choice is to expand the Senate majority and drown out your vote.**

The people of your state _(and the whole country)_ deserve more. That’s why I’m imploring you to do the right thing and PASS the Build Back Better act.

[So right now, I’m giving $2 to VPP to do just that! It’s time to elect more Democrats who will vote to protect the American people »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4340?t=10&akid=1012%2E878179%2EjCF4Fk)
