name: =?utf-8?Q?Phil=20Oliva?=
subject: New Siena College poll released
body:
Astorino 📈, Hochul 📉. | |
---
|
---
| [ ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=82d28b327e&e=3ca66fc65a)
---
| Friend,

A new Siena College poll released last week spells trouble for Governor Kathy Hochul.

The poll was conducted statewide from Nov. 29-Dec. 3 and **showed only 41% of New Yorkers believe the state is heading in the right direction.** Equally troubling for Hochul is that only **42% of voters approve of the job she is doing**.

>From her support of the disastrous No-Cash Bail law to emptying prisons under her “Less is More” plan, to masking 2-year olds and firing over 39,000 health care workers causing a hospital staffing crisis - _**Hochul has been a disaster**_.
_Voters are ripe for change and this is a once in a generation opportunity to elect a Republican Governor in a state with more than twice as many Democrats as Republicans._
But not just any Republican will do. Rob Astorino is who legendary political consultant and native New Yorker Dick Morris has called, “Our best shot at winning the governor’s office.”
---

[ JOIN TEAM ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=edf7b8992b&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| New York City and Westchester will represent 40% of the statewide vote next November and only Rob can keep it competitive there while painting Upstate and Long Island dark Red.

Rob has won blue counties before and he does it by outperforming with minority voters. His fluency in Spanish helps, but more important are the community relationships he has built over a decade that has earned him trust.

Rob’s excellent record of executive experience, and his empowerment and reform agenda, will win over Independents and enough Democrats needed to win.
_And when he gets to Albany.... That’s when we all win._
---

[ SUPPORT ROB ASTORINO ](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=357bcf36b1&e=3ca66fc65a)

---
| Phil Oliva
Campaign Manager
Rob Astorino for Govenor of New York
---
|

---
| _Rob Astorino is running for governor of New York. A former two-term Westchester County Executive who currently works as a business and media consultant, and serves as an independent director on two company boards. In 2014, Astorino was the Republican nominee for Governor of New York. Astorino stunned everyone by holding Andrew Cuomo to only 54%, the closest election of Cuomo’s career. Astorino is a lifelong resident of Westchester. He and his wife, Sheila, are the parents of three children.
You can learn more by visiting [robastorino.com](https://robastorino.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fc77541c2ac6ac3b6b1a237b3&id=4f49cac321&e=3ca66fc65a)._

name: Holly McCormack
subject: Together we can win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Holly for Congress
body:
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637588/320742489/1254848285?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGUzYzE2MC01ZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUq_-w_AU2UsLKcLSh5dTers6tMsd1hrtK8XeMvirpY=&emci=4cf5fab8-4c5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=38e3c160-5e5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23594672) | |
---
Peter, we’ve all heard entirely too much about my opponent Marjorie Taylor Greene. So today, I wanted to re-introduce myself and my plan to deliver results for Northwest Georgia.

My family has lived here for a very long time. My father was in the service and I grew up an Army brat. Our family moved from base to base across the country, but our hearts always yearned for the place we knew was home. As soon as Daddy was discharged, we settled down in Rossville.

I’ve seen firsthand how Rossville has declined over the years. I've watched as the big cities grew and we lost jobs, childcare providers, hospitals, and attention. It seemed like our communities had hit rock bottom. But the only way to go is forward.

**That’s why I’m running for Congress. Not against someone, but for something—for us.**

I’m the right candidate because I've lived our struggles. I had to work opposite shifts with my husband for years while our kids were little because we couldn’t afford childcare. I know what it’s like to have to decide between your child’s prescriptions or band equipment because I’ve made that choice. I understand how our veterans feel about the VA because I watch my father struggle with it to this day. And believe me when I tell you, I know how bad our internet is because I had two children doing school online while I tried to run a business out of the house.

**I’m focused on issues that matter to all of us like:**
* Rural broadband
* Affordable childcare
* World-class care for our Veterans

I believe these issues are going to be solved right here in rural America. **I know we can win this race because this district is made up of hard working and honest people**. By focusing on our community, and ignoring the bait others will try to distract us with, we can connect with folks who have felt betrayed and left behind for far too long.

**[I hope you’ll join our efforts to put Northwest Georgia back on track by chipping in $15 today.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637589/320742490/-804235033?refcode=em1213&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODk0MyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOGUzYzE2MC01ZTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oUq_-w_AU2UsLKcLSh5dTers6tMsd1hrtK8XeMvirpY=)** Together, we can show up and show out for the rural communities that are often forgotten about.

Let’s fire Marjorie Taylor Greene in 2022,
Holly McCormack.
****
|

body:

Look, here’s what happens when we miss a fundraising goal on an extremely competitive Senate race like Maggie Hassan’s here in New Hampshire:
* We make budget cuts, preventing us from running the most strategic campaign we can.
* Republicans see it as a sign of vulnerability and ramp up their attacks.
* We miss the chance to talk to important swing voters who will decide this election.

I’m telling you this because we fell $5,000 short of our fundraising goal over the weekend. I’m not panicking just yet – we ran the data, and if we can close the gap in the next 90 minutes or so, we should be able to fund the campaign we need to win. **[You’re a top Democrat, and Maggie can’t win without your support. Will you please rush $5 or as much as you can to win in New Hampshire? name: =?utf-8?Q?Captain=20Mike=20for=20Governor?=
subject: Honored to have Ted Nugent's Support
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Michael Brown for Governor • P
body:
I'm honored to be endorsed by Ted Nugent, a true American patriot and fighter for our constitutional rights. | | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
|
---
|
### I'm honored to be endorsed by Ted Nugent.

Dear Peter:

Most people know Ted Nugent for his music, and a lot of us are familiar with his conservation efforts and pro-hunting advocacy. Ted is a leader in standing up for our constitutional rights and I'm honored to receive his endorsement.

This is what Ted Nugent had to say:
> "I’m endorsing you Mike. I want you to bring back Michigan to God, family country, law and order, and real science-based hunting, fishing, trapping, conservation, truth. And I know that’s what you live, but in Michigan we’re not allowed to live science-based conservation.
>
> As Governor I know we can get back to the Michigan I was born in. The arsenal of democracy.
>
> With Mike as the Governor at the helm of Michigan it can once again be the greatest state in the nation. Right now under Gretchen Whitmer’s failed leadership, Michigan is the laughing stock of America.
>
> Mike will put an end to the abandonment of all the traditional values that made Michigan the greatest state in the nation. With Mike as a leader and with we the people, the real working conservatives behind Mike, Michigan can be the greatest state in the nation like it was when I was born here.
Will you please stand with me, Ted Nugent and the thousands of hard-working Michigan men and women working to defeat Gretchen Whitmer?

Please make a generous contribution to my campaign today. Your donation of $25, $50, $100 or more is vital to defeating Whitmer and taking Michigan back.
---
|
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://captainmikeformichigan.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d4c9e98e87232d3682c652313&id=0be26ef496&e=0636b97700 "DONATE TODAY")
---
| Peter, we all know Gretchen Whitmer has been a disaster for Michigan.

But there is good news. Recent polling shows Whitmer can be beaten. With your help, that's what I intend to do.

Thank you for your interest in my campaign. Please help out today by making a generous contribution too.

See you on the campaign trail,

Michael Brown
Republican/Conservative for Governor
---

name: Kara Hahn
subject: Sign the Petition to Pass Build Back Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kara Hahn for Congress Kara Hahn for Congress
body:
|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637928/320744464/922507959?refcode=em21_emailheader&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=)

It's time for the Senate to pass the _Build Back Better Act_ \-- Americans can't wait.

For a _very_ long time now, we've been calling on our leaders to pass transformative policies that address the challenges households face every day, team. Americans need **action to address exorbitant prices for life-saving medication, tax relief for homeowners, and accessible, affordable child-care for growing families.**

Issues like these are not insurmountable. That's why the Democratic House stepped up, by passing President Biden's _Build Back Better Act._

But while the House works to pass powerful, commonsense laws, the Senate remains in a stalemate of partisan gridlock. We’re so close to the finish line. Now is the time to make our voices heard.

**[Team, will you join me in signing your name to our petition and urging the Senate to pass the _Build Back Better Act?_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637929/320744465/1471456401?ms=em21_211213_bbb_pt&refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=&emci=a520562e-5259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3c0c7d08-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)** [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637930/320744466/1471456401?ms=em21_211213_bbb_pt&refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=&emci=a520562e-5259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3c0c7d08-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896) Our government has a unique opportunity _right now_ to uplift working people and families across America. Even though the _Build Back Better Act_ isn't perfect, it will address many critical challenges our neighbors face every day.

Here are just _some_ things provided for in the _Build Back Better Act:_
* **An expansion of Medicare** to cover hearing care for our seniors.
* **Universal paid family and medical leave** as well as reductions in the cost of child-care for children under the age of six-years-old.
* **An historic investment to combat climate change** that paves the road to cut our greenhouse gas emissions in half by 2030, ensure clean air and water for our children, and increase our resilience to extreme weather.

We simply cannot wait any longer to start making progress. We don't want safe drinking water; **we need it to live.** Working families don't want childcare; **we need it to support ourselves and contribute to the economy.**

**[Friend, the only way we can build back better is if the Senate does its job this month. Your friends, your neighbors, and your community need your voice on this matter. Can I count on your signature for our petition?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637931/320744467/1471456401?ms=em21_211213_bbb_pt&refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=&emci=a520562e-5259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3c0c7d08-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896)** [SIGN YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637932/320744468/1471456401?ms=em21_211213_bbb_pt&refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=&emci=a520562e-5259-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=3c0c7d08-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25369896) Thank you,

Kara Hahn

| **Kara Hahn is a lifelong Long Islander, social worker, county legislator, and candidate for Congress in NY-01. This open seat is a _must win_ for Democrats to defend our majority in the House and continue driving progress in America, but we can't do it without your help. **Make a recurring donation to sustain our movement for the long haul and send Kara to Congress!**** **[DONATE MONTHLY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637933/320744469/-987883882?refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt_bb_1&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=) ** **[DONATE ONCE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39637934/320744470/-987883882?refcode=em21_211213_bbb_pt_bb_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDc2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBjN2QwOC02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=7Pw-3aLe__dQGTtvhYC-Nt0wx7PKmRnw4oLdiDJ8-JA=) **

name: Rudy Giuliani
subject: I knew the price I’d have to pay
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund Legal Defense Trust
body:
But it didn't matter. I had to do what was right for our country.
| [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005955:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)
---
Peter,
---
President Trump knows how much heat I took as his attorney.
---
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005955:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)
---
**I knew full well the price I 'd have to pay for defending President Trump from the bloodthirsty Deep State.**
---
But it didn't matter. I could not let the Deep State take down a duly elected president all because he chose to fight for the forgotten citizens of our country.
---
Now, the Deep State is on a vengeful mission to ruin me personally, professionally, and financially -- and I need YOUR help to fight for my freedom.
---
[**Please make a contribution to my Legal Defense Trust -- the Rudy Giuliani Freedom Fund -- as I continue to fight for my freedom and justice.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005955:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $25](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005956:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $50](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005957:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $75](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005958:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $100](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005959:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE $250](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005960:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**[CONTRIBUTE OTHER AMOUNT](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005955:JlCey6ERN:m:1:3253819041:F9ED7B86A7FF1525AE496A672843E929:r)**
---
**When the FBI launched their dawn raid on my apartment earlier this year, I knew that my freedom was in jeopardy.**
---
As President Trump said, there aren't many other lawyers out there who would be willing to endure those kinds of threats and intimidation tactics.
---
_But I dove head first into the battle to defend him -- and I don 't regret it for a second._
---
I refused to let the Deep State and their stooges in Congress take down President Trump for crimes he did not commit.
---
Because if they could do it to a sitting president they disagreed with, then what could they one day do to you?
---

subject: SCOTUS Refuses to Block Texas Abortion Ban
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Shontel Brown for Congress
body:
Women everywhere need us.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638222/320745731/47178721?refcode=EM_FR_211213choice_N_SB_90DO_6_NG_TESTA_logo&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk0ODZiYy02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-UD-kYIXJ5yRX67qLNcdUDAGw38_2nqBWlTptG8m5U=) Peter — here's what SCOTUS' decision on the Texas abortion ban means for our country.

**SCOTUS' failure to block the Texas abortion ban is a betrayal to women everywhere in the U.S.**

Texas' abortion ban allows anyone suspected of violating the ban to be _harassed with costly lawsuits and opens the door for copy-cat laws_ in other states. This bounty-hunting scheme is a witch-hunt to restrict women's rights.

The Court has failed us. **It's time for Congress to protect Roe v. Wade.**

[**_Earlier this year, the House passed the Women’s Health Protection Act to protect women’s right to choose and the health care providers helping them. Now, it’s time for the Senate to step up. I need 250 signatures by midnight tonight to show the Senate it’s time to protect Roe v. Wade. Will you join me and sign my petition today?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638223/320745732/593891301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk0ODZiYy02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-UD-kYIXJ5yRX67qLNcdUDAGw38_2nqBWlTptG8m5U=&emci=d1079dee-4d5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f19486bc-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23746811) [Sign Our Petition
Protect Roe v. Wade](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638225/320745734/593891301?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzg0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmMTk0ODZiYy02MDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=C-UD-kYIXJ5yRX67qLNcdUDAGw38_2nqBWlTptG8m5U=&emci=d1079dee-4d5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=f19486bc-605c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=23746811) Women's rights hang in the balance. Together,

Shontel Brown |

name: ICYMI News
subject: Survey on an urgent matter
body:
I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation
| _Sponsored message_ |
---|---|---
This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zoud7r48cchnfv6migceoakbh8btjnpln4inlpi0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j68o36c1h2bs) Dear Fellow American, I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter. It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation’s future. A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution. That’s why Hillsdale College is conducting a **National Survey on Presidential Selection.** By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. You can complete the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** by using the link below: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zfflgligpetrng3sucab77p55qgj3t8mhph805b8_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j68o36c1h2bs)** For most of our nation’s history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government. **But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.** This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don’t understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty. Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching **millions** of Americans in all 50 states. These efforts, which aim to counter the Left’s domination over most of our schools, include:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101” and “The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;”
* **Reaching** over 5.6 million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty;
* **Promoting** constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;
* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America, as well as to members of our armed forces; and
* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education through Hillsdale’s Barney Charter School Initiative, which launches and provides guidance to classical K-12 charter schools nationwide.

Your answers to the **National Survey on Presidential Selection** will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College. **And this is especially important in this critical time for America’s future.** So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our **National Survey on Presidential Selection** and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time. **You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:** **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/electoral-college-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2znak8ms41mvjsn4n6kitr63cf0oaa8l6k4e6te80_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j68o36c1h2bs)** And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. Since 1844, Hillsdale has been “pursuing truth and defending liberty.” Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts, while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work. Please represent your state and take the **National Survey on Presidential Selection today**. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

If dpwillis67@gmail.com should not be subscribed or if you need to change your subscription information for ICYMI News, [please use this preferences page](http://e.icyminews.com/prefs/9z2zjoj1h8vlmt43og41grovqc8b8mnegi16p5t6rpg).

body:
| | |

body:
I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio
| | |
---
Friend, I'm neck and neck with Marco Rubio, and** the stakes couldn't be higher. **
Florida could determine Senate control and the future of our country, **so** **it's up to this grassroots team – including YOU – to keep the Senate out of Mitch McConnell's hands.**
That's a tall order, friend. I know we CAN defeat Marco Rubio, but we have a steep mountain to climb because we will have one of the most expensive races of 2022.
Rubio is already running deceitful attack ads to defeat me while national Republicans spend millions to mobilize their base and keep any Democrat from winning in Florida again. **That's why I need 10,000 people to chip in and become Senate Majority Defenders before midnight tonight. **
**[Friend, with Senate control on the line, will you donate $5 right now to become a Senate Majority Defender, help flip Florida blue and keep Mitch McConnell out of power?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638284/320746125/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1834-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWE5Y2I3MC02MTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbF69m1mlVG_fF-ILms75txClwTJW13Kvl2rSq9dZfo=)**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638285/320746126/-892300846?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1834-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Mzc4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYWE5Y2I3MC02MTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=BbF69m1mlVG_fF-ILms75txClwTJW13Kvl2rSq9dZfo=)
**Here's what I want you to remember, friend:** The last Senate race in Florida was determined by just 10,033 votes. That's a TINY margin.
With CNN calling this seat a top pickup opportunity for Democrats, I need the resources to run as many phone banks, voter registration drives and more to connect with as many Floridians as possible. **YOUR donation right now could be what allows us to reach just enough voters to flip this seat and defend our majority.**

subject: Pima County Election Hearings Underway!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
Be a part of history |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=27492146bd&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
_Today is the day._

My name is Mark Finchem and right now I am hosting a Pima County Election Hearing, just like the one that got the Maricopa Audit started!
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=656750a815&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| **Yes, the Pima Audit is materializing, and we know what we find – more fraud. We know the evidence is there, we just need the resources to fully examine it!**

We will have a host of subject matter experts ready to testify and ready to get down to business. And we aren’t pulling any punches.

**From statistical and real number analysis from returned ballots, combined with robust canvassing and door knocking, we are bringing an arsenal of high-power resources to a problem that demands all of our attention.**

_But we know what happened last time. We revealed and uncovered ballot tampering and criminal activities that should result in JAIL TIME. And the media is covering it up and AG Mark Brnovich isn’t doing his job._

**This means we need to make a sound which no one can silence, and this means putting our own resources into pushing forward election integrity. And this is expensive.**

Remember, we have the media and the establishment pushing against this cause. This means it is our own dollars being put to work. And every dime is worth it because we cannot put a price tag on election integrity.

**We must not. If we do, then the Democrats will always win. If not by votes, then by strongarming Republicans into admitting defeat because we are too scared to pursue the truth!**

And we have an outstanding lineup, folks.
* Senator Sonny Borrelli
* Representative Leo Biasiucci
* Senator Wendy Rogers
* Senator Kelly Townsend
* Representative Mark Finchem
* Representative Theresa Martinez
* Representative Neal Carter
* Representative Judy Burges

**Folks, there’s a reason that President Trump endorsed me for Secretary of State in Arizona. _Because I’m a fighter, and I get things done._**

_Don’t forget that I paid for the original Election Integrity hearings out of pocket. I will do whatever it takes to get this done._

[But none of this happens without your urgent and continued support. We have a critical fundraising deadline for raising $50,000 by the end of the month. ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=bfb1afd8bd&e=44b8c466b0) This is what it takes to get the word out on Election Integrity and also make sure that we have the warchest necessary for victory in 2022.

**Now is the time. We MUST hit this by the end of the year or we won’t be able to accomplish what we need to accomplish to ensure our elections are secure. [And your donation is the difference.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=48eedf85e2&e=44b8c466b0)**

[_Can you help out with a generous donation today to make sure that our elections are secure?_

_Donate $50, $100, $250, or $1,000 or more to protect American Democracy!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6125451c96&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [Thank you and God bless you!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=0de94a76a4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a6ecc2f2d9&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
---
| |
---
| _Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved._

**Our mailing address is:**
Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737
[Add us to your address book](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/vcard?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb)

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3998059498) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=7ec8888fbb&e=44b8c466b0&c=3998059498).

name: Dr. Caraveo
subject: It’s heartbreaking, Peter
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS
body:
We’ve had enough thoughts and prayers. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638312/320746481/1561815853?refcode=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1NDcyMC02MjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLUgU3V4aYkdNGqNWaqRqPxSaUnyp6r3xDaQN2pqCOo=&emci=4db4da1b-4c5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)
---
| | Peter,

When I was a senior in high school, 12 students and one teacher were murdered in a mass shooting at Columbine High School — just 30 minutes away from me. It was confusing and scary, but it felt like an anomaly.

After so much meaningless violence, it seemed a given that Congress would take action to make sure nothing like that ever happened again. I don’t need to tell you how the rest of the story goes.

Instead of legislation, we’ve spent the last two decades hearing meaningless “thoughts and prayers.” **[Add your name and send Congress a message loud and clear: we’ve heard enough thoughts and prayers, it’s time for common-sense gun reform >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638313/320746482/1013834478?refcode=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1NDcyMC02MjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLUgU3V4aYkdNGqNWaqRqPxSaUnyp6r3xDaQN2pqCOo=&emci=4db4da1b-4c5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)** | ****[ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638314/320746483/1013834478?refcode=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1NDcyMC02MjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLUgU3V4aYkdNGqNWaqRqPxSaUnyp6r3xDaQN2pqCOo=&emci=4db4da1b-4c5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)****
---
Most recently, I was devastated to hear about the shootings in Aurora — a community that has experienced two mass shootings in less than 10 years — and Oxford, Michigan. But these stories feel painfully regular now.

It hurts me that children, parents, teachers, and school staff have to live in constant fear — what if today is the day that their school gets attacked?

I’m writing to you today because it’s the 10 year anniversary of the mass shooting at the elementary school in Sandy Hook in Connecticut. We’re decades overdue for change.

**[We’ve had enough thoughts and prayers — it’s time for action. Add your name and demand Congress finally do something and pass common-sense gun safety legislation >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638315/320746484/1013834478?refcode=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjUwOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNTM1NDcyMC02MjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dLUgU3V4aYkdNGqNWaqRqPxSaUnyp6r3xDaQN2pqCOo=&emci=4db4da1b-4c5c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=b5354720-625c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=12666102)**

Dr. Caraveo

clean_body: We’ve had enough thoughts and prayers. | | Peter, When I was a senior in high school, 12 students and one teacher were murdered in a mass shooting at Columbine High School — just 30 minutes away from me. It was confusing and scary, but it felt like an anomaly. After so much meaningless violence, it seemed a given that Congress would take action to make sure nothing like that ever happened again. I don’t need to tell you how the rest of the story goes. Instead of legislation, we’ve spent the last two decades hearing meaningless “thoughts and prayers.” | ** Most recently, I was devastated to hear about the shootings in Aurora — a community that has experienced two mass shootings in less than 10 years — and Oxford, Michigan. But these stories feel painfully regular now. It hurts me that children, parents, teachers, and school staff have to live in constant fear — what if today is the day that their school gets attacked? I’m writing to you today because it’s the 10 year anniversary of the mass shooting at the elementary school in Sandy Hook in Connecticut. We’re decades overdue for change. Thank you for taking action on this critical issue. Dr. Caraveo | | = = ****Learn more at:** Follow along: | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS CARAVEO FOR CONGRESS PO Box 953, Eastlake, CO 80614 If you would like to receive fewer emails, please . ****If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please.******

name: Nathan Dahm
subject: Happy 385th Birthday to the National Guard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nathan Dahm for Senate** ](https://em
body:
Today, we celebrate the brave men and women who put their lives on the line to protect us during domestic emergencies and natural disasters.
| [ ](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWc3-H2L5KNyVgXN9B6Jnv1xW8rPchQ4C1_rjN3JhCFN3lLB3V1-WJV7CgXtlW457Ftj2zhQYHW7FgKgQ40ryH6W3zWPzN52KsHnW6bmRyn6s5bVFVxLlLM8Bxl_-N8YFDxcJvp78W3DyTtY3F3WFZV2H91s3Y61YmW9c8WXM3B7JqYW1S8DM95cjGj7W3qZQ_N5pMHhMW59Y-jL1f4DFxN11mGq3_sGjTW7Kk1v44d4z15Vw4XRq49H149W7X34-Y8bSfhFM44hwjqmjFTW444PcT5kN0hXVb8frg4LQLpNW4CRnxP1Fxg1X3nFW1)
---
Peter,

The National Guard turns 385 years old today. Please join me in wishing The Guard a Happy Birthday!

The National Guard is the oldest military organization in America. Today, we celebrate the brave men and women who put their lives on the line to protect us during domestic emergencies and natural disasters.

Last year, I led the charge on the Defend the Guard Act in the Oklahoma Senate to ensure men and women serving our National Guard are only being deployed constitutionally in the future.

Today, I want to thank them by bringing them home and making sure they are only deployed in a constitutional manner in the future.

The US Senate needs somebody who is not afraid to stand up against the America Last RINOs and War Hawk Democrats.

I want to continue my fight defending the National Guard in the US Senate and carry out President Trump’s call for bringing our troops home from foreign wars and shores... but I can’t do it without your help! [Donate Today by Clicking Here >>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWc3-H2L5KNyVgXN9B6Jnv1xW8rPchQ4C1_rjN3JhCFN3lLB3V1-WJV7CgHS5W8gBzjW2_nW87W3RFJ6l1-V92wW1rQ45F2yzJgsW5wm_lD9gBslCW1Zq-_d2PvkkwW31sDrQ3YsyPzW3cL1YP7Fbjb8W5bvjGw5nW84NW6s9fPb2rBlwqW3kN4Ng2NlJjcW8YJG1d798FXRW47yhxG33WYvhW5W9ThC3-823HW4VYq104S934zVsS-bd7DttZrW2byFD81K-QJmW80ty5b8_-jjyW2FXwrL6k5LKTN1Hn5nCRcFWdW7qlxcZ5mcrHz3hDb1)
Do you agree that the brave men and women serving our National Guard have a right to be home with their families for the holidays, Peter? [Click here to Donate Now >>](https://em.dahmforsenate.com/e3t/Btc/W3+113/d2rzSS04/VWc3-H2L5KNyVgXN9B6Jnv1xW8rPchQ4C1_rjN3JhCFN3lLB3V1-WJV7CgCpcW8D5MXV44fp6bW61D-JC6zJ4dBW4SKy6R7c18N3N79wl5MCS7V3N3Qf49V7XnPdW1ZlTVP89L-sdW2HRRQb7Mb_nKW65fb-389fBMzW1402T98vYnhdVWs0vP6Y9Pg1W8kMpv15SVgPPW3J65F65ZVFdJW5rdqM03B6P-YW7tQmmq61hXQXW7htPHZ5SmPTxW4bBYXx5zqwRkW3bbVq652TRHcW68CV5z4ddPvLN2NcJqmcZFbyW39tKnH7TGVDk3kMF1)

I promise to always put America First and will never stop fighting for our military.

Thank you,
---

body:
Do you SUPPORT President Biden's move to OUST Louis DeJoy and his allies from USPS leadership?
| | | **BREAKING:
President Biden OUSTS key Louis DeJoy ally at the Post Office**

---
Did you see this?!

President Biden just took a MAJOR step forward in finally removing Louis DeJoy -- _Trump 's hand-picked Postmaster General_ \-- from power at the USPS.

After all DeJoy and Trump have done to undermine this essential service, we're so proud to see President Biden take decisive action.

But we need to know if our best grassroots supporters have President Biden's back.

[**So quickly,****let us know: Do you SUPPORT President Biden 's move to OUST Louis DeJoy and his allies from USPS leadership?**********](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/V4_)

NAME: dpwillis67@gmail.com
SURVEY RESPONSE: [MISSING >>](https://links.e.dccc.)
| [SUBMIT YOUR RESPONSE >> ](https://links.e.dccc.)
---

We can't believe what we're seeing.

Louis DeJoy, Trump's hand-picked postmaster general, has been responsible for RUTHLESS attacks on the Post Office -- _making critical deliveries PRICIER and PERMANENTLY slower. _

**But President Biden just made a HEROIC decision to oust one of DeJoy 's strongest allies at the USPS -- which means we're one step closer to finally REMOVING this Trump crony from power once and for all.**

The fight isn't over yet, though. And at this pivotal moment for the postal service, we need to know President Biden and our Democrats have strong support from this grassroots team. ****

---

That means hitting each and every one of our grassroots fundraising goals is crucial to ensuring we have the resources to maintain Charlie’s momentum. We have our fundraising needs broken down into quarterly, monthly, and even weekly goals, with targets for each geographic area too. And right now it looks like we still need five more donations from 34223 to hit this week’s goal! = = We need your help to make sure we aren’t overwhelmed by all the money Governor DeSantis has raised from his ideological billionaire pals. We need a governor who fights for ALL Floridians -- but that means we need everyday folks like you to give whatever you can! So, if you can, please don’t wait. body:
We won’t stop talking about the climate crisis. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638841/320748401/823540626?refcode=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQyZDY1NC02NDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQwhqCltqAoHupeA-3GzyqzoS5p2hNdpC9LIAQpPkTc=&emci=ea5f644e-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)
Peter, We’ve emailed you before about the climate crisis. **Bottom line?_We’re out of time._** If we don’t _drastically_ alter our society’s use of energy and resources, we’ll end up leaving our children and future generations a planet that can’t sustain them. Roy has prioritized expanding clean energy in North Carolina, but there’s more work to do — work that we _need_ Republicans to join with us to accomplish. **[If you’re with us in the fight for this planet, add your name to our petition calling on GOP legislators to finally take the climate crisis seriously. We need them to work with Roy and Democrats to create lasting change>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638843/320748403/2023483214?refcode=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQyZDY1NC02NDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQwhqCltqAoHupeA-3GzyqzoS5p2hNdpC9LIAQpPkTc=&emci=ea5f644e-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)** | **[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638845/320748405/2023483214?refcode=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQyZDY1NC02NDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQwhqCltqAoHupeA-3GzyqzoS5p2hNdpC9LIAQpPkTc=&emci=ea5f644e-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)**
---
We can’t let this go. We can’t stop talking about this crisis.
**Climate change is simply the existential threat of our time. If we don’t act to secure our climate now,_nothing_ else we can accomplish will matter in the long run.**
There’s no more time to hem and haw and pretend it isn’t happening.
Climate change is real, it’s happening NOW, and we’re past the point of reversing it entirely. What we _can_ still do is avert the worst possible outcomes — but only if everyone comes together to fight for our future.
**[Add your name today to tell Republicans that it’s time to act to solve this crisis. Before it’s too late.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39638847/320748407/2023483214?refcode=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ms=ea.fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODE3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjQyZDY1NC02NDVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DQwhqCltqAoHupeA-3GzyqzoS5p2hNdpC9LIAQpPkTc=&emci=ea5f644e-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=fb42d654-645c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=1049176)**

clean_body: We won’t stop talking about the climate crisis. | Peter, We’ve emailed you before about the climate crisis. Bottom line?We’re out of time. If we don’t drastically alter our society’s use of energy and resources, we’ll end up leaving our children and future generations a planet that can’t sustain them. Roy has prioritized expanding clean energy in North Carolina, but there’s more work to do — work that we need Republicans to join with us to accomplish. | We can’t let this go. We can’t stop talking about this crisis. Climate change is simply the existential threat of our time. If we don’t act to secure our climate now,nothing else we can accomplish will matter in the long run. There’s no more time to hem and haw and pretend it isn’t happening. Climate change is real, it’s happening NOW, and we’re past the point of reversing it entirely. What we can still do is avert the worst possible outcomes — but only if everyone comes together to fight for our future. | | Democrats held total control in Virginia for two years. The accomplishments we’ve been able to make in these last two years have been extraordinary. Virginia Democrats abolished the death penalty and codified voting rights in a southern state, Derek. We expanded medicare, ratified the ERA, restored voting rights, passed meaningful legislation on gun control and LGBTQ rights, reduced the cost of prescription drugs like insulin, created thousands of jobs, and when the Trump administration abdicated its duty to protect its citizens during the onset of the COVID-19 pandemic, Virginia Democrats stood up and steered our Commonwealth through it. **We have so much to be proud of, but November’s elections remind us that there is still so much we have to work on.** We need to make sure everyone knows the good that Democrats have done, the ways that we’ve made their lives better and their voices heard. Believe me, we’ve been working hard to meet this moment and develop plans to win in 2022. It started with the post-election debriefs that our senior leadership have been hosting all across Virginia, but it can’t stop there. That’s why I’m asking for your support. **We have congressional elections coming up next year and potentially the entire slate of House of Delegates seats up for election again as well. Will you chip in to help us defend our Blue Commonwealth? Any contribution you can make today will help us gear up for one of the most important years in Virginia history.** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: Self Reliance Central
subject: Lincoln’s secret weapon
body:
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Eucli
| This sponsored message from Self Reliance Central is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z2cvc5ib5qvc2crkl6kgie07h48jk3ch3o7mmf0o_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j62or6c3h2bs)
---|---
| | Dear Fellow American,
Asked by a reporter in 1860 how he had acquired his extraordinary rhetorical skills, Abraham Lincoln credited his study of Euclid.
While studying law in Springfield, Lincoln explained, he became convinced that the ability to demonstrate the truth of things was essential to the good practice of law.
Consequently, Lincoln left his job, retired to his father’s cabin, and did not return until he could “give any proposition in the six books of Euclid at sight.”
By studying Euclid, we improve our ability to reason soundly—plus, in my experience, the study of Euclid can be great fun.
That’s why Hillsdale College has produced a free online course on the topic **“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry.”**
Through**“Mathematics and Logic: From Euclid to Modern Geometry,”** you will learn the importance of deductive reasoning as a foundation for pursuing knowledge in all fields of learning, as well as in everyday life.
---
| | **Now, the course is available in a beautiful DVD box set for viewing in your home or for use in a small group.** **** **You can receive the DVD box set as a thank-you for your tax-deductible gift of $100 or more in support of our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty.**
Your tax-deductible gift will help promote our free online courses and other educational outreach efforts in this critical time for our nation. And your gift matters even more because...
Hillsdale accomplishes all its work while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.
---
| [](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z4clbuc026mrvtd2iomt3trm4j6tcpuuq2dm50s0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j62or6c3h2bs)
---
| | That’s why we need the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
Quantities of this special DVD box set are limited, so reserve your copy today. I’ve included a secure link for you to make your tax-deductible gift below:
[_**https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-mathematics-and-logic-course**_](http://e.selfreliancecentral.com/rd/9z2z6ju5va4cinunj08dbqilmf98phkvgk0mrlmqqf0_rp22sh2s8i66pj4s5j62or6c3h2bs)
Thank you for partnering with Hillsdale in its mission on behalf of liberty.
Warm regards,
Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---
| This email was sent by: Self-Reliance Central

name: Tony Vargas
subject: I wish I had better news...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony Vargas for Congress
body:
I hope you’ll understand why this request is so important

|
---

| | I wish I was coming to you with better news but: [**_I missed my fundraising goal yesterday._**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39639161/320749424/1129282168?refcode=20211213_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWM4Nzc1NC02NjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qwc53sifjoT4nYe02tPD7oPW9Hy5tO_5REJo8R0yk0A=) [**_I’m 58 donations short of where I need to be right now. If I can close this gap by midnight, I’ll be on track to reach my End-of-Year Goal and unseat Republican Congressman Don Bacon. But if I miss it, it’ll be nearly impossible to make up lost ground and fund a winning campaign. So I’m personally asking: will you chip in $10 now?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39639162/320749425/1129282168?refcode=20211213_em_fr_b1_tv_30op&amount=10&amounts=15,50,100,250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDE0NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OWM4Nzc1NC02NjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Qwc53sifjoT4nYe02tPD7oPW9Hy5tO_5REJo8R0yk0A=)

This is my most important fundraising deadline so far. Here’s why: I’m just inches away from the official start of the election year. To win this close race, I have to start ramping up my campaign now -- not scaling back. But the truth is: launching our ads, reaching critical voters, and sending mail isn’t cheap. And we have to get started _now_. If I can’t close my fundraising gap today, I’ll miss my End-of-Year Goal and have to make drastic changes to my campaign budget and strategy. [**_At this point in the race, last-minute changes like this will cost me valuable time that I can’t waste -- and they’ll put my chances of defeating Don Bacon at serious risk. # **Friend — Democrats, the woke left, and the liberal media are _terrified_ of the impact we’re having in the U.S. Senate. **

---
The reason is simple: I’m the one leading the fight against Biden’s tyrannical vaccine mandates and pointing out that natural immunity to the virus matters and should be recognized — and I’ve practiced medicine for 30 years. **That makes their heads EXPLODE...** because they know a doctor challenging their one size fits all approach is a threat to their power. **So, they’re attacking me with everything they’ve got.** I can take the heat, but I need your help to respond. _We cannot allow our voices to be silenced on this issue._[**Will you chip in whatever you can to help me amplify our message?**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/80611874979feca4041ad8cde91a9694/37973/92caf09d96c97afd/2cb91657ba6d20d1c3d6b838967d376c/37973)

I can take the heat, but I need your help to respond. We cannot allow our voices to be silenced on this issue. I’m not surprised the Swamp is attacking me. Kansans sent me to the U.S. Senate to fight for them and their freedoms, not a status quo desperate to have even more power. But in order to cut through the noise and share our message, we must have the resources it takes to fight back. Senator Roger Marshall | | | Doc is defending life. He's standing for our jobs, our families, and our faith. He's taking our Kansas values to the U.S. Senate, but he can't get it done without your help. We know we send a lot of emails, but we're counting on you. The truth is, these emails are the key to keeping our supporters updated on ways they can make a difference. However, if you'd like to receive fewer emails or unsubscribe, .

name: Chris for PA
subject: We cannot let our momentum slow down
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
body:
In case you missed it, Derek.

When we launched our campaign, we made a promise to our supporters that we would put people first and foremost.

We’re building a grassroots movement from the ground up of everyday folks chipping in what they can. That’s right, our team is not taking a dime from corporate PACs.

By bringing people together from every corner of PA-17, we can bring strong leadership willing to fight for the common good . So we’re working around the clock to engage with voters, organize within our communities, and talk about solutions with as many people as possible.

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-dec2021-launchvideo?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213launchvideo_C4PA_full_SLA_pt]

We cannot let our momentum slow down. Can you share our launch video with three or more of your friends on social media to spread our message far and wide?

DONATE >>[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-dec2021-launchvideo?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213launchvideo_C4PA_full_SLA_pt]

With your help, we can finally deliver on the issues that matter most to working families — including healthcare, education, infrastructure, and bringing good-paying union jobs back to Western Pennsylvania.

Thanks for sharing and being part of our campaign.

Chris for PA

(P.S. If you would rather donate to our campaign instead, you can make a contribution today. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-dec2021?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213launchvideo_C4PA_full_SLA_pt] )

Chris Deluzio is a voting rights lawyer and Iraq war veteran running for Congress in Pennsylvania's 17th District. He'll be a champion for our unions, fight to guarantee good healthcare for every American, take on corporate power, and advocate for bold action to protect and strengthen our democracy. This is one of the most competitive districts in the country, and Democrats have to hold it in order to keep their House majority in 2022.

Please chip in to help Chris build a strong campaign that can win against the Republican machine. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-dec2021-launchvideo?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213launchvideo_C4PA_full_SLA_pt]

Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/del-email-dec2021-launchvideo?refcode=fl_email_fr_20211213launchvideo_C4PA_full_SLA_pt]

[https://www.facebook.com/ChrisforPA]
[https://twitter.com/ChrisForPA]
[https://chrisforpa.com]

Paid for by Chris Deluzio for Congress
Chris Deluzio for Congress
PO Box 16210
Pittsburgh, PA 15242
United States

Hello,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now.
I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service.
In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa.
There’s one reason: **Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate.**
Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley.
I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. **We’re just days away from our most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask:**
[**Please, will you give $5, $25, or whatever you can afford right now – before our critical mid-month deadline – to help me defeat Chuck Grassley and protect our Democratic Senate majority?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39639919/320752626/-42398318?refcode=em20211213pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDI4MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxMGYwZTg2Yy02ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=TCfsO5QNK71l2A7o-dRbQvp5kGsXRwvHanrOlGI8tG8=)

clean_body: Hello, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to make a donation to my campaign against Chuck Grassley and help me protect our Democratic Senate majority. But before I do, let me explain why your donation to turn Iowa’s Senate seat blue is so important right now. I am a hard target for a GOP attack ad. I was born and raised in rural northwest Iowa, and I served our country for nearly 4 decades in the U.S. Navy. From enlisting on scholarship in college to retiring as a three-star Admiral, none of that matters because the GOP’s Super PACs will drum up a misleading ad and even attack my service. In my last election, Super PACs spent millions of dollars against me. And this time, Mitch McConnell and his billionaire buddies are raising even more to spin lying tales about me on TVs all across Iowa. There’s one reason: Mitch McConnell is alarmed because I’m the guy who can defeat Chuck Grassley and turn Iowa blue. I’m it. And if I do win, Democrats will hold onto our Democratic majority in the Senate. Iowa was one of the closest Senate races in 2020, and the latest poll from the Des Moines Register shows a paltry 27% of Iowa voters want to reelect Grassley. I’m happy for the fight ahead, but I’m not taking money from corporate PACs. Instead, I’m counting on grassroots donors like you to give now if we’re going to win and turn Iowa blue. We’re just days away from our most important mid-month fundraising deadline yet, and right now we’re still very short of our $50,000 goal. So I have to ask: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = No amount you can give is too small. Every dollar counts in hitting our goal and ensuring we have the resources to fight back against all the Super PAC lies. Thank you for being a part of this campaign, Mike Franken, VADM, U.S. Navy (ret.) clean_body: | | | | The Establishment is nervous. Friend, An independent poll shows that our campaign is leading Liz Cheney by 18 points! We are ready to take our country back, take power out of Washington, DC, and return it to the people. The momentum is on our side, and together we are going to WIN this campaign. But we can’t get complacent now. Liz Cheney is building a huge war chest with the help of her wealthy friends in DC and Northern Virginia. I promise to always put your interests first. Instead of fighting President Trump and joining Nancy Pelosi’s side, I will do the exact opposite; I will work for you. Join my Team Today, and we will take our country back. Thank you, Team Hageman | | | |

Hi there, folks, I’m reaching out today because our race just got moved closer to being a toss-up. Martin suggested I shoot you a note because **this race is even less secure than we originally thought.** Look, we never thought this was going to be an easy race. But, with our Republican opponents already running misleading attack ads about me all over Colorado and with the National Republican Senate Committee raising more than $75 million, this year alone, to take back seats like mine, we need to gear up faster than we originally planned. Now, I’m not here to fool you with fake astronomical goals or beg you for a donation because the “sky is falling!” That’s not how I do things. But I will be honest with you: we have a razor-thin, one-seat majority in the Senate right now and if we lose even a single seat, Mitch McConnell will be back in charge obstructing all the progress we’ve made this year. **So I’m asking (not begging! name: Nancy Pelosi
subject: This is important, Peter.
body:
If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez.
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39640628/320755336/-999108642?refcode=bpi-email-LaunchEmaillogo&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxMmYzOC02YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xB8aG62c2DR84Amzu2JqJstf92tY-U3yBMSL0Ju3Ac=)

Peter,

I value your time, so I’ll make this quick. Republicans across the country are pulling out all the stops to reclaim what they lost in 2020 – introducing a record 400 voter suppression bills to silence the people and spending millions to spread misinformation and threaten our Majority.

We’re facing tough battles in 2022, and the truth is: If we want to expand our Majority and ensure our progressive values are protected from Republican attacks, we need your help to flip governor’s offices. **We have a huge opportunity to do that in Maryland – if we can elect Tom Perez.**

**[Tom is a tireless fighter for the people, and I’m proud to endorse him. Now, I’m asking you to join me: Will you chip in $7, or whatever you can, to power Tom’s campaign and help send him to Annapolis to fight for our progressive values?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39640629/320755337/-1798052515?refcode=bpi-em-20211213-nancyendorse-ND-resend&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxMmYzOC02YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xB8aG62c2DR84Amzu2JqJstf92tY-U3yBMSL0Ju3Ac=)**

I worked closely with Tom when he led President Obama’s Labor Department, the Justice Department’s Civil Rights Division and the Democratic National Committee, so trust me when I say that he will be the leader Maryland needs to push for progressive change and deliver. Tom is a compassionate leader, a great listener, and someone who isn’t afraid to do the hard work governing requires.

I know that if Marylanders elect Tom, he’ll uphold our shared values – ensuring health care is affordable, workers have a voice, justice is equal under the law, and education is accessible for Maryland’s kids regardless of ZIP code.

**Unfortunately, sending Tom to Annapolis won’t be easy. His race is a “TOSS-UP”, and Marylanders have elected Republicans to the governor’s office in three out of the last five elections.**

**[So, I’m asking: Please chip in what you can to support Tom’s campaign and flip Maryland from red to blue. Grassroots supporters like you won us the House, the Senate, and the White House – and you’re what will make the difference in this race.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39640636/320755344/-1798052515?refcode=bpi-em-20211213-nancyendorse-ND-resend&amount=7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTMyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMGQxMmYzOC02YjVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4xB8aG62c2DR84Amzu2JqJstf92tY-U3yBMSL0Ju3Ac=)**

Thank you for your support,

Speaker Nancy Pelosi

Look, I’m going to be honest for a second. Please bear with me.

This month, you’re going to see a lot of emails along the lines of “THIS IS THE BIGGEST FUNDRAISING DEADLINE OF OUR CAMPAIGN.”

You might even get a few of those from us -- sorry!

But I want to take a minute to tell you why. After each quarter we need to release our fundraising numbers. Since we only launched in October, this is the first public release of our entire campaign.

Public means that everyone will see these numbers, and you can bet that our opponent Derrick Van Orden and the Republican National Committee will be particularly interested. It’s a pretty big deal -- if we fall short of our goal, everyone will know.

This month, you’re going to see a lot of emails along the lines of “THIS IS THE BIGGEST FUNDRAISING DEADLINE OF OUR CAMPAIGN.” You might even get a few of those from us -- sorry! But I want to take a minute to tell you why. After each quarter we need to release our fundraising numbers. Since we only launched in October, this is the first public release of our entire campaign. Public means that everyone will see these numbers, and you can bet that our opponent Derrick Van Orden and the Republican National Committee will be particularly interested. It’s a pretty big deal -- if we fall short of our goal, everyone will know. Hello Fellow Conservative -
Americans know that socialism has failed everywhere it has been tried. But few have real experience living under a dictatorship. I do.
**I organized a student uprising in communist Albania and was forced to flee in fear of my life. I came to New York thinking I had escaped socialism for good.**
But thirty years later, because of politicians like Chuck Schumer, New York is slowly slipping towards the same totalitarian government I risked my life to escape.

When I came to New York as a political refugee in the 90's, the state was represented by a Republican Senator and would soon elect a Republican Governor. New York City would even have a Republican Mayor!
**But our state is no longer in such good hands. Chuck Schumer was elected as a moderate Democrat in 1998, but has since become a full-blown leftist.**

clean_body: | | | | Chuck Schumer was elected as a moderate Democrat in 1998, but has since become a full-blown leftist. Hello Fellow Conservative - Americans know that socialism has failed everywhere it has been tried. But few have real experience living under a dictatorship. I do. I organized a student uprising in communist Albania and was forced to flee in fear of my life. I came to New York thinking I had escaped socialism for good. But thirty years later, because of politicians like Chuck Schumer, New York is slowly slipping towards the same totalitarian government I risked my life to escape. | When I came to New York as a political refugee in the 90's, the state was represented by a Republican Senator and would soon elect a Republican Governor. New York City would even have a Republican Mayor! But our state is no longer in such good hands. Chuck Schumer was elected as a moderate Democrat in 1998, but has since become a full-blown leftist. Schumer recently endorsed the Socialist Party candidate for Mayor of Buffalo! The candidate called for seizing the means of production, making Buffalo a sanctuary city, and defunding the police. subject: We need your help!!
body:
Keep the momentum going! Three ways you can help today!

| [ ](http://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=1)
---
Friend -- The campaign for Ralph Rebandt for Michigan Governor is **r-e-v-v-i-n-g** **up!** To keep the momentum going, there are three ways you can help today. **Get Petition Signatures** As of right now, there are _no_ governor candidates officially on the ballot for 2022. Each candidate needs 15,000 signatures to be placed on the ballot. Even Gretchen Whitmer is not officially on the ballot yet. We can help Ralph be the first but we need your help. Please **respond to this email if you are willing to take 10 petition sheets** (each petition sheet has 10 lines for 10 names). That is a total of 100 signatures. You don’t need to get all the signatures yourself. **You can ask nine friends or family members to take one of your petition sheets** and return it to you by January 20th. **Share New Campaign Ad** Share Ralph’s newest ad “Share a Brighter Future this Christmas” with as many people as you can. [https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=dlw8aGSJVUQ](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRafbIRR6TjjT-Dj0JpsBia8&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=2) This video has seen a lot of action and the response has been overwhelming. **Donate** Consider a Christmas Gift to the Ralph Rebandt for Governor Campaign. If each volunteer donated a gift today, it would enable Ralph to reach more people as we close out 2021 and enter the New Year! It’s easy too! Go to [RalphRebandtforGovernor.com](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=3) and click on the donate button.
Ralph Rebandt For Governor · MI 48094, United States
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/unsubscribe?e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=4).
You can also keep up with Ralph Rebandt For Governor on [Twitter](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNOLWyCuYNiwV9ZFyY__b-ZA&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=5) or [Facebook](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6uhbeqVmbeXGs-kYC9NuYd-tJTgdOC5xFCeUG_TRnUZF&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=6).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.ralphrebandtforgovernor.com/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=35c30c37841d37cfa9d73635bc93e640&utm_source=ralphrebandtforgovernor&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=petition_help_ask&n=7), software for leaders.

Peter, I ran for Congress because as a former public school teacher, I wanted to make a difference for our young people.

I want to leave a better, cleaner world for future generations.

I want to ensure a future where zip code and race does not determine a child’s future success.

I want the future of work to allow dignity and rest to our working families.

But now, I have to put all my priorities on hold in order to protect our nation’s most basic foundation – a free democracy.

_Peter, if we let MAGA Republicans take over the House, we’ll lose more than our progressive priorities. We’ll lose our nation as we know it._

[**Peter, with 2022 elections around the corner, this could never be more urgent. I’m raising a critical sum of $5,000 by Wednesday at midnight to save our House majority so we can keep fighting for our progressive priorities. name: Patrick Leahy
subject: I am not going anywhere
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Green Mountain PAC,
body:
I'm as committed as I've ever been to our shared fight for progress.

| [](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/d3mGFgX-3vhp/M1p4NVZWNlcxd1h2ZElKMWZ4TmJJVld6blUzYkdCTDc2WGFLbVRRTVV2UUdaQWJ2MGc2RXd6KzVtNjhtU3Jzdjhra1B4TG9SVUhSUXBrTlpFb28xMU9mUkhJV0JDL0dvWlBXRFpRRlA2YmM9S0/MzZsc25DU1RtQ2luSjN4M1VtNENjYzFaalBMRlBWSFdPK1oxMGNweCt0eHVFZlVaU1cyOTBsOVlXWW4yOHlRYjNzcHJPTHlrdDgwZXJzQ25yYm1qNTlTcy9Lc09tZUlpS0) Friend, I want to thank you once again for your support during my service in the United States Senate. It made all the difference to have you on my side. Though I am not running for reelection in 2022, I am as committed as I have ever been to fighting for our shared Democratic values, including fighting climate change, protecting voting rights, and making economic opportunity a reality for every American. **To be clear: While I will not be on the ballot in 2022, I will do everything in my power to elect fellow Democrats.** You will still get updates on legislative action and on candidates we need to support. Going forward, they will come via my Green Mountain PAC. ******[To kick off this next phase of our work together, I wanted to ask you directly: Will you chip in today toward Green Mountain PAC's "Expand the Senate Majority Fund"? ](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/D_zeS_K7pEH~/M1p4NVZWNlcxd1h2ZElKMWZ4TmJJVld6blUzYkdCTDc2WGFLbVRRTVV2UUdaQWJ2MGc2RXd6KzVtNjhtU3Jzdjhra1B4TG9SVUhSUXBrTlpFb28xMU9mUkhJV0JDL0dvWlBXRFpRRlA2YmM9S0/MzZsc25DU1RtQ2luSjN4M1VtNENjYzFaalBMRlBWSFdPK1oxMGNweCt0eHVFZlVaU1cyOTBsOVlXWW4yOHlRYjNzcHJPTHlrdDgwZXJzQ25yYm1qNTlTcy9Lc09tZUlpS0)** _If you 've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately_ | | [**$10 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
| | [**$25 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/p2Ndcw~rj2Ja/M1p4NVZWNlcxd1h2ZElKMWZ4TmJJVld6blUzYkdCTDc2WGFLbVRRTVV2UUdaQWJ2MGc2RXd6KzVtNjhtU3Jzdjhra1B4TG9SVUhSUXBrTlpFb28xMU9mUkhJV0JDL0dvWlBXRFpRRlA2YmM9S0/MzZsc25DU1RtQ2luSjN4M1VtNENjYzFaalBMRlBWSFdPK1oxMGNweCt0eHVFZlVaU1cyOTBsOVlXWW4yOHlRYjNzcHJPTHlrdDgwZXJzQ25yYm1qNTlTcy9Lc09tZUlpS0)
---
| [**$100 »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/2Wzqc6Gz0~Hj/M1p4NVZWNlcxd1h2ZElKMWZ4TmJJVld6blUzYkdCTDc2WGFLbVRRTVV2UUdaQWJ2MGc2RXd6KzVtNjhtU3Jzdjhra1B4TG9SVUhSUXBrTlpFb28xMU9mUkhJV0JDL0dvWlBXRFpRRlA2YmM9S0/MzZsc25DU1RtQ2luSjN4M1VtNENjYzFaalBMRlBWSFdPK1oxMGNweCt0eHVFZlVaU1cyOTBsOVlXWW4yOHlRYjNzcHJPTHlrdDgwZXJzQ25yYm1qNTlTcy9Lc09tZUlpS0)
---
| | [**OTHER »**](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.)
---
Whatever you can give, I'll be supporting Democratic challengers and incumbents who need it most. Because right now, a 50-50 majority and Mitch McConnell's obstructionism means that Democrats have faced challenge after challenge trying to deliver for the American people.
To protect voting and reproductive rights, make major climate investments, and pass much-needed gun control legislation, we simply need more seats. And to expand our Senate majority in 2022, it's going to take all of us.
**Just like I 'm not going anywhere, I hope you will stick around and continue to join me in our fight for democracy and our great country.**
**[Please chip in right now toward our"Expand the Senate Majority Fund" so we can protect and grow our Senate majority in 2022.](https://links.e.leahyforvermont.com/els/v2/D_zeS_K7pEH~/M1p4NVZWNlcxd1h2ZElKMWZ4TmJJVld6blUzYkdCTDc2WGFLbVRRTVV2UUdaQWJ2MGc2RXd6KzVtNjhtU3Jzdjhra1B4TG9SVUhSUXBrTlpFb28xMU9mUkhJV0JDL0dvWlBXRFpRRlA2YmM9S0/MzZsc25DU1RtQ2luSjN4M1VtNENjYzFaalBMRlBWSFdPK1oxMGNweCt0eHVFZlVaU1cyOTBsOVlXWW4yOHlRYjNzcHJPTHlrdDgwZXJzQ25yYm1qNTlTcy9Lc09tZUlpS0)**
Onward, toward Election Day.
Sincerely,
Patrick Leahy
U.S. Senator

name: Team Cranley
subject: SIGN ON: Say you’re ready to bring an end to corruption in Columbus >>>

body:
The corruption has to end. | Granting kickbacks and benefits to companies that bribe your political allies. Ensuring that some voters have more of a say in our elections than others — so the party in power _remains_ in power. **That’s what’s happening here in Ohio, friend.** The FirstEnergy scandal and Republicans’ gerrymandering tactics are textbook examples of political corruption — something Ohio has become known for thanks to the GOP. **_[John Cranley is ready to clean house in Columbus and reform our state’s government. Are you with him, friend? John Cranley has spent his career working towards creating a fairer, more just world. It's why he founded Ohio’s Innocence Project back in 2003, why he ran for mayor of Cincinnati — the town where he grew up – and why he and his wife, Dena are raising their son to respect the principles of justice, equality, and compassion. **Now, he's running for governor. He's already led a comeback for Cincinnati, and he's ready to lead a comeback for Ohio, too.**
