name: Great America Update
subject: Is socialism on the rise?
body:
Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6670%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2EdYiRBgAQAyz7vGJnmxhQ&sysid=1)
| | |
---
| | This sponsored message from Great America Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68879%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lQKK9RoyAw6lZ4MGH97hzQ&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Fellow American, Socialism appears to be on the rise in our country, especially among the young, and we want to understand the extent of that support. That’s why you have been selected by Hillsdale College to represent your state in a National Survey on Socialism. With your response, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans--views that we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders. Every month, Hillsdale College is reaching millions of Americans with educational outreach. Your response to this National Survey on Socialism is essential in helping us form the most effective strategy in fighting for the future of our country. So please give your views on the political, media, and cultural forces that are promoting socialism in our country today, by completing this National Survey on Socialism: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/2021-national-survey-on-socialism/](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68870%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=8JGgVYNFMj4SFOSRRz9v5Q&sysid=1)** There is no doubt in my mind that, especially among younger Americans, socialism is increasingly attractive--and that this threatens the future of American liberty. As Winston Churchill noted, “Socialism is the philosophy of failure, the creed of ignorance, and the gospel of envy.” And education is the surest way to defeat it. If you agree, please stand with Hillsdale College as we promote intelligent patriotism and defend liberty through education. Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Socialism today. | [**Take the Survey**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c68871%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=5D%2baw%2bGrTZKgHNHl1iZD5g&sysid=1)
---

Warm Regards,
Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---
_107 S West St. #826, Alexandria VA 22314_ _[Unsubscribe](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c6670%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=2EdYiRBgAQAyz7vGJnmxhQ&sysid=1)_

body:
Not only is the National Republican Senatorial Committee running ads against Mark...
#

Friends -
We simply have to be direct today. The request is that urgent:
**[Can you please contribute $3 to Mark Kelly’s campaign today?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-15&t=1&refcode2=1784_6688874_AwGi7Y&akid=1784%2E6688874%2EAwGi7Y)**
We’ve asked before, but things are different today.
The Republican establishment has ramped up their attacks dramatically.
The National Republican Senatorial Committee is running ads against Mark, a far-right group called America Next has joined them, AND a Mitch McConnell-backed super PAC just started running ads against Mark as well. All at the same time.
They have clearly decided now is the time to attack. In force.
Now, I know $3 doesn’t seem like the kind of money that can stand up to attack ads from THREE National Republican groups. But it all adds up. By the time you get to this point in the email, someone has chipped in their $3. Now, they’re hoping you’ll do the same.
Please:
[**Can Mark Kelly count on you to add one more $3 contribution to the donations coming in to help him fight back against these outside attacks? He needs you now.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-15&t=2&refcode2=1784_6688874_AwGi7Y&akid=1784%2E6688874%2EAwGi7Y)

clean_body: You’re going to love him. | Peter, It’s me: Chairman Michael Whatley. I’m glad I reached you. By now, I’m sure you’ve heard that one lucky Republican Patriot is going to win an all-expenses paid trip to meet President Trump. I’ve met President Trump so many times, and every time has been absolutely amazing. Whether I’m on the tarmac at the airport, on stage at a rally, or nominating him for re-election -- meeting President Trump never gets old. | | | | | | Trust me, Peter... this is not an opportunity you want to miss. There’s nothing like meeting President Trump face-to-face, and I want you to have the opportunity to experience it for yourself. But time is running out, and this opportunity won’t come again. Congratulations! Michael Whatley Chairman, North Carolina Republican Party

clean_body: Peter—This is the final call to RSVP your spot for a reception honoring Patrick with special guest TV broadcaster and former advisor to President Trump, Steve Cortes. Steve was a key TV surrogate for Donald Trump 2016, racking up hundreds of TV hits for Team Trump. He has a front row seat to the MAGA movement and knows better than anyone how important this election is! We have extended this exclusive invite to all of our campaign’s best supporters and we want to see you there, Peter. Here are the details: When: Wednesday, December 15, 2020, 6:00 p.m. Where: Millennium Gate Museum, 395 17th St NW, Atlanta, GA 30363 Who: Patrick Witt and** special guest Steve Cortes You can RSVP by contacting Olivia Mitrovich at olivia@mitrovichfinancial.com. Remember, even if you can’t make it in-person, No matter the amount—even $50 goes a long way—you are helping Patrick build his campaign and meet our end-of-year goals. We know Patrick would love to see you and is so grateful for all your support. Best, Team Witt See more details below! \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Patrick Witt Subject: You're invited! To: Dear Peter, I am thrilled to invite you to my fundraiser in Atlanta on Wednesday, December 15 with special guest TV broadcaster and former advisor to President Trump, Steve Cortes. If you would like to attend this event, kindly RSVP to Olivia Mitrovich at mailto:olivia@mitrovichfinancial.com. I would love to see you at my fundraiser, but even if you can’t make it, you can still make a huge impact by donating whatever you can before our end-of-year deadline. Even $10 can make a difference. I’m not kidding—every little bit adds up and helps us reach more voters because we are running a true grassroots campaign. 2021 is coming to an end... That means I have to raise as much money as possible before I submit my end-of-year fundraising report. Come 2022, the grassroots RED WAVE will sweep the nation, and we will drain the Swamp. But I can’t do it without your help, Patrick. Whatever you’re able to give will send a message that we’re in this fight together—to safeguard our elections, secure our border, and take down the radical Left’s attempt to spread wokeism everywhere. Thank you so much for your support, Thank you, Patrick | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Copyright © 2021 Patrick Witt for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Time’s Person of the Year paid $0.00 in federal taxes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
#
Peter,
We can’t believe Time Magazine just named Elon Musk its “Person of the Year.” Musk is the richest person in the world and yet he avoids paying his taxes while working families struggle to put food on the table and pay rent.
**While so many have lost their jobs and health insurance during this pandemic, the rich have only gotten richer and the wealthy have watched their profits skyrocket.** National magazines should be honoring frontline heroes and those working towards a fairer, more just society. Not a billionaire who paid nothing — not a single penny — in federal taxes in 2018.
**Pramila is working alongside Senator Elizabeth Warren on an important bill in Congress — called the Ultra-Millionaire Tax Act — that would make sure the rich pay their fair share.**
[**If we’re going to pass this bill and finally make the wealthiest Americans, including Elon Musk, pay their fair share in taxes, we need you in this fight with us. Chip in $3 or more today to fuel our work to tax the rich and finally make ultra-millionaires and billionaires pay a fair tax rate. It’s time — now let’s make it happen.**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9025?refcode=em20211213-874&%3Bamounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=874%2E420207%2ETgNVku)
**[Chip in $3 »](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9025?refcode=em20211213-874&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=874%2E420207%2ETgNVku)**
This critical legislation will narrow the racial wealth gap, help level the economic playing field in this country, and ensure that the wealthiest finally begin to pay their fair share. It’ll do all of this while investing trillions of dollars into our communities.
Anyone with a net worth of less than $50 million, won’t pay a penny. And billionaires, even if you’re Time’s Person of the Year, will have to FINALLY pay their fair share in taxes. It’s time to tax Elon Musk and all the billionaires in America.
**[If you’re with us on this and support Pramila in the fight to make billionaires pay their taxes, fuel our work with a $3 contribution right now.](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/9025?refcode=em20211213-874&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=874%2E420207%2ETgNVku)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20211213-874-footer&t=22&refcode2=874_420207_TgNVku&akid=874%2E420207%2ETgNVku)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=874%2E420207%2ETgNVku)

name: Team Battino
subject: What you may not know about Gillian...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Battino for U
body:
It’s no secret that we’re big fans of Gillian and believe that she will be the next Senator from Wisconsin, but we wanted to share with you a few things you might not know about her. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642149/320778250/464806879?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=&emci=d6fad420-545c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&emdi=646d04a1-785c-ec11-94f6-0050f2e65e9b&ceid=25515813) | Hey there, It’s no secret that we’re big fans of Gillian and believe that she will be the next Senator from Wisconsin, but we wanted to share with you a few things you might not know about her. _**She’s run 10 marathons.**_ She’s the first to tell you she might not be the fastest, but her determination is what gets her across the finish line. We know that determination will carry her to victory in this campaign. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642150/320778252/1807662573?refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=) _**She loves goats and raised Nigerian Dwarf goats for a decade.**_ You can’t deny how cute they are. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642151/320778254/1807662573?refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=) _**She has used wind, solar, and geothermal energy at her home in central Wisconsin for more than a decade.**_ Investing in these technologies at a large scale can create jobs, help the planet, and save us all money. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642152/320778256/1807662573?refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=) _**Sadly, her father passed away at age 29 from an untreated childhood strep infection.**_ That was a spark that led her to become a radiologist, and is what drives her advocacy for universal health care in America. Here’s her favorite picture of her mother and father. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642153/320778258/1807662573?refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-graphic-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=) **Gillian has been through hardship, overcome adversity, and uses her skills and story to better the lives of everyone she touches. [Now that you know more about Gillian, we hope you’ll join us in supporting her campaign for U.S. Senate by making a contribution today. Together, we can send her to Washington as the first female physician Senator fighting to win Medicare for All.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642154/320778261/1807662573?refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-SL-Other-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=22&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=)** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to defeat Ron Johnson and elect the first Democratic woman physician to the U.S. Senate will go through immediately:_ | **[$3](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642155/320778263/882323132?express_lane=true&refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-EG-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=)** | **[$5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642156/320778265/882323132?express_lane=true&refcode=E12916-20211213-FunFacts-EG-RegTemplate-NA-NA&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTQzOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDZkMDRhMS03ODVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aMFookOsL1OmLDu2IQD4x0HDI7iLo-UEkyRA1Z7Isqs=)**

She’s run 10 marathons. She’s the first to tell you she might not be the fastest, but her determination is what gets her across the finish line. We know that determination will carry her to victory in this campaign. = She loves goats and raised Nigerian Dwarf goats for a decade. You can’t deny how cute they are. = She has used wind, solar, and geothermal energy at her home in central Wisconsin for more than a decade. Investing in these technologies at a large scale can create jobs, help the planet, and save us all money. = Sadly, her father passed away at age 29 from an untreated childhood strep infection. That was a spark that led her to become a radiologist, and is what drives her advocacy for universal health care in America. body:
Steve Scalise just activated a 3x contribution match until midnight for every Patriot who steps up to save the Supreme Court AND our Conservative Majority.
**STOP AND READ THIS:** Bloomberg just dropped this headline and it sent shivers down our spines...
Supreme Court Expansion Clamor
Resumes as Biden Commission Wraps
This is the moment everybody has been waiting for.
**Biden 's court-packing commission just released their final report and Democrats are PLOWING AHEAD with a plot to pack the Supreme Court.**
So we'll cut to the chase: Steve Scalise just activated a [**triple contribution match until midnight**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005817:6F34l6EN3:m:1:3253819041:84870831D1DCE0AFDB1DA291C56B78D8:r) for every Patriot who steps up to save the Supreme Court AND our Conservative Majority at this critical moment.
Will you hold the line, or will you let Democrats destroy what President Trump fought so hard to build?
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005817:6F34l6EN3:m:1:3253819041:84870831D1DCE0AFDB1DA291C56B78D8:r)
[**Triple Match My $100 ->**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005818:6F34l6EN3:m:1:3253819041:84870831D1DCE0AFDB1DA291C56B78D8:r)

**Everything Conservatives believe in is at stake in this fight.**
If Democrats get away with packing the Supreme Court, we're doomed. Pro-Life laws will be put in immediate danger... Election integrity laws will be reversed... Our Second Amendment rights will be reduced to nothing... And President Trump's legacy will be destroyed...
So we're asking for your help ONE FINAL TIME before it's too late:
[**LAST CALL: Will you step up to save the Supreme Court and get triple matched?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/59005817:6F34l6EN3:m:1:3253819041:84870831D1DCE0AFDB1DA291C56B78D8:r)

subject: Sully vs. Lori Lightfoot
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois |
body:
We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | |
---
Team,

Here's what you might have missed last week.

**🥊 SULLY VS. LORI LIGHTFOOT**

Lori Lightfoot sent out a campaign fundraising email hitting Sully for calling attention to Chicago’s crime epidemic. Astonishing, right? She claimed he didn’t have the facts to back up his claims of rising crime.

Team Sully responded in a BIG way. We’re calling it now ➡ Sully: 1, Lori Lightfoot: 0
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=af88df4a9a854490a61aac31db8482a6&_e=0Hl3I4q9DNaNgOMEpfqX1wdGpTZf4Y8s_klI892bzi-0YVHV86G7_ONfz2xwF03lFA_kJJL-FegYpT0qQd54ywEqiN3nnn-XZR4wmXIXxUC2AMm7YyxaB6M4cHLPzOkwLK5aABoWDHsgwxA9EhUBSW3NIy1eP3x9Q-VyPdIXL_yth9cw-ITFJCSqjwQl4vvoXFAg2mLV0dYY-x9_ffH26K90uHA4pbqovdp2Hr8yMkiG7jaEDf0Ix35pDhOCmMubfY7K3gVIun99oa3e4kYtLdfm7erPZHYI_0Zys1gUn5jvNZkMKCxAU5C0n16U-xlK_ILHupq0qOl4q--Ig2iI25FhRAO67Y0YItTDE8VM-uhN8hdRNO86WuwKjuXKTgMVU8YLcYo3m7XRs3RdoGWs7pRSUAArYOO0AUAl-VHCPK6ff7EdpuYZbMI5ghKGsJWamgifFUko0kzCLGQZZdiID7ix2e9fOMmkXrfSTKLyTJb5ifzRK_4eK-1HK0bOir-z)
[**See the Fact Check Here**](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=af88df4a9a854490a61aac31db8482a6&_e=0Hl3I4q9DNaNgOMEpfqX1wdGpTZf4Y8s_klI892bzi-0YVHV86G7_ONfz2xwF03lFA_kJJL-FegYpT0qQd54ywEqiN3nnn-XZR4wmXIXxUC2AMm7YyxaB6M4cHLPzOkwLK5aABoWDHsgwxA9EhUBSW3NIy1eP3x9Q-VyPdIXL_yth9cw-ITFJCSqjwQl4vvoXFAg2mLV0dYY-x9_ffH26K90uHA4pbqovdp2Hr8yMkiG7jaEDf0Ix35pDhOCmMubfY7K3gVIun99oa3e4kYtLdfm7erPZHYI_0Zys1gUn5jiOiYinp4Cci-l-vnnT0E30gk9eDbSmr7r0c456m7fQiVB634rUUkVONFW7v2EZFh6PiSGRSRIRFiXuiaRmp2jra_ouqXqa_7GS6HlTqA0o4afY8TWMRYbNGDc60QSq9OZNtNY3cYGTHHfYhyxo3en1zv8arfl3U6TTvD9OKLkkeY4hekBBZpY0I8LsYCPSUGjujtU-UDO6y7PnY52iZKs)
📲 **SULLY** **ON SOCIAL**

As Christmas grows closer, we’re reflecting on the reason for the season. Whether it’s stopping in at the [48th Annual DuPage County Prayer Breakfast](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=af88df4a9a854490a61aac31db8482a6&_e=0Hl3I4q9DNaNgOMEpfqX12xawoPuKU91h4cz2w-uC6vW-cFfNgmF_O1qmorG4OoEc3SUrlRvk3Ns_x5TD-rsS35Rw9qUwRFdswNp8C3PRTqsosOjKnCzq5e2cny0Wr_Vmi38smJv2ibm3EjnS6QAnDU2RpAzff7GrVVwLRaQZFYhMbKaJVCXSAOx-djYNnkTEvxCVhvULvTpEazFfgmSynQv34vpATEYISXcLJI5XA1ldAkAB_PFAkzk2GC92UF3Q_qgMcH6ee2lsrZJmw1oj2AaHA5uShAVeEdC3ZMENTAgKg8OaeVnZbaJ9KbhTb5zFvW1wNZXLCfjNre_B_0b6q2MJSxrOuevYdmNZvSMRcOkquRHVgd0-o07DHnRM1vJFIt_Pqzfiq8kWpecuInEf5OLihStJuuA7rYBg6kmOZK7ERh75COEsY7IUuUJXuvZ80vRUe9z4uxJq8oKp4k-2O0zJWtOQjEpnQ2UdZuZ8kA%3D) or visiting the cross at Cross Roads in Effington, know that you - and all of Illinois - are in the Sully Fam’s prayers this holiday season.
[](http://links.team-sully.com/u/click?_t=76f7546524874789b286c588bf600eda&_m=af88df4a9a854490a61aac31db8482a6&_e=0Hl3I4q9DNaNgOMEpfqX12xawoPuKU91h4cz2w-uC6trlh08eQdt36WZk3xzpXfxJdYzL-4BwUu83lqxituTL6Cb3a-i9My5oQxdtNLj3iZCszHSREJu7feDv27WaP_Z4oWPX18h1tPxfj-yD5W3Bc21yvYYGTUClvYn7hwO2cb1qrGfJ4cBb_XIoJCThfhjZaIKAFRcjTKeCCUNKBoZyJXNjM4UvsLQz1tevm3LVyccLYS6C8N90gLYeQUDNNjXlb7fExLkSslT9t8G6Beg8KVjqarxnikdaIZ-Cap8EBn1ZgpHVn3hV0C2tN_TpQTASLTtoQQ-8QbLmT25yVXhlfd5mBn8ru63ugxUjFAgH8vtsrK07s0379HygYlm53bYGqSaSOJTR-AB72yDKPvHdbDhH0GVBT1aI5vvifCZcpLRR8s5OaQMzEznhBFN0NMoqzKbME2VmxAALnUpfC2y7FiajpllEYxorhODR0zQ7V8%3D)

**📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK**

As of last Wednesday, it has officially been 23 months since Chicago went a day without a shooting or a homicide.

clean_body: We're back with another edition of our weekly recap email. Here's what Sully and the team have been up to! | | Team, Here's what you might have missed last week. 🥊 SULLY VS. LORI LIGHTFOOT Lori Lightfoot sent out a campaign fundraising email hitting Sully for calling attention to Chicago’s crime epidemic. Astonishing, right? She claimed he didn’t have the facts to back up his claims of rising crime. Team Sully responded in a BIG way. We’re calling it now ➡ Sully: 1, Lori Lightfoot: 0 📲 SULLY ON SOCIAL As Christmas grows closer, we’re reflecting on the reason for the season. Whether it’s stopping in at the or visiting the cross at Cross Roads in Effington, know that you - and all of Illinois - are in the Sully Fam’s prayers this holiday season. 📊 ILLINOIS FACT OF THE WEEK As of last Wednesday, it has officially been 23 months since Chicago went a day without a shooting or a homicide. Thanks for catching up with us, -Team Sully | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Sullivan for Illinois | | 111 E Douglas St, Petersburg, IL 62675 | | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com | | |

name: Donna Imam
subject: A dark day in Texas.
body:
A dark era for Texans reproductive healthcare, some Texans will have no reproductive care. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642340/320780748/-573335974?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGI4ZDJhNC03OTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chtC0K_qPIjMLMAF5LdB__JcdURUWcWKmgcdN092Kvk=)
**"This is a dark day"**
_\- The Texas Tribune_
It's a dark day in Texas, friend.

**The US Supreme Court ruled Friday that Texas' new law that almost completely bans reproductive healthcare for those who are unable to travel outside of Texas will remain in place.**

Texas' SB 8 places a $10,000 bounty on anyone who aids someone seeking reproductive healthcare. The heinous part of the law is that it encourages Texans to turn in their neighbors in exchange for cold hard cash. It's not what Texas is about, and we must work to end it as quickly as possible.

**This is what happens when the Texas GOP is allowed free reign over our state government and the stakes in our federal race could not be higher.**

We need to win our Democratic-leaning Austin district in order to advance the solutions to ensure we get healthcare coverage -- including reproductive healthcare coverage -- available to every Texan regardless of who they are, their ability to afford to travel, and where they live in Texas. That's why I'm asking:

**[We're just about half way through the month, and we're not quite half of the way to our end-of-month goal. Will you chip in $50, $15, or even $5 to help me pick up the pace? Everything you give goes toward turning more Democrats out in our Democratic district to defeat the Texas GOP.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/39642341/320780749/1898666321?refcode=em-121321-all-b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NjQ2OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiNGI4ZDJhNC03OTVjLWVjMTEtOTRmNi0wMDUwZjJlNjVlOWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chtC0K_qPIjMLMAF5LdB__JcdURUWcWKmgcdN092Kvk=)**

Thanks in advance,

Donna

subject: 2 weeks with Covid, now he’s behind
disclaimer_text: Paid for by AADLAND for Senate
body:
I have bad news Peter, my husband Erik caught Covid and now he’s behind.
**I don’t know if you’ve heard or not Peter, but Erik caught covid along with myself and our kids.**

Thankfully the kids and I didn’t have any issues, but it really knocked Erik on his back for the past 2 weeks. He's getting back into the swing of things, _**but now he’s 2 weeks behind in fundraising.**_

I know I’ve never reached out to you before, so this is a first for me, but I need your help to get Erik back in the saddle. [**Will you pitch in just $10 or even $20 to help Erik get back to where he needs to be?**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=795da7b36e9a4f9482e13f0532e081e9&_e=8MhPbJovgOWXNez9TRl2kJq8pj70txC40Mc4FJalKr5PN4EG1AiWTY9RWqpCu_CHgZvDFeo5PiDc3WWy1j-w7HnNImeuxN-FRQ555NoKDpCSQOFPpJkC42ERKZgz61mwdr5NXo9_UGaIJoHeFyQFMWq-jRGn6XdhYN5iSKnc92mSGM59OXmAztuhkH0Zj0NKzHnhIXK33gBIT-wmGDycgJ_uj13PKRacqq1B4qAg9LE6b3uymnBK-eDEI1ATFN2maRpCEw50yLE1BSEyMa1irJSvneNQUOWCuCUA_QwcXbJJvRKQqCMvoYxJWcUyyxfoW1GMz13oJIFR_zMVKjcGA8yV4s3ocwWq2zh4AmPe6m7chW17sX1B23jhkrY_yE-0ShY-lVeNajxf_t3RZ4Y4HIo_EAH_QIJ-aVpiYK1pqGY%3D)

[**PITCH IN $20 >> HELP ERIK CATCH UP FROM COVID**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=795da7b36e9a4f9482e13f0532e081e9&_e=8MhPbJovgOWXNez9TRl2kJq8pj70txC40Mc4FJalKr5PN4EG1AiWTY9RWqpCu_CHgZvDFeo5PiDc3WWy1j-w7HnNImeuxN-FRQ555NoKDpCSQOFPpJkC42ERKZgz61mwdr5NXo9_UGaIJoHeFyQFMWq-jRGn6XdhYN5iSKnc92mSGM59OXmAztuhkH0Zj0NKzHnhIXK33gBIT-wmGDycgJnTc3x_Ntv0TDKsfpBRsv66EO9zkGFuqamdfmVJI4SrouWq4qHR229hcS8cjUjzr5CgZovqqV2JtjnYOvd1ndZGkO9ppeU-IwqmW2Gruhf8HfpfdIVnY9onhXbYTRdCN7Nswwhf4DrySaZ7Nse4d4H3nTZmOeYA-nqv-69Vo7Z7A0puaEq5EswnPIr71lSxmHcMAyzURdWPQ5C_INl7jCI%3D)
[**PITCH IN ANYTHING >> HELP ERIK CATCH UP FROM COVID**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=795da7b36e9a4f9482e13f0532e081e9&_e=8MhPbJovgOWXNez9TRl2kJq8pj70txC40Mc4FJalKr5PN4EG1AiWTY9RWqpCu_CHgZvDFeo5PiDc3WWy1j-w7HnNImeuxN-FRQ555NoKDpCSQOFPpJkC42ERKZgz61mwdr5NXo9_UGaIJoHeFyQFMWq-jRGn6XdhYN5iSKnc92mSGM59OXmAztuhkH0Zj0NKzHnhIXK33gBIT-wmGDycgMpeybdv9dLwtSb5O-oIqYX-esYlBsyV4_8myAFXQawgkrCz1YK14qUuU3aa_zUAABHW9sYS_19jh4E0GJd1pQ4BeJwlBhKTY5o0jp9HH0u1XrfGNDX7zhM98htDIRq42TZVdsrxKCrryotRat1HJvQeCUQRIDGC-UsTLDRx8w51IbJrUv8KpgEQ2-GbinJoidYnaNbkSbzC2SzsUe-2DSw%3D)
**I know it’s a lot to ask, but Erik needs your help right now.** Winning back Colorado and the Majority in the U.S. Senate isn’t going to be easy, but it’s so critical right now if we really want to win our country back so we can start serving the people again, instead of politicians.

I know Erik can be a hard-working super soldier, but he’s human just like the rest of us, and **losing those 2 weeks while being stuck in bed the whole time really hurt his numbers.** That’s why if you’re able to, [**please pitch in anything to help Erik so we can get this show back on the road to winning the U.S. Senate and flipping Colorado back to red.**](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=795da7b36e9a4f9482e13f0532e081e9&_e=8MhPbJovgOWXNez9TRl2kJq8pj70txC40Mc4FJalKr5PN4EG1AiWTY9RWqpCu_CHgZvDFeo5PiDc3WWy1j-w7HnNImeuxN-FRQ555NoKDpCSQOFPpJkC42ERKZgz61mwdr5NXo9_UGaIJoHeFyQFMWq-jRGn6XdhYN5iSKnc92mSGM59OXmAztuhkH0Zj0NKzHnhIXK33gBIT-wmGDycgKMNVs35ePuysvW9dBSLIn1oFJxmummbO9jlX5qAPnedi4XIKq5wfIQl_TDtM8gobG9NAx5CHpXRqyfUGn-eYahmYMfKei3wDyxOZss2MYKYjIRZ_zKX-JIvA6HuNet59yMHDu6ZFn0u0dnszeZLErFKhmPV5qlK45jo-kFEUYboFYXLDXW04q7OCjiIIRlg9-VkV60bwuVqfOnBXJvnqz0%3D)

**It's the little things that count these days, and right now just a little bit of help would go a long way for Erik, even if it’s just a prayer.** With that being said, I’m grateful for your time and for everything you’ve done to support Erik on his campaign for the U.S. Senate, it truly means a lot to him and our family.

Thank you for any help you’re able to give and Merry Christmas to you and your family,

-Megan Aadland

| | | Fourteen oil and gas industry PACs have given over _$350,000_ to 40 House Democrats so far this year.

[](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmvtz74oD3ZjeJMKGoVFif2mDnLPOkKD8krwPMZerJtuByvuZ5Rsk6lHeo1W-U_vjeSSKO7druaQ13TdfCHTmbZC7if2pDsOzNnCdMEGbWkuPjabGkW4KTvuwAZP_hxY3JNx6vLSQmbc2OCc-9-IQ4wRge8oku2Yy5I6TZljhDeKISc0vIeyE5xx2D7cjKYwrSBCcrMBBtTxGIBP6sh_5IXyRHUYDZQU20Gchv2u041s3eu-4vSk3FU070GzzDHAMTWjwov3eDpoz75YRpqWIBoyikLKG7h3_T34QgOnhNuFLNSrKGRrLUmrZ7EFCR9W3u0vX5bEq6QSg6OHsLKoGmfgjyjQnUlR2B2EgLUxM8tJ2a5bPQygtkDSscTA9bknkzZP26JwCzgrmPL1orJgpM6wgkG_QEtOnMjbutzqUrKap8vWNcRn6r0yxlFldgpHTp2cnGf6-S7uzjy5WpQEi5VQFjMROqduZy0qkC4XGRtBH6Ww6n4FaYEef0hmCj-mWuARjpUwA8Mipm3qeKmNcN1F2imEIYiLPl7w62tr055-10GkBwR2MMl0DYswMcx55lZHapIe6B2WRIawpXMRErqVEcs7pxN415A4QdPNILpmlWb94Nipd55ubT19gXoPn9gKDedl7HY0ETxp68pibJF_hwXcHQtz0HvRTTJIsKwMw/3ht/9FekAeTSQPW0MZuca5bA5g/h0/Hh-1IA0skKSgbKMdIWVLuKYFkkpn-JR6bWZxk4mh7FA)
**Progressive Melanie D’Arrigo isn’t taking fossil fuel PAC money — or any corporate lobbyist money. Stand with her and fight back against the lobbyists who put profit over people and the planet.
**
[**Sign the petition: The Senate must pass a Build Back Better Act that invests in climate solutions right now!** ](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmvtz74oD3ZjeJMKGoVFif2mDnLPOkKD8krwPMZerJtuByvuZ5Rsk6lHeo1W-U_vjeSSKO7druaQ13TdfCHTmbZC7if2pDsOzNnCdMEGbWkuPjabGkW4KTvuwAZP_hxY3JNx6vLSQmbc2OCc-9-IQ4wRge8oku2Yy5I6TZljhDeKISc0vIeyE5xx2D7cjKYwrSBCcrMBBtTxGIBP6sh_5IXyRHUYDZQU20Gchv2u041s3eu-4vSk3FU070GzzDHAMTWjwov3eDpoz75YRpqWIBoyikLKG7h3_T34QgOnhNuFLNSrKGRrLUmrZ7EFCR9W3u0vX5bEq6QSg6OHsLKoGmfgjyjQnUlR2B2EgLUxM8tJ2a5bPQygtkDSscTA9bknkzZP26JwCzgrmPL1orJgpM6wgkG_QEtOnMjbutzqUrKamOGXnj8Yvb7Ftff-hyJT23w6JXomq8ROHJ1CLUjh6zoCEnA3a_AHuw6EKan7u5lQ0otc7Lg6mzqG4_ZiVoAk8M3dfp4YfTh7mn0nfQhwig-3Q4XAg1ifDHyrUOpOh44w4VNtpK1Jl9GI9vWWbfQvwQCWDohrcDcAWRJNNdRz8TiRE4C0mGuMKgVXz5q8j4Bqyw5G1rsHLi3MAX9w2XIVXjwRmzEdk0Yp9wSdo5nsSRFWl9jrDzTSODEsYKgfwG_EA/3ht/9FekAeTSQPW0MZuca5bA5g/h1/fJke_Gm2lRsOKZsVxfttTKaV1Z78OVMyVgbVNUd8Dog)
Over the last 30 years, the oil and gas industry has given over _$350 million_ to members of Congress while spending billions more on climate denial propaganda. Now, the fossil fuel industry is spending historic amounts of money to kill the Build Back Better Act which includes the largest investment in climate action in U.S. history
Let’s be very clear: Fossil fuel lobbyists are bribing members of Congress so they can continue destroying our planet for profit.
And there are some corporate Democrats who are all too willing to go along with it.
We’re up against powerful special interests, but we will not give up on a livable planet for our children. We have the collective power to defeat the corrupt corporate influence that has broken Congress.
**Join Melanie in the fight to STOP lobbyists that use legalized bribery to protect their profits.**
******[Add your name to the petition now! Tell the Senate to fight for the solutions that meet the moment of the climate crisis we face by passing Build Back Better.](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmvtz74oD3ZjeJMKGoVFif2mDnLPOkKD8krwPMZerJtuByvuZ5Rsk6lHeo1W-U_vjeSSKO7druaQ13TdfCHTmbZC7if2pDsOzNnCdMEGbWkuPjabGkW4KTvuwAZP_hxY3JNx6vLSQmbc2OCc-9-IQ4wRge8oku2Yy5I6TZljhDeKISc0vIeyE5xx2D7cjKYwrSBCcrMBBtTxGIBP6sh_5IXyRHUYDZQU20Gchv2u041s3eu-4vSk3FU070GzzDHAMTWjwov3eDpoz75YRpqWIBoyikLKG7h3_T34QgOnhNuFLNSrKGRrLUmrZ7EFCR9W3u0vX5bEq6QSg6OHsLKoGmfgjyjQnUlR2B2EgLUxM8tJ2a5bPQygtkDSscTA9bknkzZP26JwCzgrmPL1orJgpM6wgkG_QEtOnMjbutzqUrKatxpvUzRAkwG0jGj3DMofJ6jpILITbK8vxSnvS7Lv0cNdnQ6__QXxD98j3vVkazcE_WWW8i_Z3XyD7LOb_4IgBh4uxbFgkqSAsyUHjpQMrsnYRPAPx-Y6Lhfa3mz6xM4LKDcBZivcZLt-GvKW8IHY5v71JokgSOqCI6x--Yj_IxI1FVo9UtCuTfEVOLnMvru67LADKGLc_l7lFh4XerCiVQ03jq10yf1YeY4A12yc7ZeR9P-nAUWqDiom7caUHWsjg/3ht/9FekAeTSQPW0MZuca5bA5g/h2/zaRe_B5tTvJlS8T8KA4Pr1zgGWBq3CyPQcrXSAXArS4)**

Over the last 30 years, the oil and gas industry has given over $350 million to members of Congress while spending billions more on climate denial propaganda. Now, the fossil fuel industry is spending historic amounts of money to kill the Build Back Better Act which includes the largest investment in climate action in U.S. history Let’s be very clear: Fossil fuel lobbyists are bribing members of Congress so they can continue destroying our planet for profit. And there are some corporate Democrats who are all too willing to go along with it. We’re up against powerful special interests, but we will not give up on a livable planet for our children. We have the collective power to defeat the corrupt corporate influence that has broken Congress. Join Melanie in the fight to STOP lobbyists that use legalized bribery to protect their profits. **** Thanks for standing up for the future of our planet. \-- D’Arrigo for Congress | is a mother of three and healthcare advocate running for New York's 3rd District on Medicare for All and the Green New Deal. Our movement isn't taking a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we need your support. If you’d rather contribute by check, feel free to make the check out to the following address: Friends of Melanie Darrigo P.O. Box 312 Port Washington, NY 11050 Paid for by Friends of Melanie Darrigo | | Sent via . To update your email address, change your name or address, or to stop receiving emails from Melanie D'Arrigo, please .

name: Tim Ryan
subject: They’re damn right
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Ohio
body:
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/46?t=1001&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ][IMG]

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1015&amount=25&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]'All the time he’s talking about workers'- Donald Trump'He's going to make it
about blue collar workers' - JD Vance

Donald Trump and JD Vance are attacking me for... talking about workers?

Folks, they’re damn right I’m always talking about workers—that’s who I
answer to. Because if you’re not helping workers, you don’t deserve to
represent them.

My GOP opponents think that’s a bad thing. While I’m focused on making
life better for hardworking Ohioans, they’re focused on helping their rich
buddies get ahead and hoping that if we’re lucky, the crumbs will trickle
down to places like Youngstown, Ohio.

Expanding our Democratic Senate majority is our best chance to cut workers
in on the deal, and it could all come down to flipping this seat. [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6255?t=1007&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Can
you chip in $25, or whatever you can, so we can go toe-to-toe with my GOP
opponents and expand our Senate majority?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1016&amount=25&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1017&amount=50&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $50
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1018&amount=100&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $100 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1019&amount=200&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $200
[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1020&amount=250&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $250 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1021&amount=25&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Other Amount

The GOP and their rich corporate backers have kept workers on the outside
looking in for far too long.

They’re terrified because they know that when we flip this Senate seat
blue and give Ohio the most pro-worker delegation in the Senate, their
free ride will be over. Expanding our Democratic majority means we can
make real progress for hardworking Ohioans, instead of doling out more tax
breaks for the top 1%.

The billionaires and millionaires trying to put their thumbs on the scale
in this race are dumping cash into Ohio trying to buy this seat—but they
have nothing on this grassroots team.

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6255?t=1008&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Will you make a grassroots donation right now to show my GOP opponents
and their ultra-rich backers that this Senate seat isn’t for sale—it
belongs to Ohioans?

[ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1022&amount=25&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $25 [ https://act.timforoh.com/go/6256?t=1010&amount=50&akid=1722%2E3611125%2EvDsaAY ]Donate $50

Thanks for standing with me.

Tim

name: Christie
subject: I've selected you to represent Pennsylvania >>
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| [](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)
---
Hi Friend -- I'm Christie Roberts and I'm the Executive Director of the DSCC. **That means it's my job to develop the Democratic Party's strategy to protect and expand our Senate majority.**

As you know, our majority is perilously thin and we can't afford to make _any_ mistakes. So I am inviting a few trusted Democrats from each state to join my personal Focus Group to help _perfect_ our strategy **\-- and I chose you specifically!**

[**I'm standing by to review your responses, so please click here to enter my focus group immediately >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)

_*Note: I need to review your responses by tomorrow morning, so please don't wait!_

I helped guide Raphael Warnock's campaign and I cannot overstate how crucial this community's support and input were to our victories in Georgia. That's why I chose you for this exclusive opportunity -- I'm _100%_ confident your insights will drastically improve our strategy.

[**So please, will you accept this invitation to join my personal focus group before tonight's deadline?**](https://go.dscc.org/go/4520?ask=5&t=6&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-Christie-jtk1546-ChristieFocusGroupWelcome1Test-Pros-sl1&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)

| **DPWILLIS67@GMAIL.COM**
**Focus Group Status: OPEN**
---

Thanks for all you do! I am eagerly awaiting your responses.

Christie Roberts
Executive Director, DSCC

* If you've recently responded or done so with a different email address, thank you! Online records may not be up to date, but don't worry -- your responses have been recorded.
* * *
The DSCC is the only committee solely dedicated to supporting Democrats in the U.S. Senate, and our work relies on grassroots supporters like you. If you'd like to make a contribution to support us, please **[click here](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/support-senate-democrats-2021-q4?refcode=DPE-footer&t=1&refcode2=2223_9716520_5nsiUi&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)**.

**[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)** to receive fewer emails. **[Click here](https://go.dscc.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=2223%2E9716520%2E5nsiUi)** to unsubscribe.

Contributions or gifts to the DSCC are not tax deductible.

name: Joe Knopp
subject: I’m Joe Knopp, The Outsider Ohio Needs!
body:
I Know that God is Essential, Abortion is Not
| | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkE9vhCAQxT8N3jCKivHgoa27l017aHrqhSDMrlj-WMRu_fbFrdtDEzJk3mN-GZ5sad9ImqiWZCTPSV7Em2RVmve0zghv-rzPGioKVGYmHZXxYLkQKhXOJEMrm6yiZQlVXpGmLnpZ8rKhEAchq8u8T3Q7hDDNqHhA5BjPDGLxkF6V9SA3SNR2JD47jy_uC7x1PsoGIGAdNgkLbqWSPAAeHeAP66YJFcclGGZAqsWgogPDlUaEbuLsFi8gilZoxs2k1XndLRFbri42mvcf460wZVhksxubhQGYW8KsJHjmBuWYBZDzneFsABt--XgdT3Y0L8PbKdrMaiWj8U8cVBwuusOnn9-_u8S3croqrdVM6xjsZVv9lui-a4vqR0TIbYqQW3ikXB-eX4dqnSocMZhbc9g88hRrWCf4e7gz0j0QguruBy-_nbU)
---
| | Friend,

The political elite will probably try to smear me. They will say I’m just some average Joe. But they can’t call me corrupt, career politician, RINO, establishment candidate, or insider.

I’m a Christian and conservative living outside of Dayton with my wife Angie and our 3 children. Just like millions of other Buckeyes, _**we relied on faith to get us through the last couple of years.**_

Before joining the ticket, I was producing Christian films to change hearts. But in 2020, I realized that now it was time to change votes.
---
| | | [ ](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxdkMFvgyAUxv8avGEUqtaDh262WbI0WXbYYReC8Kx0Ag5xrfvrh53dYQl55H0f75fHJ6u8KWUeqYokJE1JSsNNkixOm7xICC-btEnKXFC0SXR8VtqB4UKoWFgddVVBU14KWkBKEqANbLeQZy0vs6KQkFAR9VXn_TAiukPkEM4IYnIQX5RxIBdI0FYkbq3DJ_sFzlgXZA3gce8XCQtupJLcAz5bwB_GDgOih8lrpkGqSSNag-aqRyRfxNFOTkAQjegZ10Ov2nm1RGi5Oplg3n-Ml8KUZoHNbmzmO2B28qOS4JjtlGUGQI53hjUejP_l45f2evx-PtCnt2Az0ysZjH9ip8Iwrfefbny_1pGr5HBRfa_GvAjBnpbVb4muu1aoeECE3KYIuYVHNvPu-Npl85DhgMHc6P3ikcdQ_TzA38OVEa-BEFTUP6arnXA)
---
| | Early on in the pandemic, I would drive past a church near my home that was closed. Apparently, DeWine didn’t think religion was essential and requested services to stop. However, the local abortion clinic was allowed to remain open.

_**How many mothers in crisis went looking for the open arms of a church but only found the cold hearts of abortion providers? **_

That’s why when Jim asked me to be his lieutenant governor, I instantly said yes.

**Ohioans know that God is essential and abortion is NOT.** Under no circumstance in a Renacci-Knopp administration will we ever ask you to give up your first amendment right to the free exercise of religion.

I’ve raised my kids to**do what’s right and leave the consequences to God.** And that’s the same principle I’ll govern with as your lieutenant governor.

Sincerely,

Joe Knopp
Candidate for Lieutenant Governor of Ohio
---
| | [Unsubscribe](http://email.m.jimrenacci.com/c/eJxNjj1vwyAQhn8N3mLBYSAeGNI62bJ07AYYaipwqLGV-t8XW25V6XQf7909envJddvzykvAQAgQWipgVhPNBQbVaqJxyw1FDY71p4-THZUxvjaPWA3SujPD-Mycw61zgjBOe0Ot5YwI1ihVBTnMc8qIXhDcSvwjjIsJdsk2Kh82XNmqmIJ3a-nyorOZfJr9Y8xlXsZD0RbR2-D7guyuX1N-_-6qSfbp6UPwmYvi8-OXWB08icQLAti_AHYv0KyX-9vA1sROBXNSY7xuO3gteV6T_Ts8GPXuc1NF9wN9SGB2)
---

body:
I have bad news Peter, my husband Erik caught Covid and now he’s behind.
**I don’t know if you’ve heard or not Peter, but Erik caught covid along with myself and our kids.**

Thankfully the kids and I didn’t have any issues, but it really knocked Erik on his back for the past 2 weeks. He's getting back into the swing of things, _**but now he’s 2 weeks behind in fundraising.**_

I know I’ve never reached out to you before, so this is a first for me, but I need your help to get Erik back in the saddle. [**Will you pitch in just $10 or even $20 to help Erik get back to where he needs to be?**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2253ce5308c24c8aaff6b8719f267086&_e=iAXU_oR8cbAc3-QO5cqpXULjIpyhpCLIj_N3vOsgrCNpY72e0fWUboZq9yo5irKTtwsuRWfJo1MMza_H1QCpA4mit0PFHY0Rd4ed5Ij6t2MaATstIBTjEIc_Fkbuw0yMDp6L2noQ5AONxMtVXOlbiORsMWEdMoI-XbV16RNfhYg4BeFuXTOTXmJP9Gq9R_G9PS-eFVtqP-cUTcFTji8NYjl3HdwmMsuLNlOELuidjpVznYwAvo1N5MtdDGvbnk27ZnT_xqse1TKdOQQPabsyfEc4cbXR0mr17VZL7AwBrIJVJjWu40ymUVgL0mLDzfph-_bHe9EzaqK0SEb_04CWNqVCzXo5cTVwNvU2qt06FZrCqY3R0YsbR-kgvou4t6nPaMBc6_VDLVyRSOcBGhxbcerOZnb-9sKTIAgHye3QpUw%3D)

[**PITCH IN ANYTHING >> HELP ERIK CATCH UP FROM COVID**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2253ce5308c24c8aaff6b8719f267086&_e=iAXU_oR8cbAc3-QO5cqpXULjIpyhpCLIj_N3vOsgrCNpY72e0fWUboZq9yo5irKTtwsuRWfJo1MMza_H1QCpA4mit0PFHY0Rd4ed5Ij6t2MaATstIBTjEIc_Fkbuw0yMDp6L2noQ5AONxMtVXOlbiORsMWEdMoI-XbV16RNfhYg4BeFuXTOTXmJP9Gq9R_G9PS-eFVtqP-cUTcFTji8NYru5R7Hut-LwtyQKAYs_ZGaEOb2co68wO0HqQqGWo8iywZdEtETf2pwsBlBPp07W32xAs9h_UXFlCQ9jTGKeqfUvBlg3Mg63tOeDSwsLAXItKYIDwfjM73RyOND4-bA5kegw2WRxnBanpAjp1th-GeraRtbUNYESC5WVRGyvPOTdpftTCnWT5u72K6RN-Ihoe7muxknIu7ythBU09UFi2UM%3D)
**I know it’s a lot to ask, but Erik needs your help right now.** Winning back Colorado and the Majority in the U.S. Senate isn’t going to be easy, but it’s so critical right now if we really want to win our country back so we can start serving the people again, instead of politicians.

I know Erik can be a hard-working super soldier, but he’s human just like the rest of us, and **losing those 2 weeks while being stuck in bed the whole time really hurt his numbers.** That’s why if you’re able to, [**please pitch in anything to help Erik so we can get this show back on the road to winning the U.S. Senate and flipping Colorado back to red.**](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=2253ce5308c24c8aaff6b8719f267086&_e=iAXU_oR8cbAc3-QO5cqpXULjIpyhpCLIj_N3vOsgrCNpY72e0fWUboZq9yo5irKTtwsuRWfJo1MMza_H1QCpA4mit0PFHY0Rd4ed5Ij6t2MaATstIBTjEIc_Fkbuw0yMDp6L2noQ5AONxMtVXOlbiORsMWEdMoI-XbV16RNfhYg4BeFuXTOTXmJP9Gq9R_G9PS-eFVtqP-cUTcFTji8NYsHdKeJRXUxny75P3lwPu0TqDict7y9Xpn23sRWaM85NuJrEjQJxUxFjXnE0dulHej6aEMOSZ83bY6HIpWwzsxBSXPf5tfLsBHrOqxWFAzT7unik9SUzf9qOhUadqiGjkGSdVtNxV_qTWQ6UsgV15RIlCE4JdK5VFvfa_Hs2o5g__SxkP8Gu6esG5fiZvoJonmSfSKBG0vsu3eKKIyDlANk%3D)

**It's the little things that count these days, and right now just a little bit of help would go a long way for Erik, even if it’s just a prayer.** With that being said, I’m grateful for your time and for everything you’ve done to support Erik on his campaign for the U.S. Senate, it truly means a lot to him and our family.

Thank you for any help you’re able to give and Merry Christmas to you and your family,

-Megan Aadland

clean_body: I have bad news Peter, my husband Erik caught Covid and now he’s behind. I don’t know if you’ve heard or not Peter, but Erik caught covid along with myself and our kids. Thankfully the kids and I didn’t have any issues, but it really knocked Erik on his back for the past 2 weeks. He's getting back into the swing of things, but now he’s 2 weeks behind in fundraising. I know I’ve never reached out to you before, so this is a first for me, but I need your help to get Erik back in the saddle. I know it’s a lot to ask, but Erik needs your help right now. Winning back Colorado and the Majority in the U.S. Senate isn’t going to be easy, but it’s so critical right now if we really want to win our country back so we can start serving the people again, instead of politicians. I know Erik can be a hard-working super soldier, but he’s human just like the rest of us, and losing those 2 weeks while being stuck in bed the whole time really hurt his numbers. That’s why if you’re able to, It's the little things that count these days, and right now just a little bit of help would go a long way for Erik, even if it’s just a prayer. With that being said, I’m grateful for your time and for everything you’ve done to support Erik on his campaign for the U.S. Senate, it truly means a lot to him and our family. Thank you for any help you’re able to give and Merry Christmas to you and your family, -Megan Aadland | | Paid for by AADLAND for Senate Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement of the United States Army or the Department of Defense. disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abby for Iowa Abby for Iowa
body:
The best chance in decades to flip this Senate seat blue.
| | |
---
**HUGE news out of Iowa, Peter – and it's not looking good. **
**FIRST:** After polling revealed more than two-thirds of likely Iowa voters don't want to reelect Sen. Chuck Grassley (R), Democrat Abby Finkenauer launched her campaign – giving Democrats the best chance in _decades_ to flip this Senate seat blue.
**BUT THEN:** In the span of just a few months, the campaign arm of the Senate Republicans hauled in $28 million to protect vulnerable incumbents like Sen. Grassley. It's a huge spending advantage they can use to dismantle Democrats' Senate majority.

_I’m watching these close races like a hawk because even a few votes can change everything. One race was decided by just SIX VOTES._
Pelosi’s Democrats could reach thousands – even millions – of voters, and this is just phase one. [**I’m asking you for just 10 dollars. Republican Whip Steve Scalise

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: NEW: Dr. Oz takes a shot at John
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Oz knows John is the candidate to beat him and become Pennsylvania’s next U.S. Senator.
#
Dr. Oz just name-dropped John in a new video, calling him a “liberal politician.” (If that means a fighter for workers, legal weed, and LGBTQ+ rights, then sure!)
Quick translation: Oz knows John is the frontrunner in this race, and he’s getting nervous that our people-powered movement is going to stop him from buying Pennsylvania's U.S. Senate seat and destroying our Democratic majority. **[Will you help prove him right by chipping in right now, Derek?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38232?refcode=em20211213-3817&t=1&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)**
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38232?refcode=em20211213-3817&t=2&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)
**[Fight Back: Chip In Now](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38232?refcode=em20211213-3817&amounts=5&t=3&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)**
With his multi-million dollar fortune made from promoting dangerous pseudoscience and misleading medical claims on TV, Dr. Oz thinks he’s the only candidate in the race with the resources to win.
But what he’s realizing is that our grassroots campaign — funded by hundreds of thousands of folks in all 67 Pennsylvania counties and all over the country — is powerful enough to fight back and make sure this seat goes to someone who is one of us and will fight for us...*not* a celebrity doctor who lives in New Jersey.
**Together, we can make sure the millions of dollars Dr. Oz spends on his campaign buy nothing but wasted airtime. All we need to do is keep building our movement, one grassroots donation at a time.**
**[If you’re in a place to do so, please chip in $5 or any amount right now to keep up John’s momentum. Let’s keep Dr. Oz running scared while we focus on securing a better future for Pennsylvanians and working families everywhere.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38232?refcode=em20211213-3817&t=4&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/38232?refcode=em20211213-3817&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)**
Thank you for your support,
Team Fetterman

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20211213-3817-footer&t=24&refcode2=3817_434096__R5l-W&akid=3817%2E434096%2E_R5l-W)**

Even as 2022 approaches, we continue to deal with the pandemic and its consequences. Far too many of our wonderful, locally-owned businesses have been destroyed, while others have limped along. Waiving the sales tax for restaurants will put a few extra dollars back into the pockets of consumers and bring customers back into our downtown areas to shop in other stores. This tax relief will also come during the quietest, slowest time of the year -- when restaurants need help the most, and when outdoor dining is less feasible due to the cold. It is clear that we are still in a crisis, and these businesses and their patrons are in need of help. **That's why the Maryland General Assembly must provide three months of desperately-needed relief for small business owners on their first day back in session in January. ** **[If you agree that Maryland's restaurants and local economy deserve this assistance, add your name to our petition and show your support today!](https://u1584542.ct.sendgrid.net/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnkd9OMAk9omA_9FkVRYGSEhntn6FMtLHdljJPa44aY_2GtzF_yo9S7o6VrPOsOxYMEfEKPgioAVxXHp9_xTv8MtWVw_vI9-1CrlWHMFTtZuIDdS15RlzY5SRzzNMI58s1hNFW1ZYkqnT68RV8fS7WzV6hZ_LArm3GcRucYJNmwKQY5NYVtKg7DouyMkH3vV978yRvN14sIa140pJeBHMOiLIqAgzy6vu5x4-xknlPs96SIHsOUBMnRJpMzRi1mN7CMo3zjvfjvd-yRq3BeHfzJIzVOT3ti3mAX9cx3cEK0Uyxpgl7GlGYzu3pnak09mge-50Yj-xnLbTiqnZTK5WsI7farIdATwzwFubIf5ep7OPA/3ht/fzHxqMFyTrWunH_hrUSNfA/h3/BNLA5uqKKUAh947wYhLClJdy_GXAufi_zsVwTYXNV-U)**

clean_body: Today, I called on Governor Hogan and the General Assembly to waive the sales tax in restaurants for three months — join me in this important effort! | | Hi friends, Even as 2022 approaches, we continue to deal with the pandemic and its consequences. Far too many of our wonderful, locally-owned businesses have been destroyed, while others have limped along. Waiving the sales tax for restaurants will put a few extra dollars back into the pockets of consumers and bring customers back into our downtown areas to shop in other stores. This tax relief will also come during the quietest, slowest time of the year -- when restaurants need help the most, and when outdoor dining is less feasible due to the cold. It is clear that we are still in a crisis, and these businesses and their patrons are in need of help. That's why the Maryland General Assembly must provide three months of desperately-needed relief for small business owners on their first day back in session in January. Together, we can make our government work better for the people of Maryland and our local economy. Thank you for taking action! Doug By Authority: Friends of Doug Gansler, Terry Denney, Treasurer; Ana Sol Gutierrez, Chair. Friends of Doug Gansler P.O. Box 31102 Bethesda, MD 20824 United States | | Sent via . clean_body: As Senate Republicans stall the John Lewis Voting Rights Act, state legislatures in 48 states have introduced nearly 450 bills to SUPPRESS votes. | | | Team Ruiz hopes that you and your family are safe and healthy. Public health across the country is our top concern during this unprecedented time. To view the most up to date CDC COVID-19 safety recommendations, And if you have a moment, please read our message below. We won’t sugar coat it: Senate Republicans are stalling the John Lewis Voting Rights Act and state legislatures in 48 states have introduced nearly 450 bills to suppress voters. He’ll decimate our voting rights!! | | | | | | | Here’s what will happen if we lose our majority and Republicans take over: \-- They’ll access to mail-in drop boxes \-- They’ll partisan poll watchers to record people at the polls \-- They’ll providing food and water to people waiting in line to vote These disgusting attacks could suppress votes and steal the 2022 Election!! | | | | | | Let’s get it done, \-- Team Ruiz | PO Box 3433 Palm Desert, CA 92261 PAID FOR BY DR. RAUL RUIZ FOR CONGRESS COMMITTEE Please read the following message from Dr. Raul Ruiz: I'm so thankful for your support. With President Biden and Vice President Harris in the White House, we have a clear path forward. But we can't get complacent. We have to keep fighting if we're going to undo the damage Donald Trump has done. | Together we can protect access to health care, expand Social Security, and fight for vital institutions like the Post Office. Because it's what's right. As [1] of just [3] Democratic physicians in Congress, it's more important than ever that I am able to fight for our most vulnerable communities. But I need you in this fight with me: From the emergency room to the halls of Congress, it's my duty to do as much good as I can. Can I count on you to help me keep fighting in Congress? Every dollar makes a difference: | | | | | | I believe these emails are the best way for our campaign to stay in touch with dedicated supporters like you. If you would like to receive only our most important emails, . Thanks for being a part of the team. | | Sent via . name: RAPHAEL WARNOCK ANNOUNCEMENT (via DCCC)
subject: RE: Raphael Warnock
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
| | | **VOTING RIGHTS UPDATE:**
**Senate Republicans BLOCK Senator Warnock 's voting rights push**

**[This is critical: Senator Raphael Warnock is running for reelection in Georgia to defend our Democratic Trifecta and protect our voting rights. clean_body: There is a lot of work ahead of us. | | | Team, Together we can do this. If you don’t believe me, just look at this: We’ve contacted over 30,000 voters between doors knocked, and phones called, and it’s not even 2022 yet. () We’ve hosted community events in every corner of the district from the South Side to the West Side, the Loop, to the Gold Coast. () We’ve gotten media coverage on the strength of our campaign and on the advocacy and organizing expertise of Kina, including an op-ed by Kina herself in We’ve earned 20 endorsements from progressive groups, organizations, and officials (with more on the way next year!) And we’re just getting started with petition season on the horizon! We have surpassed every expectation and we feel the momentum of a movement. The Chicago Machine never believed a grassroots campaign like ours could make the waves that it has, and now they are calling for reinforcements like Nancy Pelosi and DC super PACs. That’s where you come in, team. ** We’re so thankful for everything that you’ve done for our campaign so far, team. We know you believe in Kina and this movement. Thank you, Team Kina | To give by check: Kina Collins for Congress 901 Lake Street, Unit 4093 Oak Park, IL 60301

| Ed Humphreys talks about how he would govern as the next leader of Idaho. He shares his vision for the future of the republican party, a glimpse into education, and how he would work with the legislators to benefit to citizens of Idaho. [Listen to full Idaho Speaks interview HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMDk3MzQxODk4NDk2MTM5JmM9cDN6MCZlPTAmYj04MzMxMTI0MTMmZD1lN2ExcDZu.4GMSbc46D5JFB3N_MHFX2jDIGWViz8eBe04Yp1A-UBA)

| Humphreys seeks to eliminate state income tax
---
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| GRANGEVILLE — Ed Humphreys, one of four Republicans running for Idaho governor, spoke about his goals for Idaho with the Idaho County Commissioners during their regular Nov. 30 meeting. “Idaho is a state where we can celebrate American values and family values,” declared Humphreys. He said he opposes mandates, particularly unfunded mandates that the counties need to figure out how to fund. “I would like to give more autonomy to counties,” he said. “If I was blessed to become governor, I would veto any legislation that does not provide funding.” [Read Full Article HERE](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMDk3MzQxODk4NDk2MTM5JmM9cDN6MCZlPTAmYj04MzMxMTI0MTYmZD1sNnEzYzd5.UBuSmgulgfZyyt9cnI74hnN60JxeTZrh61I-pYzeS2o)

## **We cannot solve problems with the same mentality that created them. The elitists measure success by growth. Growth in budgets,_growth in the size of government_. That growth is paid for by us, but it rarely benefits us.**

It’s time for a fresh perspective to the problems facing Idaho. I believe there are timeless principles that produce natural consequences. It’s time to put principles above politics. I will have one standard to measure success; promises kept. [Read Full Job Policy Summary here.](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xODQwMDk3MzQxODk4NDk2MTM5JmM9cDN6MCZlPTAmYj04MzMxMTI0MjImZD1xOGs1dTl0.NiZhv9D0TkSnv1CIsvLt1nwCvqmlKIGYc31MHujfiGg)

| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4341?t=6&akid=1013%2E878179%2ElWpapZ) | _End of Year Update_
December FEC Goal: **$150,000**
***Not on pace***
[Suggested donation: $5 ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4342?t=7&akid=1013%2E878179%2ElWpapZ) | [DONATE](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4343?t=8&akid=1013%2E878179%2ElWpapZ)
---
Folks, I’ll say it until my voice goes hoarse: **It’s time to cut workers in on the deal.**

Let me tell you exactly what I mean by that.

It means understanding workers are doing everything right and still finding themselves unable to get ahead.

It means acknowledging workers are the lifeblood of our economy -- and then building that economy around them.

It means good wages, secure retirement, affordable health care, and breathing room for everyone.

I’ve worked with businesses my entire career. It’s not workers versus businesses -- it’s a partnership. But when a CEO is making nearly 400x what their workers are making, something is broken.

**I’ll always say it loud and proud (and yell if I have to): Workers first.**

[**If you think it’s about time we put workers first in the Senate, I need you to chip in $5 or any amount to my grassroots campaign and help flip Ohio’s open seat blue. We have just a couple of weeks to hit our biggest fundraising deadline so far -- we have to get this done.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/4341?t=9&akid=1013%2E878179%2ElWpapZ)

name: John Castorani
subject: This is how Democrats plan to win.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
body:
Castorani for Virginia This weekend I read an article in the Wall Street
Journal that scared the living daylights out of me, which not someone easily
done.For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe
Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable.
Don't want to receive our emails? Unsubscribe here.
<http://links.johncastorani.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=27014576054e4b79a5e5689b2f623d9d&_s=d068c69acdf34fd181c5e874a2a57716&_t=s11LeSC7m-SIUwnz5APKB150MFmKWDtA2GSNPIgC7WuWfFPCkCwkzrjIR_kSFabyFGPxTftdA7oWs8DBq9Vrdq80UTnZYMt-TQ8ssw2l-DijsT7mJbQLS7InmcHtPMq62XkwjCHZ49xUCv00G5tsi-2aZzAd6gOeJLoH3RSLqZc%3D>

Fellow Conservative,

As a former intelligence official with the United States government, I have
been privy to a lot of sensitive information throughout my career. I’ve been
scared, concerned and worried about our country for a long time. My concern for
our safety is one of the main reasons I’m running for Congress.

This weekend I read an article in the Wall Street Journal that scared the
living daylights out of me, which not someone easily done.

I’ve copied the article in question, titled “Almost Anybody Can Now Vote in
New York” below for you to read yourself.

If you don’t have time or care to read the article, the just of it is this:
New City plans to allow noncitizens to vote. This could truly be the beginning
of the end of our Democracy and we need to mobilize to draw awareness to the
issue and snuff it out before it becomes a severe threat.

Please take a moment to read the article in its entirety. I promise this is
not a waste of time.

Sincerely,
John Castorani

The New York City Council approved a bill last week to let about 800,000
noncitizens vote in local elections, and Mayor Bill de Blasio has said he won’t
veto it. The measure passed 33-14, over some strong dissents, including from
Democrats.

“It’s unconstitutional under state law. It’s very clear,” said Councilman
Kalman Yeger, a Brooklyn Democrat, during Thursday’s debate. That was seconded
by Councilman James Gennaro, a Queens Democrat. “I and everyone in this body
took an oath—an oath!—to uphold the constitution of the state of New York.”

New York’s constitution guarantees citizens the right to vote, “provided that
such citizen is eighteen years of age” and has been a resident for 30 days. The
progressive argument is that this language doesn’t explicitly exclude
noncitizens, so New York City can grant them the franchise.

But think what else this implies. The constitution only specifically says
that a “citizen” must be 18 to vote. So could the city expand local elections
to 12-year-old noncitizens? Ditto for the constitution’s 30-day residency rule.
Could the city let noncitizens cross the Hudson River declare residency, and
vote the next day? As legal analysis, this isn’t what New York’s constitution
means.

The city’s bill at least requires 30-day residency by noncitizen voters. But
Councilman Mark Gjonaj, a Bronx Democrat, said that would cover “a transient,”
who’s “coming in for the duration of that job or that project and going back to
their home country.” He warned it would make New York “vulnerable to outside
influence,” including from Russia, suggesting a one-year residency requirement
instead.

Because noncitizens can’t participate in federal or state races, a practical
problem is that the city’s Board of Elections, which is legendary for
ineptitude, would have to manage a second voting list and set of ballots. What
about people who don’t speak the basic English required by the citizenship
test? Councilman Mark Treyger, a Brooklyn Democrat who abstained on the bill,
said he once asked for a law requiring interpreters at polling sites, and “I
was told that we didn’t have the authority.”

Green-card holders pay taxes, yet so might second homeowners, international
students, and illegal aliens. For voting, citizenship is a clear place to draw
a bright line. Mr. Gennaro, the Queens Democrat, said noncitizens can’t hold
office, so under the city’s bill “they’re good enough to vote for Mayor but not
be Mayor.” Cynics, he added, would say “we’re looking for permanent residents
to vote for us, but you don’t get a chance to, like, run against us.”

Other arguments were less, well, philosophical. Councilwoman Laurie Cumbo, a
Brooklyn Democrat, said she worried the bill wouldn’t “amplify” black voices.
“The top three ethnic groups that will benefit from this,” she said, are “the
Dominican Republic, China, as well as Mexico.” She added that although it’s
“not politically correct,” she is concerned that “many of our Latino brothers
and sisters voted Republican, for President Trump.” So she opposed the bill.

These dissenting Democrats didn’t win the day, but let’s hope the courts say
the whole thing is unconstitutional.

Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia
P.O. BOX 390
ORANGE, VA 22960

Mr. Gennaro, the Queens Democrat, said noncitizens can’t hold office, so under the city’s bill “they’re good enough to vote for Mayor but not be Mayor.” Cynics, he added, would say “we’re looking for permanent residents to vote for us, but you don’t get a chance to, like, run against us.” Other arguments were less, well, philosophical. Councilwoman Laurie Cumbo, a Brooklyn Democrat, said she worried the bill wouldn’t “amplify” black voices. “The top three ethnic groups that will benefit from this,” she said, are “the Dominican Republic, China, as well as Mexico.” She added that although it’s “not politically correct,” she is concerned that “many of our Latino brothers and sisters voted Republican, for President Trump.” So she opposed the bill. These dissenting Democrats didn’t win the day, but let’s hope the courts say the whole thing is unconstitutional. Paid for by John Castorani for Virginia P.O. BOX 390 ORANGE, VA 22960

name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Ted Cruz endorsed against us
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, Ted Cruz
just endorsed against Jessica Cisneros in Texas’ 28th Congressional
District. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86779?refcode=em20211213-20966&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1029&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Can you stand with Jessica and Justice Democrats with a
donation right now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86779?refcode=em20211213-20966&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1030&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Contribute

We have a lot of opponents in TX-28. Ted Cruz just added himself to the
list by endorsing a Republican in the race who used to work for him.
There’s also Henry Cuellar who votes against abortion rights and takes a
ton of campaign money from Wall Street and Big Oil.

We’re up against a lot in Jessica’s race,
Peter. Right-wing fear
mongering. The Democratic establishment. Big Oil, Big Pharma, and Wall
Street. And now Ted Cruz.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86779?refcode=em20211213-20966&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1049&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Can you rush a donation to help Justice Democrats elect Jessica, a
progressive working-class fighter in TX-28? We need your help now, before
it’s too late.

Money will continue to rush into Cuellar’s campaign coffers and even more
will flood in on the Republican side. Justice Democrats and Jessica don’t
take a cent from corporate PACs, which is why we need your support as soon
as possible. Voters will start requesting their mail-in ballots on January
1st! And in-person early voting starts on February 14th.

South Texans deserve a fighter in Congress — not a corporate crony like
Cuellar, and definitely not a Ted Cruz-backed Republican. Organizing in a
district as large as Jessica’s will be no easy feat, but in order to win,
we’ll need to build a stronger campaign than Cuellar and our newest
Republican opponent. [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86779?refcode=em20211213-20966&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1050&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Will you pitch in $3 — or whatever
you can — to help Justice Democrats secure Jessica’s victory.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/86779?refcode=em20211213-20966&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1051&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Contribute

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1052&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1053&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20211213-20966-footer&t=1054&refcode2=20966_1203867_q4Vxff&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1055&akid=20966%2E1203867%2Eq4Vxff

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
JusticeDemocrats.com
10629 Hardin Valley Rd, #226
Knoxville, TN 37932
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

body:
Our opponent is fundraising in New York. We need to fight back now! | | | |
---
| | | Patriot,

We just wanted to make sure you saw this. Our liberal Democrat opponent for next year's election is **fundraising with Coastal Democrats in New York!**
---
|
---
| [Chip in $25 to Reject the Coastal Liberals](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=c9999fdd3b&e=1050d051da "Chip in $25 to Reject the Coastal Liberals")
---
| Last year, we fought off millions of dollars from coastal liberals who were trying to buy a vote in Kansas, and thanks to you, it didn’t work. However, they have refused to give up. They recruited a candidate who has never lived in our district before he decided to run for Congress, _**and he is actively traveling halfway across the country to pocket their promised money.**_

We’re not shocked that our opponent is holding a fundraiser in a wealthy (the average household income is $180,000!!!), liberal New York City neighborhood. But we have news for him, **Kansans don't want New York-style politics** , and they don't want outside “progressive” money influencing our elections.
---
|
---
| [$100 to Take Back the House](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a7a690f7de&e=1050d051da "$100 to Take Back the House")

clean_body: Our opponent is fundraising in New York. We need to fight back now! | | | | | | | Patriot, We just wanted to make sure you saw this. Our liberal Democrat opponent for next year's election is fundraising with Coastal Democrats in New York! | | "Chip in $25 to Reject the Coastal Liberals" | Last year, we fought off millions of dollars from coastal liberals who were trying to buy a vote in Kansas, and thanks to you, it didn’t work. However, they have refused to give up. They recruited a candidate who has never lived in our district before he decided to run for Congress, and he is actively traveling halfway across the country to pocket their promised money. We’re not shocked that our opponent is holding a fundraiser in a wealthy (the average household income is $180,000!!!), liberal New York City neighborhood. But we have news for him, Kansans don't want New York-style politics , and they don't want outside “progressive” money influencing our elections. | | "$100 to Take Back the House" | The left is desperate to beat us next year. Why? Because they know Jake is a fighter who will never abandon our conservative values. Last year, we only won because of our great grassroots support from strong conservatives like you. | As always, thank you for your continued support. We couldn't do it without you. Yours in the fight, Team LaTurner | "Donate Now. Anything helps." | | | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 LaTurner for Congress, All rights reserved. Christmas is just around the corner, and on this episode of This is Living, we reflect on the miracle of the incarnation of Jesus. This time of year is filled with hope, joy and peace because of the arrival of the Christ child on that Christmas morning. The Word became flesh and dwells among us.

When we realize the profundity of Christmas, it changes everything about the way we live. You will not want to miss these insightful reflections that are sure to prepare your heart for this season. If you've missed any of the previous episodes of This Is Living, check the bottom of the email, there are links to all seven episodes!

Friend,

We are coming up on our Q4 fundraising goal, and we still have a long way to go.

Our finance team has put together some helpful information for you:
* Mike’s average campaign online contribution is only $33.

**Here’s why this $33 is an important number:** It means our campaign isn’t fueled by elite “mega-donors” like the Democrats. Instead, our fundraising efforts rely on **grassroots supporters like YOU** who chip in a little bit at a time.

**When we say every dollar makes a difference,_we really mean it._**

clean_body: We put together some helpful info for you | Friend, We are coming up on our Q4 fundraising goal, and we still have a long way to go. Our finance team has put together some helpful information for you: Mike’s average campaign online contribution is only $33. If everyone receiving this email donated just $1, we would exceed our goal by over $14,000. Here’s why this $33 is an important number: It means our campaign isn’t fueled by elite “mega-donors” like the Democrats. Instead, our fundraising efforts rely on grassroots supporters like YOU who chip in a little bit at a time. When we say every dollar makes a difference,we really mean it. | Grassroots support is what fuels our campaign -- we really couldn’t do it without you. Thank you for all of your help and support, Grace, Braun Finance Team Paid for by Mike Braun for Indiana Don't want to receive our emails anymore?

Next year will be a pivotal election for Nashville and for our country. Here on Team Odessa, we’re putting all the effort we can into organizing in the community and getting the word out there so folks will hear what Odessa has to say and send her to Congress. But we’re up against an incumbent and a system that’s entrenched against change. We’re a grassroots-funded operation, while our opponent Jim Cooper rakes in cash from corporate PACs. It’s going to take a lot of support and a lot of work for us to shake up the status quo — but we’ll be able to do it with your help. **That’s why today we’re launching our 2022 Fund.** We’re aiming to raise as much money as possible right now so we have a dedicated fund ready to organize and mobilize in the new year. [**Can you help fuel this movement by chipping in $22, or whatever you can, to our 2022 Fund today?
