| Hi Peter,

As a vet, I'm furious at Joe Biden and his disrespect for our military!

_One of the greatest things about President Trump was his love for our military and our soldiers. That man knows the value of those who lay down their lives for our freedom!_

Joe Biden, though, hates America. He has made our military woke and weak- and his latest disrespect has been too much!

**My name is Bill Olson, and I am a Christian and a combat vet [running to reclaim Florida's 9th district](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=10bc9ec3ab&e=afa21b7626), a swing district in the Orlando area last held by Republicans in 2013. This is a targeted district by the NRCC because, with the Red Wave coming in 2022, we can take this seat!**

Surely you've heard of the "woke" generals like Milley. With guys like this, one wonders if we would even win a war anymore? Townhall reports:

_Last year, Milley should have been fired when he apologized for walking with President Trump to St. John’s Episcopal Church near the White House. In the mayhem of a riot in Washington D.C., the church was severely damaged and almost burned to the ground. By visiting, the President showed his support for religious freedom and his opposition to the lawlessness that occurred nationwide in the aftermath of the death of George Floyd in Minneapolis. Before leaving, the President was photographed holding a Bible in front of the church.

After backlash from left-wing commentators on social media, Milley apologized. In an address to the National Defense University, Milley said “I should not have been there...My presence in that moment and in that environment created a perception of the military involved in domestic politics.”

The apology was unnecessary and foolish; however, it did confirm to all Americans that Milley did not support President Trump. It served as his plea to keep the position in the Biden administration. Not surprisingly, Milley was retained by Biden as both share the same ideology and the same level of incompetence.

In June, Milley established his “woke” credentials by decrying the evils of white anger and supporting the study of this topic in the United States military. In congressional testimony, Milley defended the teaching of critical race theory at the U.S. Military Academy at West Point._
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b605537d80&e=afa21b7626)
---
| But now, Biden as pushed this too far!

Presidents usually attend the annual Army-Navy game. President Trump attended every year- it was his way of honoring the service by the cadets and midshipmen.

Biden? He hid in the White House, afraid to face the scorn of the military!
_**Donald Trump Jr.: Joe Biden Skipped Army-Navy Game to Avoid “Let’s Go Brandon!” Chants**_
_Joe Biden snubbed the Army-Navy football game on Saturday, opting instead to remain in his home state of Delaware.

The internet couldn’t help but notice Biden’s absence at the Army-Navy game at the MetLife Stadium in Rutherford, New Jersey, which has been customarily attended by former U.S. presidents.

“Let’s Go Brandon” and “Fuck Joe Biden” chants have erupted at numerous college football games across the country in recent months as his COVID and spending policies have resulted in inflation, rising gas prices, and supply chain breakdowns.

By contrast, former President Trump enjoyed epic tributes from soldiers and spectators alike during the Army-Navy games, which he attended every year as president except for 2017._

Now, different presidents have different priorities when they get to office.

BUT EVERY SINGLE PRESIDENT SINCE 1900, EXCEPT BIDEN, HAS ATTENDED THE ARMY-NAVY GAME!

This is the reason the winner gets the "Commander in Chief Trophy".

**Biden simply hates our military. He hates our country and wants to weaken and diminish those who protect us. That's the only reasonable explanation for this!**
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=33efd875f1&e=afa21b7626)
---
| **I am a combat Army vet. My sons served as well. The military is very important to our family, and we understand the importance of defending our freedoms. **

The Socialist Democrats disagree. My Socialist opponent, Darren Soto, disagrees. Biden apparently disagrees.

[I got more votes here in 2020 than any Republican ever had, because I stood up for our country, and stood against the Socialists. We want America First! Will you stand alongside me?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=39de3804b4&e=afa21b7626)

_The military needs allies in DC right now. They don't need Darren Soto! They need fighters, and I will fight for our military!_

Help me stand for Americans against Biden, and those who would destroy our country! [Help me stop all of Biden's agenda!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=2a4c6a2f6c&e=afa21b7626)

[Thank you for your support!](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=f27ec3ec31&e=afa21b7626)
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=8216a006f2&e=afa21b7626)
---
| Bill Olson
Combat Veteran of Multiple Wars
Supports President Trump
Not a Career Politician
Hard Core Conservative Fighter
---
| [ ](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=b4add67128&e=afa21b7626)
---
| P.S. I am in the fight of my life against the Democrat machine here in Florida. [Will you contribute before the end of this month to help me reach my goal?](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=e1dbbc5288&e=afa21b7626)
---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/profile?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=1dc6b11b13) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://billolsonfl.us1.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=d46f7bf5f11f241ec4a0954ff&id=a9a8add464&e=afa21b7626&c=1dc6b11b13).

name: Republican Party of Wisconsin
subject: Election Integrity Updates
body:
| [ ](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=BJAgHetUUIqrbBbKj3z09j9OpIZbBzc5g2-7VwfHf34&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=1) | |
---|---|---
Friend -- We wanted to make sure you saw the recap of the Assembly Campaigns and Elections Committee’s hearing last week detailing questions raised regarding Wisconsin’s election administration and voter rolls. [**Watch WisEye Morning Minute’s Clip****
**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRa0KYPN-LjQwibQ6e9XKLYB&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=2)(You can also[**watch**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=cBQK0qmnvGef24E_uueTKla_6V5oqJJcZO1HXXSe2Oxp3LSHMCyxJ1b4lVHjDFAMDBExj-Em3T52w19V20jTWIpq0KhUR_VhNv93pql1ENs&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=3) WisEye’s full recording of the hearing with a subscription) This hearing highlighted the issues surrounding the “Zuckerbucks'' grants sent by Mark Zuckerberg’s Center for Tech and Civic Life (CTCL) to Wisconsin’s five largest cities. Wisconsin election officials gave Democratic operatives affiliated with CTCL access to Wisconsin’s voter database system to turn out voters in these major cities. The hearings also highlighted a number of voter statistics that warrant further investigation to ensure that there were no nefarious actions taken by those with access to Wisconsin’s voter system. Additionally, the Wisconsin Institute for Law and Liberty released a new 2020 election report, linked [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=hzZHoe_LqjIxZeEPQX1TwHpGffgeBXorwR2k-QusN9FU6ZxDeDIKaqtoPPzShkeHI7vMp3bZ1A_TuzBUiaBrQCdOcmaQ0H0KOEWwLnC5pMo&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=4). Wisconsin Spotlight also [**summarized**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=FZeaJrGkqb-JdJpt5MxOBLJsdDKp7AeIiu8R8SikDvjDad-tdIQ96MnsUXdIJsPd4VktL71UnNYygczkQ8l5hkm_Exb1jMibCAK8_7mKUP4&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=5) the report. According to their story: _“Were votes cast in a lawful manner? It is almost certain that in Wisconsin’s 2020 election the number of votes that did not comply with existing legal requirements exceeded Joe Biden’s margin of victory,” the report states. “There is no way around it; the failure to follow the proper procedures for absentee voting is a serious abdication of the responsibility election officials have to follow the law.”_ _That makes fraud more difficult to detect, the report notes. State law requires prescribed procedures for absentee voting are mandatory. But the Wisconsin Elections Commission, at multiple turns, changed the rules of the game._ _They stretched or reinterpreted statute on who could “cure” or correct ballot envelope information. They suspended the law that requires special voting deputies — not nursing home employees — to assist residents of long-term care facilities with voting. They kept voters suspected of moving out of district or state on the voter rolls. They adopted legally contrary procedures on absentee ballots — in a historic period for voting by mail._ _More than 265,000 Wisconsin voters were determined to be “indefinitely confined,” meaning they received an absentee ballot and were exempt from the statewide photo ID requirements, the report notes. The 2020 election saw a four-fold increase in the voter designation, up from 66,000 in 2016. WILL’s report asserts, “it is almost certain that many voters improperly claimed ‘indefinitely confined status.’”_ The Republican Party of Wisconsin will always fight for free, fair, and secure elections. You can read the most up-to-date information on what we’re working on to secure election integrity on our Election Integrity Dashboard, located on our website [**here**](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=sxV_uZjhTYiS0NkYk0dD0eH7mQqnwg7TiRkzkxQsBEjYN0qYIVr_dl05xpqOQV0I&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=6). Team WisGOP
[](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=7 "CONTRIBUTE") [CONTRIBUTE](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=K115QJUsYIJk1EqYiO2oYo--3UqFRYFg8Lsn0cgAtTvheTZIBulG9nsDqgd8dcDVbYrz-EeNP5EokvSW_Ho-OC0WutYVac_I1HhR9pqIAsU&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=7)
|
Republican Party of Wisconsin · WI 53703, United States
This email was sent to [Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com](mailto:Dpwillis67@Gmail.Com). To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://act.wisgop.org/unsubscribe?e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=8).
You can also keep up with Republican Party of Wisconsin on [Twitter](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=7Sn_jlQ3J2wHxMyMtp8UNIcJvVL3dAKuw8klLyGLeGg&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=9) or [Facebook](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6iVbepFGB501pMHJjXBPeT95kNZEWPezdnkYYctpRqhH&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=10).
Created with [NationBuilder](https://act.wisgop.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=d00ac07d22940c0f36f888b7fa3c8df2&utm_source=wisgop&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=ei_updates_1213_3&n=11), software for leaders.

Fellow American - I want to personally update you on our December fundraising numbers so far.

As we prepare to close our books for 2021 and look to the election in LESS than a year, my team and I has been strategically analyzing our reports from this year.

And, I’ve got some good news and bad news for you, Fellow American.

At the pace we’re fundraising right now, Democrats’ will keep the Senate, and our country cannot afford any more of their disastrous leadership.

Here’s the good news though, Fellow American - if we can rely on 1,873 America-First patriots to chip in just $10 by midnight, we’ll be on track for 2021.

[**Can I count on you in this decisive moment?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=273858c65339466085cce49fb8131773&_e=YgGhgy8M7_Om1fA8JpedF2WqN1wKSiWjx3z6LR18GHyNtIgkeOQmOxruvdQUFpStQU7_hNyBULaa1BbiduELBUjQPD40Y_eebeGZRBHlPnKj3F5krrRjcxFvnA31c69Jn0DOUCiYui8Viw0N6MPdgVtkBHxZNj80kRb3sb2omlvRGCmZZzOskUt2I7DMrtNm-e9qabiopSXPYUeN6JO289Nl1QRlwNTTzXMVljuXODNUqCeA8pwPQat5G5as_hZsn9YhzCH9blhDg9iQzh_EGO24gqq4yug7liLudM8ngbDlh0FlTEjqYMxsDor1F6KDVOltzbmU-GGSEqMOmh66j9LlHbgL5RS-ukX_xXGJGWYAr9Ar4gf0ESRGArmtS_jZ)

[**PICK UP THE PACE >>**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=273858c65339466085cce49fb8131773&_e=YgGhgy8M7_Om1fA8JpedF2WqN1wKSiWjx3z6LR18GHyNtIgkeOQmOxruvdQUFpStQU7_hNyBULaa1BbiduELBUjQPD40Y_eebeGZRBHlPnKj3F5krrRjcxFvnA31c69Jn0DOUCiYui8Viw0N6MPdgVtkBHxZNj80kRb3sb2omlsVMKofNQVdrFvxXI8FL8Ss9xPLOQTimfPh_5qOP8FUYiTUeM5PXxYAxL58oDqmzQ9JIuAcamOFn_I5GWlY6cmSRwcOS0gB0Bd1tFn1BkXAVt0jQkyV2p87hggjEagvpHuGWyaNXBGtIctik5lpjFUU21gXUiTy_pijJMA5uofD1e-38_dn2IyoZjlhBivDMZJujcURluXxAW2Gtuo0LTSW)
Democrats have consistently been outraising Republicans, in an effort to hold their razor-thin majority. Last year, the deep-pocketed liberal elite bought Congress with their multi-millions. I’m asking you to invest in a RED majority, before it’s too late.

What we do today determines the future of our country. We can’t afford to fall behind any longer. [**Please, Fellow American, help pick up the pace today.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=273858c65339466085cce49fb8131773&_e=YgGhgy8M7_Om1fA8JpedF2WqN1wKSiWjx3z6LR18GHyNtIgkeOQmOxruvdQUFpStQU7_hNyBULaa1BbiduELBUjQPD40Y_eebeGZRBHlPnKj3F5krrRjcxFvnA31c69Jn0DOUCiYui8Viw0N6MPdgVtkBHxZNj80kRb3sb2omlsgk0yRXpNhigx5YuZozMCfKUbDZ52jq-zexZT-mVaNiXsT5rC-zPJHsWPlbRIqoMGObN04lxJCWsfmBjYDRMRPeWuNuGUM8OTDURBIbJPe8bTZr5lOdsYuspqeIHT99VsFoiwceXmIbOYDsA12zCXlHogIRK9a4SuRAz95RwM5ftsF5cf9rUl-_4U3maWLuFd0tuWvjcKKm1F5n5DmBXSo)

clean_body: I want to personally update you on our December fundraising numbers so far. | Fellow American - I want to personally update you on our December fundraising numbers so far. As we prepare to close our books for 2021 and look to the election in LESS than a year, my team and I has been strategically analyzing our reports from this year. And, I’ve got some good news and bad news for you, Fellow American. At the pace we’re fundraising right now, Democrats’ will keep the Senate, and our country cannot afford any more of their disastrous leadership. Here’s the good news though, Fellow American - if we can rely on 1,873 America-First patriots to chip in just $10 by midnight, we’ll be on track for 2021. Democrats have consistently been outraising Republicans, in an effort to hold their razor-thin majority. Last year, the deep-pocketed liberal elite bought Congress with their multi-millions. I’m asking you to invest in a RED majority, before it’s too late. What we do today determines the future of our country. We can’t afford to fall behind any longer. Thanks, Mike Lee | Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. Don't want to receive our emails? I want to personally update you on our December fundraising numbers so far.

clean_body: Pelosi is getting desperate... | Friend, The Biden-Harris Department of Justice is SUING Texas to try and ELIMINATE our brand-new congressional district. Nancy Pelosi was already caught admitting to her donors that our race for this new seat would END her majority. And now, the Democrats are trying to erase our district altogether. But as a U.S. Army Captain, I NEVER give up. That’s why I just launched our Redistricting Battle Fund to FIGHT BACK against the Democrats’ last-ditch effort to save Pelosi’s majority. Like any other time the radical Left disagrees with something, they call it racist -- and their argument against our new district is no different... [Source: Washington Post] I honestly find it laughable that the Biden-Harris DOJ would claim this district “minimizes the voting rights of minorities.” Texas’ new 38th district is the only predominantly white district within the 3rd largest county in the nation --and yet, a conservative black man whose family went from slavery to West Point in just 5 generations will be its next congressman. You tell me if that sounds like an underrepresentation of minorities. Remember Friend, we only need 5 seats to take back the House, but if the Democrats’ new lawsuit successfully eliminates this district, our chances of ending Pelosi’s majority are shot. This all proves just how desperate Pelosi and the Democrats have become. But at this critical moment, I’m counting on YOUR help to SAVE our new district from their absurd lawsuit. Thank you, Wesley Hunt Former U.S. Army Captain Republican for Congress 1707 1/2 Post Oak Blvd. #525 Houston, TX 77056 Paid for by Hunt for Congress. name: CheriBeasley.com
subject: A 50-50 Senate is not cutting it.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Cheri Beasley for North Carolina
body:
Democrats are fighting for a future that protects and expands voting rights, a $15 minimum wage, aggressive climate action, lower health care and prescription drug prices and more.
But a 50-50 tie in the Senate is not cutting it. If we’re going to make this progress for the American people, then we must expand the majority. Cheri Beasley is our best chance to do it.
**[Please make a $3 donation to our campaign today to help us flip North Carolina and elect Cheri Beasley. Political analysts have rated this as one of the most winnable races for Democrats in 2022, but it’s going to take a grassroots movement to pull it off.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-t1&refcode2=126.357359.rquAJ4&t=1&akid=126%2E357359%2ErquAJ4)**
Thank you,
Team Beasley
* * *
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-t1&refcode2=126.357359.rquAJ4&t=2&akid=126%2E357359%2ErquAJ4)
50 Senate seats is not enough. Period.
Democrats need a real majority that can pass legislation to meaningfully improve people’s lives, and that’s why we have to flip North Carolina in 2022.
**[If you’re ready to make real progress and expand our majority, can you make a $3 donation to our campaign today? North Carolina is an open seat, and Cheri Beasley is our best chance to win this race.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-t1&refcode2=126.357359.rquAJ4&t=3&akid=126%2E357359%2ErquAJ4)**
Democrats have the opportunity to make real progress, but the gridlock, delays and lack of progress we’re seeing from the Senate right now is proof that we need more than 50 seats.
The truth is that 50 seats is not a real majority. It’s a tie.
Democrats have put forward common sense, popular ideas — bills that are supported by a majority of Americans across political parties. Now Democrats need to expand their numbers in the Senate to get these bills to the president’s desk.
Flipping this seat can change what’s possible, and Cheri will be proud to be the deciding YES vote on voting rights, climate legislation, a $15 minimum wage, codifying Roe and more — even if it means ending the filibuster.
If a $3 donation today could make all the difference, wouldn’t that be worth it?
**[Please consider making that $3 donation today, so we can flip this seat and expand our majority. Your support is critical if we’re going to win real progress on the most important issues.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cb-em-dec21?refcode=em211213-1-t1&refcode2=126.357359.rquAJ4&t=4&akid=126%2E357359%2ErquAJ4)**

Friend,
---
Tony Evers already VETOED 6 election security bills passed by the state legislature this year, which is why our lawsuit against the Wisconsin Elections Commission (WEC) is absolutely critical.
---
After a non-partisan audit found that the WEC issued **_unlawful_** guidance on the 2020 election, I knew we couldn’t wait to act, and I sued the WEC.
---
__But the cost of taking this fight to the courts has been significant. Our $50,000 legal bill ( nearly 50% of the funds our campaign is projecting to raise this month) has set us back on our end-of-year goal.__
---
**That’s why as one of my most trusted supporters, I’m asking you to give just 50% of your most recent contribution to our Election Integrity Fund.**
---
**[Please contribute to ensure Wisconsin’s elections are FREE and FAIR ahead of our MUST-WIN governor race.](http://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=fe89b1318ebf4a15871cae40d01a29a1&_m=ee73e240bd964ab09ebb21e517b8aadf&_e=ufQOpPpFMiF_8yd6G9AlvR3AW5UlU4c3Kv3NexueBknMS_ZJTtub8_zicKdOmHJOtYmYgV2HGhXUzL_foqfJ8ClJ4Q9m2ry9_Fsr2Loqd6LOqE7zXjSvgFaqXdbZ7aLRifYb_mKr9tG3DwEKTFlr23Sf0t6UCwiiSe9_PJ1qNBQC3o4JBOJPtJMyJIh8m8IR1zFtNGtLHJgi5JhLR7mbMworLk_10kK0xbsxGcuWF93RyaBJrvdsT3CkjpB4gPCFw1uuzHJmsje1nZE5H6JIL1g64CJjK5oQBQ7hSxz9vFNHxzax-_LvZtrFbJr5efbJhq2UZQszgx-OQX5Mr-U7RJ5L_hMTw3kVVotnbAnBy1_0F4qQ3qZotCibynuEJrbQatWroW-AfL-KHjutgXSOk73kTLDzesRTvHNQloU6gTPWr9V_17NFBu5N95ZeE08bOoO7IjyfF_zzlK7Duej45ZOg2mLXWAPq9uqqtvMP6tM2gtNHEM-Tfn3EhqW9BkcKt5Jvhyk_k0JKxdsLPKU-fA%3D%3D)**

body:
Breaking news in the January 6th investigation...
| | | **Maddow Show: "Three members of Donald Trump's inner circle... plead the Fifth in the Jan. 6 investigation"**

_Trump and his allies will stop at NOTHING to obstruct the January 6th investigation!_ **The probe just entered a crucial new phase, so please answer our URGENT Live Poll:**

[](https://go.dscc.org/go/5977?ask=5&t=4&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&akid=2275%2E9716520%2ENlYjPr)
**Do you approve of the January 6th investigation?**

| | | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5977?ask=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&akid=2275%2E9716520%2ENlYjPr)

---

This is urgent, Team: THREE of Trump’s closest allies just invoked the Fifth Amendment when asked about their and Trump's involvement in planning the **_horrific_** January 6th attack on our Capitol.

And while Trump's friends blatantly stonewall the bipartisan probe, his legal team just hinted that they would _go all the way to the Supreme Court to block investigators._

The closer the investigation gets to Trump himself, the harder he and his cronies fight to hide the truth from the American people, **but we REFUSE to let them off the hook.**

**Please, help us gather 50,000 responses so we can PROVE that Americans are ready to hold Trump accountable:**

**Do you approve of the January 6th investigation?**

| | [Yes](https://go.dscc.org/go/5977?ask=5&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C50%2C100%2C150%2C250&code=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&refcode=DPE-ND-20211213-InsurrectionAccountabilityAlert-Plead5th-ETG-sl1&akid=2275%2E9716520%2ENlYjPr)

body:
[1]Erica Smith

As one of our most dedicated supporters, we wanted to reach out and share
this exclusive sticker with you:

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29932?t=1001&akid=680%2E3698%2E4k600Y ][IMG]

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29932?t=1002&akid=680%2E3698%2E4k600Y ]Will you make a donation today to claim your free official Erica Smith
for Congress sticker? By donating $5, $10, or $15, we’ll make all the
arrangements to send our sticker straight to your mailbox.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29933?refcode=em20211213-680&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=680%2E3698%2E4k600Y ]Claim my sticker

Last month, Erica officially launched her campaign to represent NC-02.

Now, we’re working to raise as much money as possible before our very
first FEC fundraising deadline on December 31st — but we need to raise
$2,500 by Wednesday, December 15th to help us stay on track and take our
campaign to the next level.

Your
donation today will help:

→ Train Team Erica volunteers who can reach voters across North Carolina’s
2nd Congressional District
→ Hire key campaign staff to expand our capacity
→ Combat far-right Republican misinformation by running digital ads and
printing campaign materials to get the word out about our bold,
progressive campaign for working people
→ Purchase canvassing supplies like PPE, clipboards, pens, and fliers

That’s a LOT of good that your small-dollar donations can achieve and
that’s why we wanted to do something special for supporters like you who
have had Erica’s back from day one.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29932?t=1004&akid=680%2E3698%2E4k600Y ]Will
you make a donation of any amount today to help us close our $2,500
fundraising gap before midnight on December 15th? If you make a donation
right now, we’ll send you this exclusive sticker as our way of saying
thank you.

[ https://act.ericaforus.com/go/29933?refcode=em20211213-680&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1005&akid=680%2E3698%2E4k600Y ]Claim my sticker

Thank you for being a part of our movement,

Team Erica Smith

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.

body:
Are you ready to do something about it?

| [](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=990843a07b2b42738b6864ca1d3ed91f&_e=soOlnS0w4uGL8tlzAh_5S2_qwgzASi6XyGpcXMJUpKld895NtEfsf2eWuzMpfig9SEXmVg2SxYEnIeKB7n0QaGsMo8dpeoZWfU3YjG-IXlLnKyneteCE1ry9a3gIrrNxk-F7kA_kTOHXx2TzvRaLZnO0SvEX0_sMagjXz40kdU2VokHyGzdzO82bHZVBbIDo5PGxxVZGmmTB4Am6tBnUPagHOjf3o6FMc16IvzO7tBTyEsRhpwWIr2kJmXgAJd0-AVCncPnUjzBcABCQg36SCJwdXHcZGli-s-ZHIuUE_zTy5KWzEcJi8hbg1JGddK719-bSSIsGuGw7hvZDPgW4iX4jMDZ6qsEdbYEycNwXjz7mCAFiAgbweuc18l96O0PujN1Qthld2HuG0SnN1yEcSU-URqssYhUK4UhlpcucBYs-H-KSPgWnpybOrw8UazGW7BZUp87GGC0ypGkW46iHG30GivI8hdlhsa29p0ILcbJ-CYI57ETD4l9KOpz157SR)
---

Friends,

I was born and raised in Staten Island, so I’ve seen my fair share of politicians try to make a name for themselves off the backs of working-class New Yorkers.

Instead of actually fighting for our best interests, AOC and the Democrat Party want to rile up their base and elect another NYC socialist to replace me.

AOC has done NOTHING to improve the lives of New Yorkers. It's time to hold AOC and her “Squad” accountable. We need folks on Capitol Hill who know what we’re really going through and are ready to do something about it. **That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place.**

While AOC and Nancy Pelosi are looking out for themselves, [**I plan on working every day to make a difference in the lives of ordinary New Yorkers. Are you with me?**](http://links.nicolemalliotakis.com/u/click?_t=759a85d1cba743719e64e2569e23c9b8&_m=990843a07b2b42738b6864ca1d3ed91f&_e=soOlnS0w4uGL8tlzAh_5S2_qwgzASi6XyGpcXMJUpKld895NtEfsf2eWuzMpfig9SEXmVg2SxYEnIeKB7n0QaGsMo8dpeoZWfU3YjG-IXlLnKyneteCE1ry9a3gIrrNxk-F7kA_kTOHXx2TzvRaLZnO0SvEX0_sMagjXz40kdU2VokHyGzdzO82bHZVBbIDo5PGxxVZGmmTB4Am6tBnUPagHOjf3o6FMc16IvzO7tBTyEsRhpwWIr2kJmXgAJd0-AVCncPnUjzBcABCQg36SCJwdXHcZGli-s-ZHIuUE_zS_SpdCUplC4-pZcLwDUrw0xIZ0s_pePMwIRmKDyBdD6WoXn9MvgabzE-ti-6pdyPz-ha-1LmFE5ikW_KTdEA9ZvqG1c9c7dFykoHks4h-JZWOLvqWEhJndko2JsDA8Vba_kcAu1w3sysgBefRacNpNcftbVe0wwchLyIQNb__dANN4L10I0F9KAv0JYJr51o2RS_NJ9H7RpcN787dmpNxm)

clean_body: Are you ready to do something about it? | Friends, I was born and raised in Staten Island, so I’ve seen my fair share of politicians try to make a name for themselves off the backs of working-class New Yorkers. Instead of actually fighting for our best interests, AOC and the Democrat Party want to rile up their base and elect another NYC socialist to replace me. AOC has done NOTHING to improve the lives of New Yorkers. It's time to hold AOC and her “Squad” accountable. We need folks on Capitol Hill who know what we’re really going through and are ready to do something about it. That’s why I ran for Congress in the first place. While AOC and Nancy Pelosi are looking out for themselves, | Thank You for Your Continued Support, Nicole Malliotakis Congresswoman for New York’s 11th Congressional District Paid for by Nicole for New York (Federal) Nicole for New York (Federal) P.O. name: Team Morgan Harper for Ohio
subject: We have to excite the Democratic base
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Morgan Harper for Ohio
body:
Morgan is exactly the type of candidate Democrats need in 2022.
# [](https://act.morganharper.org/go/1512?refcode=em20211213-451-footer-ak&t=2&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)
_“A younger, more diverse and more progressive audience are fighting for control of this country...we need an electorate that looks more like the 2020 electorate...fundamentally for the younger more diverse electorate we need,**we’ve got to give them something to vote for.** ”_
---
We couldn’t help but say “ _yes, yes, YES_!” when we heard Cornell Belcher offer up this commentary on the 2022 midterm elections on the _Pod Save America_ podcast. **This is why Morgan is so essential to protecting our democracy and our razor-thin Democratic majority.**
**There is no better time to contribute to our campaign than right now.[_Your support will allow us to go into election year strong. So, if you’re able can you contribute $5 or any amount you can today?_](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18344?t=3&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)**
We’ve got to give our progressive, young, Democratic base something to vote for — otherwise it’ll be impossible to flip this seat blue.
Voters aren’t motivated by the same old politicians and infrastructure wins. **To invigorate key voters we need people who will go after the big issues like climate change, racial justice, reproductive rights, and protecting our democracy.**
Communities have to feel like they’re voting for someone who will fight for the everyday working person and the issues that they care about. **That’s why Morgan is in this race — she didn’t see anyone else fighting that fight.** And that’s why we’re a part of Team Morgan.
Contrary to popular belief, we need folks like Morgan to push the boundaries of what our party can achieve, and it’s the only way we won’t be handed an immense loss after the 2022 midterm elections.
**_[If you’re ready for new representation in Ohio, and a senator who will fight tooth and nail for progressive policy, please, contribute $5 or anything you can to our campaign for U.S. Senate in Ohio today.](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18344?t=4&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)_**
**[Contribute $5](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18350?refcode=em20211213-451&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=23&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)**
Thank you,
Team Morgan Harper
[](https://act.morganharper.org/go/18344?t=24&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)
Morgan Harper for U.S. Senate in Ohio

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mh-email?refcode=em20211213-451-footer&t=25&refcode2=451_90090_mBWuES&akid=451%2E90090%2EmBWuES)**
---

* The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing.
* We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers.
* Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country.
* And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice.

clean_body: Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. Our campaign is being outraised by our opponent, and we need your help to pick up the pace. | Peter, We were just reviewing a campaign update that our finance team sent over, and we wanted to personally follow up with you. Our Democrat opponent in the Georgia Senate race is off to a record-breaking fundraising pace, and he already has $17 MILLION in his war chest. If 450 new grassroots supporters will chip in just $3 right now, it will give our conservative campaign the boost it needs to WIN! I entered this Senate race because our country is going in the wrong direction. The costs of food, gasoline, and heating fuel are skyrocketing. We can't keep store shelves stocked heading into the holidays due to supply chain problems or lack of workers. Brazen criminals are on smash-and-grab crime sprees in cities across the country. And around the world, our friends don't trust us and our enemies don't fear us after President Biden abandoned Americans and our allies in Afghanistan in a hasty pull-out against military advice. We've got to get this country back on the right track. The Democrats are determined to defeat our campaign because they know if Republicans WIN in Georgia - we'll WIN BACK the Senate majority and STOP the Biden-Pelosi-Schumer agenda. So how about it? Thanks, Herschel Walker | | PAID FOR BY TEAM HERSCHEL, INC. Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but ._
